Fellow American,

The start of the 2024 campaign cycle STARTS RIGHT NOW, and we desperately need your help. This is **NOT AN ASK FOR MONEY.** If we’re going to WIN BIG, we need your input to assist our efforts and ensure the failures of the past do NOT REPEAT THEMSELVES.

Our team is conducting a MAJOR audit of Republican voters in our database, and of the MILLIONS of Republican patriots, you were selected to take the [**Official 2023 Republican Voter Verification Audit.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ad08ce1066a940eaa9c832ae1d014888&_e=_WNied8uOVK11ibDKCRECamZBAMI8AJdu_KxG6EzfeQBtj1MqF3J2S9OhgbCI2EAzRwY07KMa4Owv1LrrSd94pDlDcgW8hvv6RxVka2KIAvX0BqZ8pixnIUOOu7rnD_U8X82ZYKXcYBcBuRyAMVq0t2z6kBWvlbusOBHhlOXUaTPoqE3zA75S8J1EO4rxoMRJLH6GKRwaBJljgYWA0nHxmbzF47NEJ3pYVklfV7dcSiMDq1L-L4NUu8QYgUsqwWRQMnp-CIjM89fxwaKauXmXedYKOdgUKRQRPWXd6TYfHeaaRAGYs5UCq6GMWWp7AGMOBJT21aIz6rME6oELvj5H-tflUD5MZksOyoKvNUk4B4n829xGx8N93jzZs_G7heYPyYqgClZKWC16WHeGt0cER_wk4A5MemMCfq4MUdwvBuyBMFTptvf3X6QGMsdKLOf)

Senate Republicans specifically asked if YOU would participate in the FIRST EVER [**Republican Voter Verification Audit,**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ad08ce1066a940eaa9c832ae1d014888&_e=_WNied8uOVK11ibDKCRECamZBAMI8AJdu_KxG6EzfeQBtj1MqF3J2S9OhgbCI2EAzRwY07KMa4Owv1LrrSd94pDlDcgW8hvv6RxVka2KIAvX0BqZ8pixnIUOOu7rnD_U8X82ZYKXcYBcBuRyAMVq0t2z6kBWvlbusOBHhlOXUaTPoqE3zA75S8J1EO4rxoMRJLH6GKRwaBJljgYWA0nHxmbzF47NEJ3pYVklfV7dcSiMDq1L-L4NUu8QYgUsqwWRQMnp-CIjM89fxwaKauXmXedYKOdgUKRQRPWXd6TYfHeIL4mK2a2kTlA4KooUy_h_taBWo7XofeuD4cE_xE5tcxSCRciMMzCFSZJmYFbj1VW5tt2G663PwB3Rh8edJC4IcqzA0d4nF4xyRqpRKpNIB0kujZkfCk-Rwf8pOwDMwd4jzy18PMfFiC4Tle2ohMvA) and our success in 2024 depends on YOUR answers.

It’s simple. If we have input from dedicated grassroots supporters like you, Friend, we’ll be on a path to VICTORY in 2024. _We only trust loyal patriots like you with something this important. Can we count on you?_
**[Please submit YOUR RESPONSE for the Official 2023 Republican Voter Verification Audit within 3 hours to ensure your response is recorded. >>](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ad08ce1066a940eaa9c832ae1d014888&_e=_WNied8uOVK11ibDKCRECamZBAMI8AJdu_KxG6EzfeQBtj1MqF3J2S9OhgbCI2EAzRwY07KMa4Owv1LrrSd94pDlDcgW8hvv6RxVka2KIAvX0BqZ8pixnIUOOu7rnD_U8X82ZYKXcYBcBuRyAMVq0t2z6kBWvlbusOBHhlOXUaTPoqE3zA75S8J1EO4rxoMRJLH6GKRwaBJljgYWA0nHxmbzF47NEJ3pYVklfV7dcSiMDq1L-L4NUu8QYgUsqwWRQMnp-CIjM89fxwaKauXmXedYKOdgUKRQRPWXd6TYfHcyuHVH3CKapmtsyfmuG2PbWl8dtcyVB2ESo5bNFnKmOFT4I5v1fYhQiT_3L4ic6cOmR6ofj-9x492SuowY7jnrLbgimiumulBVb5Z6ZIG28Lk7PPSKNZ2KYYycRfZc_tOeqXDLn6syMx85E9I-wou-)**

**[Take the Official 2023 Republican Voter Verification Audit within 3 hours to ensure YOUR response is presented to top Republican Senators.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ad08ce1066a940eaa9c832ae1d014888&_e=_WNied8uOVK11ibDKCRECamZBAMI8AJdu_KxG6EzfeQBtj1MqF3J2S9OhgbCI2EAzRwY07KMa4Owv1LrrSd94pDlDcgW8hvv6RxVka2KIAvX0BqZ8pixnIUOOu7rnD_U8X82ZYKXcYBcBuRyAMVq0t2z6kBWvlbusOBHhlOXUaTPoqE3zA75S8J1EO4rxoMRJLH6GKRwaBJljgYWA0nHxmbzF47NEJ3pYVklfV7dcSiMDq1L-L4NUu8QYgUsqwWRQMnp-CIjM89fxwaKauXmXedYKOdgUKRQRPWXd6TYfHcK4TTEpQk1LSuusRu1-4pRJUiasEpjuVESQ3fxeorgYLhnAkdQM5BrH7Ii1H7P0cpYN5fWHvmzvQIbNkZnrJsoLX0vFLidtfsWIm4P6cweFxZdYTbXWRItHWHG2zCPYYLfJAMfDWHFPVLQebbN5-V9)**

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I just got fired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Folks
It actually happened.
In the middle of the night, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.
Kevin McCarthy is obsessed with me. Why? Because I have worked tirelessly to bring the American people the truth about the January 6th attack on our democracy.
Kevin McCarthy has a personal vendetta against us and is using his new power to attempt to silence us. But I will never back down. That’s why we're working to fight back against these attacks. Can you split a donation between my campaign and DASS PAC today so we can continue telling the truth about McCarthy’s corrupt, anti-democracy party? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-swalwell-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_012623_B2_Swalwell_60AC&amount=25]
Chip in now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-swalwell-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_012623_B2_Swalwell_60AC&amount=25]
McCarthy wants to replace my colleagues and me with Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, and George Santos. A triple threat trio of bigotry, violence, and corruption. I mean, what could go wrong with these three on the House’s most influential committees?
Let’s show McCarthy we won’t give in to his bullying tactics like his Republican colleagues. If you’re with me, can you rush a contribution to be split between DASS PAC and me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-swalwell-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_012623_B2_Swalwell_60AC&amount=25]

Eric

name: Katie Porter
subject: Why I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’m running because our country isn’t working for the majority of working people.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16603%2E3422442%2EthxCh5)
**New: In the race for California’s U.S. Senate seat, I'm proud to be the**** _only_****candidate who has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money.[Can you make a contribution today to help fuel our people-powered campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230126-2?refcode=EMAF26_2_WHY_20230126_V1_F&refcode2=16603_3422442_thxCh5&akid=16603%2E3422442%2EthxCh5)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230126-2?refcode=EMAF26_2_WHY_20230126_V1_F&refcode2=16603_3422442_thxCh5&akid=16603%2E3422442%2EthxCh5)**
I’m running because our country isn’t working for the majority of working people. Republicans funded by big corporate interests have rigged the rules against families, making it difficult to get ahead. The elected leaders we send to Washington must be accountable to the people they represent, and they must prove to voters that democracy can work for them.
I’ve spent my career delivering for working people and protecting taxpayers. In the House, I was the only Democrat to oppose “earmarks,” which are a way to fund Members' pet projects. **I’m leading the fight to ban congressional stock trading, and the whiteboard you may have seen me bring to hearings is more than a fun prop** —my questioning of witnesses in congressional hearings secured free COVID testing for every American, helped us pass bills that lower costs for families, and showed how corporate profits are driving inflation.
We’re just getting started, Derek, thanks for being a part of Team Porter.
Katie
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $15 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230126-2?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=EMAF26_2_WHY_20230126_V1_F-el&refcode2=16603_3422442_thxCh5&akid=16603%2E3422442%2EthxCh5) [Donate $36 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230126-2?express_lane=true&amount=36&refcode=EMAF26_2_WHY_20230126_V1_F-el&refcode2=16603_3422442_thxCh5&akid=16603%2E3422442%2EthxCh5) [Donate $50 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230126-2?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EMAF26_2_WHY_20230126_V1_F-el&refcode2=16603_3422442_thxCh5&akid=16603%2E3422442%2EthxCh5) [Donate $100 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230126-2?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EMAF26_2_WHY_20230126_V1_F-el&refcode2=16603_3422442_thxCh5&akid=16603%2E3422442%2EthxCh5) [Donate $250 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230126-2?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=EMAF26_2_WHY_20230126_V1_F-el&refcode2=16603_3422442_thxCh5&akid=16603%2E3422442%2EthxCh5) [Other amount ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230126-2?refcode=EMAF26_2_WHY_20230126_V1_F&refcode2=16603_3422442_thxCh5&akid=16603%2E3422442%2EthxCh5)

name: Bridget Williams, Action 4 Liberty
subject: Peter, did you see Jake's email?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting_4&n=1)
---
Did you see the important email message from our president, Jake Duesenberg last night? Please give it a read! \- Bridget Williams
* * *
Peter -- Are you done fighting? I ask that question because this battle for our liberty just got much, much more serious. We now know the Radical Democrat agenda and its even worse than we initially imagined. **Governor Walz' budget is going to grow our already bloated state government by 25%. He's going to spend the vast majority of the surplus. And get this...he's even going to RAISE YOUR TAXES!** On top of that, Walz and the Radical Democrat Party is voting for the nation's most extreme abortion bill this Friday in the Senate. And Walz just mentioned that he wants to come for our guns as well. Are you familiar with the social credit system in Communist China? Well, it seems as though the initial architecture of that is in one of the Democrats' bill which would put more money in a data system to track "biased" speech. We discussed that on yesterday's The Truth Hurts Show: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfCpHjgJ_1THUlAXOC50t66JOnPLFVLK5O6_vzYUTNbJ2S4h1_CrGTC-cHtN3mHidbJXjKv0DK9S_quxgK_0Zk7llkuvmy7N5aqQNq1gEJioq&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting_4&n=2) We should not be surprised by any of this. After all, it's the politician's objective to gain more power and control over our lives. They don't believe in health freedom - they believe in vaccine mandates! They don't believe in the right to keep and bear arms - they believe in gun registration and a defenseless electorate. They don't believe in personal property - they believe in government's ownership of wealth. _"You will own nothing and you will be happy."_ The global, leftist agenda is a serious threat to us all. And now the frontlines of the implementation of that agenda is right here in Minnesota. Tim Walz and the Radical Democrats in this state are coming for everything. They are not shy about their radical plans. So the question I have for you is what are you going to do about it? Are you going to watch this radical transformation happen or are **YOU READY TO FIGHT AGAINST IT?**! We don't really have an option here, unless your house is on the market and the moving truck is already reserved. I personally have invested in this state with my business and my family. It's not so simple for people like me to pick up and leave. And I'm guessing you are in the same boat. What I need of you is your help to **fund our field operations**. I'm assuming you don't have time to go door knock in the Iron Range or along the North Dakota border, pressuring vulnerable Democrat politicians. But I have those people at the ready. And I'm guessing you can't give up eight hours this Friday to make phone calls to targeted districts. But I know the young liberty professionals who can. What I need from you is important. I need your help to put these young liberty professionals in the fight to STOP THE RADICAL LEFTWING AGENDA NOW! Do you have $50 you can send IMMEDIATELY so I can hire those doorknockers and phone callers who will put the pressure on these vulnerable Democrats?!?! **Please, I'm begging you, reach into your pocket and help me fund this operation. We're the last line of defense against this Radical Leftwing agenda!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting_4&n=3 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting_4&n=3)
---
I can't stress how important our battle is right now.
We're the only group here willing to do what is needed to STOP the radicals in their footsteps.
If we fail, there's no one coming here to save us.
**Here's what we are facing with the Radical Democrat agenda:**
**\- Higher taxes**
**\- Increase in car tabs**
**\- Our overtaxed surplus money spent on wasteful projects**
**\- More tax money funneled though fraudulent non-profit groups**
**\- "Biased" speech reporting system**
**\- Abortion in all cases, up to the moment of birth**
**\- Anti-gun laws that disarm us**
I really need your help to fight back against this agenda. It won't be easy and it will take A LOT of money.
We know how to be effective and win in politics. That's how we Ended Walz' Emergency Powers in 2021.
So please, help me fund this extremely important mission.
[**Reach into your pocket and help fund our field operations with a $25, $50, $100 or $500 donation IMMEDIATELY!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting_4&n=4)
Thank you in advance!
**In Liberty,**
Jake Duesenberg
[http://www.action4liberty.com/](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting_4&n=5)
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · 1920 Oakcrest Ave, 5, Roseville, MN 55042, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting_4&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_done_fighting_4&n=7), software for leaders.

subject: re: Your official membership
body:
Time is running out to add your name to our January membership and claim your 3X-matched gift! | | |

body:
| | | [](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=365d547af49249ed852fc34e4a6645bb&_e=eceHPRjxZP7MWigjXZpBuANwIhxegzsEnyJNIjizxCHEXt1p2zqvZUINDK77WXLCk2DQ122p3OZsABOln93gP9QDynuNvxbwPs3VVgtdyyYTMOmXxzDYBo_N5jaZTsFKgmQHvUphFNeVMU2sbGBvJxccFPhyfZ-swj7ZxXTGa6ZVEovVkr1Iu8wE52s-S5HxytLkToVuOlmmeHW3meh6_AOEQ9pTGHtftBsDwwsDvyk48phVymcwwmHAtDQuexttSD5bm0waggldaNlxThl8K7q1pi524BmmB__dzPVrsueqFz1StlEEnJWHCzV8NDEvWP3nCZv7Bax2uCkA8NX5ii4jmzWiQkteyiajvY3F1ddrSfuwwiu8cpZmYoBvmXXL)

Peter,
---
| | It’s Senator Rick Scott. Representing the people of Florida has been the honor of a lifetime. And now, I’m ready to continue our journey together.

**I’m running for re-election in 2024, and I’m ready to continue our work to RESCUE AMERICA from Washington’s out-of-control spending and woke agenda.**

The time for strong conservative leadership in Washington is NOW, Peter.

I’ve NEVER compromised our conservative values to please the radical Left, and I’m not about to start now.

clean_body: Anything at all? Folks, We’re reaching out to see if there’s anything we can say for you to chip in $10 or more before Tuesday’s end-of-month deadline. What if we told you early rankings show that Senate Democrats have a much tougher path to hold the majority than Republicans do to take it back? And Martin’s seat in New Mexico is one of 23 critical Democratic seats up for re-election? Or what if we said that Martin is working hard in the Senate to build on our wins for New Mexicans and folks across the country — from fighting to protect our public lands to strengthening our economy. Or perhaps it would help if we shared that we’re just a few days away from our first end-of-month deadline of the year — and whether we reach our goal could determine if we have the resources necessary for the work ahead. If those facts motivate you as much as they do our campaign, can you pitch in ahead of our end-of-month deadline to power our work? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Heinrich | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Ryan Chamberlin Campaign
subject: Todays Press Release - Medical Coalition Announced
body:
| | |
---

**Ryan Chamberlin Announces Medical Coalition Leadership**

**Belleview, Fla.** — Today, Ryan Chamberlin announced the leadership and endorsement of his medical coalition in District 24.

“I’m honored to have the support of these local medical professionals,” said Ryan Chamberlin. “I look forward to working alongside them and to standing with Governor Ron DeSantis on his ‘Prescribe Freedom’ initiative to protect Floridians from those who would use a so-called medical crisis as an excuse to trample our constitutional rights. Together, we will keep our state the Free State of Florida.”

“Ryan is the leader we need in District 24,” said Dr. Patrick Acevedo. “Ryan will work hard to provide better medical care to patients and won’t give in to special interest groups and their agendas. Ryan is a man of his word and won’t back down from the fight for freedom.”

The six members of the coalition have been in practice for many years and are respected medical experts in the district. Each brings special perspectives to matters of medical practice within their distinct communities.

**_Coalition Leadership:_**
Patrick Acevedo, MD
Michael Crimi, PA-C
Steven Hatfill, MD
Vipul Patel, MD
Vitor Pastorini, MD
Jack Paulk, MD

Ryan Chamberlin is an author, speaker, and consultant that has been working for the last two years to launch The True Patriot Network (TPN), a conservative social media and news platform supporting strong American values. Ryan has worked with Success Magazine, speaks regularly at national conferences, and recently co-authored his fifth book titled Think Big which became an international bestseller in May of 2022. His third book titled The Rich You Formula was co-authored with the late relationship expert Gary Smalley and endorsed by Mike Huckabee. Ryan has been married to Jenny Chamberlin for 28 years. They met at Souls Harbor First Pentecostal Church in 1989, where they still attend.

###

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd
Belleview FL 34420
USA

name: Lauren Zimmerman, Team Veronica
subject: We need to apologize
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
Friend, Earlier today, you received an email from Team Veronica with an undignified subject line. We want to apologize. Our digital contractor sent this subject line without approval. I understand that you may be offended and surprised. Not only because this campaign would never speak to our supporters like that, but also because we know you DO care. You've supported Veronica with your votes, your money, your words of encouragement, and much more. To suggest you don't care is as offensive as the vulgarity itself. I'm sorry for this error. We thank you for being a great supporter of Veronica's and for your understanding. Lauren Zimmerman
Campaign Manager
Team Veronica \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Lauren with Team Veronica **<info@veronicaescobar.com>
Date: Thu, Jan 26, 2023 at 6:02 PM ET
Subject: Our average recurring contribution is just $25.29
To: You Folks, it doesn't take much to make a big difference for our campaign. Our recurring donors keep our campaign going. Their ongoing support enables us to register and mobilize thousands of El Pasoans in the fight for grassroots change. That work must start now since Veronica's campaign is already gearing up for her reelection in LESS than two years. It will fly by. _**I'm not talking about big-money donors — I'm talking about everyday people like you and me. Working people who are passionate about our community, and believe a better world is possible.**_ They chip in a few bucks a month to support Veronica's campaign, and it makes a world of difference.**_In fact, our average recurring contribution is just $25.29!_** ******[Contribute $25.29 Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57851636/389304626/-1291653745?refcode2=16588da9-e49d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&recurring=true&amount=25.29&refcode=230126_team_apology_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjU4OGRhOS1lNDlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRWRaarFKSX_OKwvAdlNb3zIu9Z17dvxr1Cr72Tyqws=)****** It doesn't take much, friend, when we all work together. clean_body: | | Friend, Earlier today, you received an email from Team Veronica with an undignified subject line. We want to apologize. Our digital contractor sent this subject line without approval. I understand that you may be offended and surprised. Not only because this campaign would never speak to our supporters like that, but also because we know you DO care. You've supported Veronica with your votes, your money, your words of encouragement, and much more. To suggest you don't care is as offensive as the vulgarity itself. I'm sorry for this error. We thank you for being a great supporter of Veronica's and for your understanding. Lauren Zimmerman Campaign Manager Team Veronica \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Lauren with Team Veronica <info@veronicaescobar.com> Date: Thu, Jan 26, 2023 at 6:02 PM ET Subject: Our average recurring contribution is just $25.29 To: You Folks, it doesn't take much to make a big difference for our campaign. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1688%2E5257348%2ERVPb-K ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, can I have a moment to explain what is happening right
now?

This morning, I announced my campaign for the United States Senate. And
then Republicans started piling on. Immediately.

In reality, it started on Tuesday night, when Kevin McCarthy unilaterally
removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.

But it’s continued today. McCarthy posted a video on social media calling
me a liar over, and over, and over again. Matt Gaetz introduced a
resolution to prevent me from receiving classified briefings in Congress —
called the PENCIL Act. Go figure. Even presidential wannabe Mike Pompeo
joined the act attacking me.

No matter how much these MAGA Republicans hate each other, they are united
in one cause: Complete and total opposition to my efforts to provide
oversight, demand accountability, and protect our democracy. And that’s
why they are coming after me.

Derek, this is bigger than me. They will try to destroy anyone
who stands up to them, and their leader Donald Trump. That’s why I need
you to stand with me today.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM4_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1688%2E5257348%2ERVPb-K ]Rush a $10 donation to help me fight back against the vicious
Republican attacks that they’re unleashing to stop our movement to save

name: Eve Schiff
subject: Hey, it’s Eve Schiff. This is important.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1679%2E5257348%2EJ9IUDV ]Adam Schiff for Senate

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM5_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1679%2E5257348%2EJ9IUDV ]Adam and Eve

Hi everyone —

It’s Eve Schiff.

Yes, Adam and Eve. And yes, we’ve heard all the jokes. Yes, that one, too.

But I’m reaching out today with something serious:

Adam just announced he’s running for the U.S. Senate in California in
2024. And he needs your support — right now.

Here’s a personal link: [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM5_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1679%2E5257348%2EJ9IUDV ]secure.actblue.com/donate/jan2023_abs_em_launch

We have all watched Adam over the last six years. The work he’s done has
been so important.

We watched as he investigated Trump. We watched as he led the impeachment
trial against him. We watched his work on holding people accountable for
January 6th. And we watched him as he was ruthlessly attacked.

By Trump. By Fox News. By unscrupulous Republicans in Congress. He is
pretty tough, and has weathered the storm well, but I’ll admit it — the
viscousness of what he has endured concerns me.

That’s why Adam’s announcement this morning is such a serious one.

He is taking on a new challenge, and one that will draw new attacks. But
if he is successful, it will also allow him to be an even more powerful
defender of our democracy and its institutions. Because this isn’t about
Trump. This is about the vision Adam has for the future of our state and
country, and the vision that I know you share. Where right and truth and
decency matter. And the oath of office means something.

Where the economy works for everyone, and everyone has a chance to
succeed. Where parents can put their children to bed knowing they will be
safe, knowing that if they get ill, they can get the care that they need,
and knowing that the planet can be as healthy as they are.

I believe that our country is filled with promise, and that our democracy
is precious. And fragile. Adam has been on the frontlines, protecting it.
He always will be. And you have always been by his side. I am so grateful
for that.

As Adam embarks on this journey, I hope you will give him a huge show of
support today. It would mean so much to me. After all, we’re all in this
fight together.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM5_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1006&akid=1679%2E5257348%2EJ9IUDV ]That’s why I’m asking. Can Adam and I count on you chipping in $10
right now?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.yaxvcj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20230126_PM5_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1007&akid=1679%2E5257348%2EJ9IUDV ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate [ ]Adam and Eve Hi everyone — It’s Eve Schiff. Yes, Adam and Eve. And yes, we’ve heard all the jokes. Yes, that one, too. But I’m reaching out today with something serious: Adam just announced he’s running for the U.S. Senate in California in 2024. And he needs your support — right now. Here’s a personal link: [ ]secure.actblue.com/donate/jan2023absemlaunch We have all watched Adam over the last six years. The work he’s done has been so important. We watched as he investigated Trump. We watched as he led the impeachment trial against him. We watched his work on holding people accountable for January 6th. And we watched him as he was ruthlessly attacked. By Trump. By Fox News. By unscrupulous Republicans in Congress. He is pretty tough, and has weathered the storm well, but I’ll admit it — the viscousness of what he has endured concerns me. That’s why Adam’s announcement this morning is such a serious one. He is taking on a new challenge, and one that will draw new attacks. But if he is successful, it will also allow him to be an even more powerful defender of our democracy and its institutions. Because this isn’t about Trump. This is about the vision Adam has for the future of our state and country, and the vision that I know you share. Where right and truth and decency matter. And the oath of office means something. Where the economy works for everyone, and everyone has a chance to succeed. Where parents can put their children to bed knowing they will be safe, knowing that if they get ill, they can get the care that they need, and knowing that the planet can be as healthy as they are. I believe that our country is filled with promise, and that our democracy is precious. And fragile. Adam has been on the frontlines, protecting it. He always will be. And you have always been by his side. I am so grateful for that. As Adam embarks on this journey, I hope you will give him a huge show of support today. It would mean so much to me. After all, we’re all in this fight together. [ ]That’s why I’m asking. Can Adam and I count on you chipping in $10 right now? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $3 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thanks for always standing with Adam. It means the world to us. — Eve [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 150 E. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: 1:40 AM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62254107:6VDp0dGNN:m:1:3331421248:00ECE6400C30E17A728DB46249B6B57C:r)
---

Peter, it's Newt Gingrich.

My wife, Callista, and I stayed up until 1:40am to watch Speaker McCarthy's historic address as he first took the gavel after _years_ of Pelosi's destruction.

We observed Hakeem Jeffries' disgusting, partisan baloney - it made me think back, in contrast, to Democrat Leader Dick Gephardt's sincere acknowledgement and transfer of power when he handed me the gavel after taking back Congress for the first time in 40 years in 1994.

Then, we listened to Speaker McCarthy's powerful address (I hope you got to hear it live too). This was a unifying speech by a leader who understands the Constitution and is ready to restore "the people's House" to the people. He spoke of a new chapter of _American_ governance - the days of Pelosi's political games are OVER.

This is going to be a very different and more consequential speakership than anyone currently imagines. And it is going to be an American speakership fighting for the beliefs and values of the American people.

Speaker McCarthy has had my full support and endorsement from the start, and I'm hoping he has yours too. In just a few short days, he has already delivered on countless campaign promises - from government accountability to defunding Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents - and he's only just getting started.

As former Speaker of the House, I'm humbly asking you to help Speaker McCarthy usher in the wave of conservative policy, government accountability, and American leadership our country desperately needs. **Trust me, I don 't like asking for money, but we truly need as much support as we can to go up against a Democrat-held Senate & White House:**
**Will you stand with Speaker McCarthy & me?**
---
| | [SUPPORT HOUSE REPUBLICANS NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62254107:6VDp0dGNN:m:1:3331421248:00ECE6400C30E17A728DB46249B6B57C:r)
---

Thank you,

Newt Gingrich

---
| |
* * *
---

Peter,

The radical leftwing media loves to create secular saints out of people who will promote their agenda.

Often, what you see on the TV isn't even real.

Did you see this fake video of Greta posing with police during her "arrest?"

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62255169:JvlY0dGVN:m:1:3334294963:EC10ED521C5674C7ACA9CBBD0D8E829B:r)

The media creates these _" saints"_ to lie to you about what is happening around the world.

**2018: Greta Thunberg
2019: George Floyd
2020: Fauci and Biden
2022: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
2023: _Who's next?_**

These people are merely figureheads to put a human face on the evil, leftwing radicals who want to destroy our country.

**We must defeat them by exposing their lies.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 100 new supporters in the next 72 hours.

[_**Can you make an urgent gift of any amount?**__**Click here**_ _**to ensure your support >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62255169:JvlY0dGVN:m:1:3334294963:EC10ED521C5674C7ACA9CBBD0D8E829B:r)

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

_How does the Media Research Center expose the left-wing media_?

**FIRST:** The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 800,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

**SECOND:** My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias.

**THIRD:** MRC's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

But we can't do this alone, Peter. Can I count on you to help us expose the radical left's lies? **Click below to donate. **

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: HAPPENING NOW: The pro-life trial of the century
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing bogus politically motivated felony charges.Please let me explain.In the early morning of September 23, over twenty FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately.**With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail in front of his wife and kids.** Now Mark is facing the possibility of eleven years in a federal prison on multiple felony charges arising out of an incident involving an abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our Thomas More Society legal team is representing him in court RIGHT NOW. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6fa4atujuousbmif1rl53thldg9i90qcvubldrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj4c3h2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, offering support to women who think they have no alternative but to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son with him.But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**.Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse.The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating life and defending his family._**We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort - who are trying to destroy Mark and his family - don't get away with this.[**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in – by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za5bllb1c24aknb42qofuh3o0qt843pscpdqtjng_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj4c3h2bs) Make no mistake, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith.The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges, and when the escort filed charges himself, **his case was thrown out.** Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us.My name is Tom Brejcha, and I'm the President and Chief Counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom today, you can have an impact on the outcome by donating now to help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z852ohr5mak7t48pr7i0vofse2qlv1g1sn4cjpeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj4c3h2bs) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhdbpttnmqlr74p617ebs5j9s1h79500ba8njuag_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj4chh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm9meut4kfblffso8hvt23beov188sbj3ng1eiq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj4chh2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv6lvso0c36709u7q2raovieq9crimf1sgcqn45g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj4chh2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z229u588to0nrc32r31ctrftllimccuiljps7v10_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj4chh2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi6s9n96aejnalkv26l3fllsfdhjtbji5rd7hcp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj4chh2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: HAPPENING NOW: The pro-life trial of the century
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing bogus politically motivated felony charges.Please let me explain.In the early morning of September 23, over twenty FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately.**With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail in front of his wife and kids.** Now Mark is facing the possibility of eleven years in a federal prison on multiple felony charges arising out of an incident involving an abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our Thomas More Society legal team is representing him in court RIGHT NOW. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeoqf3epa0ke1uv7ukkpu3giqesug0bevtep9bmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj2c1h2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, offering support to women who think they have no alternative but to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son with him.But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**.Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse.The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating life and defending his family._**We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort - who are trying to destroy Mark and his family - don't get away with this.[**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in – by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsj0piu4st7s5ruqrhtq2b0l72u51j4ad2d67la0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj2c1h2bs) Make no mistake, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith.The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges, and when the escort filed charges himself, **his case was thrown out.** Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us.My name is Tom Brejcha, and I'm the President and Chief Counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom today, you can have an impact on the outcome by donating now to help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjqil2vd9h6mdhl4qi39iadg6t4liokb9ib1ea38_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj2c1h2bs) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence.To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for crimes he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him, and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbvs8cj7dhl7o2lvjrqkgu26f2lp2svjsku1j8h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj2c1h2bs) I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
---
President & Chief Counsel
---

**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztvqhhvkdpjreco0ism93gcebsrgmkqif76tqmk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i6eoj2c1h2bs)

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2up785sk8llomkr7qr9ndlp6ifpvmtpieranjo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i69o31c1h2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zud38o0kfs2pmj50rv16mv8kd2ifmfqtnk99e39o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i69o31c1h2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zer75i8eimk3qrao1v0rr3t47435v0plb7qcu7s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i69o31c1h2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znkngnqfljkjgbs4ilgs5nu04tnt6d3a92mc7ov0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3i69o31c1h2bs)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Help me Fight Back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
These left-wing thugs have been posting pictures of my children online.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62255867:6WkB0dGuN:m:1:3331421248:397194939371BC9AAFD04E0967B7341E:r "Video") Peter: I've been attacked in more ways than you can imagine. They even tried to murder me! You'd think it couldn't get worse, but now the left is taking their attacks against me to a new and disgusting level. **These left-wing thugs have been posting pictures of my children online.** It's sick and intentionally dangerous. The left is worried about what I can accomplish in Washington, they're even willing to put my children's lives in danger in hopes that I will be stopped from exposing the corruption from the Biden family and their leftist allies. **[Will you help to fight back and protect my family from these threats with your donation today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62255867:6WkB0dGuN:m:1:3331421248:397194939371BC9AAFD04E0967B7341E:r "Will
you help to fight back and protect my family from these threats with your support of a $25, $50, or $100 donation today?")** The New York Times, The Washington Post, and other leftist media organizations are going apoplectic because I have been given a seat on the House Oversight Committee and charged with investigating how our government handled the COVID-19 pandemic. They now realize that my mission to protect America from foreign adversaries and America-last leftists will have the impact I've promised my constituents and other fellow conservatives. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62255867:6WkB0dGuN:m:1:3331421248:397194939371BC9AAFD04E0967B7341E:r "Garage")That's even caused the ire of Squad member Hakeem Jeffries who is clearly using Anitfa as an extension of the Democrat Party in their efforts to intimidate us. That's why it's no surprise that these Leftist Antifa thugs have descended from out of state to cause havoc in my home state of Georgia. It got even worse after I posted this meme in response to the Biden Document Scandal that leftists began posting photos of my own children! **It 's time to fight back. That's why I've filed legislation that designates Antifa as Domestic Terrorists!** **[Help me stand up to these left-wing thugs and prevent them from stopping my investigation into Hunter, Brandon, and the trail of corruption that follows them. Donate today to expose the truth before Merrick Garland helps Brandon bury it!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62255867:6WkB0dGuN:m:1:3331421248:397194939371BC9AAFD04E0967B7341E:r "Help me stand up to these left-wing thugs and prevent them from stopping my investigation into Hunter, Brandon, and the trail of corruption
that follows them. Donate $50, $100, or $250 today to expose the truth before Merrick Garland helps Brandon bury it!")** **And while I didn 't bring any classified documents to my home,[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62255867:6WkB0dGuN:m:1:3331421248:397194939371BC9AAFD04E0967B7341E:r "Headline") the left would rather criticize me and make me Public Enemy #1.** They attack me for trying to protect America's children and our porous borders. They attack me for questioning the money sent to Ukraine without any accountability. They attack me for wanting to question the Biden family's corruption, even after revelations of classified documents at the Biden Delaware compound or more stories about Hunter come to light on an almost daily basis. Clearly, it's all an orchestrated campaign to intimidate us and stop the investigations. **[Help me fight back against the left's lunacy TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62255867:6WkB0dGuN:m:1:3331421248:397194939371BC9AAFD04E0967B7341E:r "Help me fight back against the left’s lunacy TODAY!")** You know we have a real problem when Attorney General Merrick Garland fails to hold BLM and Antifa members accountable for their actions while he persecutes individuals who visited the U.S. Capitol Building on January 6, 2021. You know our system of justice is rigged when Attorney General Merrick Garland raids Mar-a-Lago and pushes President Trump's attorneys aside but has the Justice Department enter a "cooperation" agreement with the Biden family and their attorneys. **As we get closer to another trove of documents is found, they will continue to ratchet up their intimidation tactics to stop us.** But I refuse to let them intimidate me so I'm going to keep digging. We all know that the truth scares the left to no end and the closer I get to it, the nastier the attacks against me will become! Will you help me to finally expose Merrick Garland's double standards and the criminal operation of the Biden family and their allies? **[If so, donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62255867:6WkB0dGuN:m:1:3331421248:397194939371BC9AAFD04E0967B7341E:r "If so, donate today.")** Fighting for the Truth,
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) | | [HELP ME FIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62255867:6WkB0dGuN:m:1:3331421248:397194939371BC9AAFD04E0967B7341E:r "HELP ME FIGHT")

name: American Update
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and governmentincluding an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0434%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=6jx%2fUibcGCKDmFOdbp6CNA&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657066%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=st7azUZGe10ZkHo5GhwH3g&sysid=1)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657067%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vAPfkfR3qaXzPoZBQclQsA&sysid=1) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657068%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dXJhQ2Mqhe9o9GURCbYKfw&sysid=1) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0434%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=6jx%2fUibcGCKDmFOdbp6CNA&sysid=1)_

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
This issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0445%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fSiSMelLDuiXtarvHW6Hzg&sysid=1)

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657060%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l6fTv2hq9XMTu%2fPwm5L6XQ&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

I’m writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden’s open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657061%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eBYnv4duXK9xFAS4TA%2f7KA&sysid=1)**

It’s critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media’s deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation’s history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump’s term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden’s immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden’s “policies” have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657061%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eBYnv4duXK9xFAS4TA%2f7KA&sysid=1)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden’s open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657061%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eBYnv4duXK9xFAS4TA%2f7KA&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657062%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=riLe%2bwE9L0hELSdxHUKFIQ&sysid=1)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Tim
subject: The value of a dollar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | | | | [GIVE $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62256429:6E50RdGwN:m:1:3334294963:560C7D4178EF7E072E0EBE691C5FDB27:r "Generic
Button")
---
Peter,

I know that asking for money is hard. To some folks, $25 is a lot, especially right now.

Growing up in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina, money was tight. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job changing oil at a gas station when I was 13.

I understand the value of a dollar and what it can do.

It's not easy to ask for money, and I don't take doing so lightly. _**[I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62256429:6E50RdGwN:m:1:3334294963:560C7D4178EF7E072E0EBE691C5FDB27:r "I know that every donation made is a
sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.")**_

With that being said, it would mean so much to me if you could chip in whatever you can to make sure we can beat our ambitious end-of-month goal.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62256429:6E50RdGwN:m:1:3334294963:560C7D4178EF7E072E0EBE691C5FDB27:r)
---
| | | [GIVE $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62256429:6E50RdGwN:m:1:3334294963:560C7D4178EF7E072E0EBE691C5FDB27:r "Generic
Button")
---
Thank you so much. I know that chipping in any amount can be hard - but if I meet my goal, I can continue this fight for folks like you.

-Tim
---
| | | [GIVE $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62256429:6E50RdGwN:m:1:3334294963:560C7D4178EF7E072E0EBE691C5FDB27:r "Generic Button")
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62256428:6E50RdGwN:m:1:3334294963:560C7D4178EF7E072E0EBE691C5FDB27:r)
---

Peter- Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**********
This is just the beginning, Peter. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62256428:6E50RdGwN:m:1:3334294963:560C7D4178EF7E072E0EBE691C5FDB27:r "Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**
********************
---
| | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62256428:6E50RdGwN:m:1:3334294963:560C7D4178EF7E072E0EBE691C5FDB27:r "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott
---

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: HAPPENING NOW: The pro-life trial of the century
body:
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing bogus politically motivated felony charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, over twenty FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail in front of his wife and kids.** Now Mark is facing the possibility of eleven years in a federal prison on multiple felony charges arising out of an incident involving an abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our Thomas More Society legal team is representing him in court RIGHT NOW. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6c4c21c02a84faa9d4b33787e86973a&_e=heNDjV0NyM5xaH0K9lDanPxvzcBmYhQmEdXYNPvDmPtUeIGhMiwwSssk3-83lAN0-18rcxl_RFhQPwugX8gkB0QfPFHf07lQ-wOcej4b2yyKGiJ9uCGMmyUJxdAfIqgSgBdFtd9PF_4uthWaEraReW1nNUIDJrVr6uflR31OhZuHMCWCbru-wKf5_lGvw2Pox0fQQxZsIifBu85ZnUqU-oiRwk9hWibIKFD77LPpjqhnl0pIphXTET7c5tvmiy4T1CbisjE3LYVytyD3DmysgK77g2CxKdtSdrKNp9EKXy1F5N_F1QiEnigNt3i-c0ZCrjzVtBmELzxhkPiVefIsCAeLsOdwdtFynl8jUgjvkxRbdMlHDSUaIcmbHdowWIQ3) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, offering support to women who think they have no alternative but to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son with him. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating life and defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort - who are trying to destroy Mark and his family - don't get away with this. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6c4c21c02a84faa9d4b33787e86973a&_e=heNDjV0NyM5xaH0K9lDanPxvzcBmYhQmEdXYNPvDmPtUeIGhMiwwSssk3-83lAN0-18rcxl_RFhQPwugX8gkB0QfPFHf07lQ-wOcej4b2yyKGiJ9uCGMmyUJxdAfIqgSgBdFtd9PF_4uthWaEraReW1nNUIDJrVr6uflR31OhZuHMCWCbru-wKf5_lGvw2Pox0fQQxZsIifBu85ZnUqU-qBAsfSEYqN4-_29zFayP4FKJSqWPby0-Q1HNKPNW5ZN9QdWCl2n7yqlHjUSonYI92PmPMy4d5H1BTkV_TmuS3wB0dLJhnXOd8v1xarXHEN1UrO33vz6OKvvV-rij84YTiCnv5c7JuRqcpgTrMvCy4KS9fWHEs48jtQkO-sMssfe) Make no mistake, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges, and when the escort filed charges himself, **his case was thrown out.** Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha, and I'm the President and Chief Counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom today, you can have an impact on the outcome by donating now to help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6c4c21c02a84faa9d4b33787e86973a&_e=heNDjV0NyM5xaH0K9lDanPxvzcBmYhQmEdXYNPvDmPtUeIGhMiwwSssk3-83lAN0-18rcxl_RFhQPwugX8gkB0QfPFHf07lQ-wOcej4b2yyKGiJ9uCGMmyUJxdAfIqgSgBdFtd9PF_4uthWaEraReW1nNUIDJrVr6uflR31OhZuHMCWCbru-wKf5_lGvw2Pox0fQQxZsIifBu85ZnUqU-gGmm_zM7ZoGoeldVm7q14vzfrk0HHb-F4rOCPHjVtl6AHrCTY_1j5XejdNdU7sNY0qh-wRoWRg0TYNnHmqWXY5I5icbh5xHVa-sunL_uOxOewE1rzX8mJzjxWEsQiWFJu2bvT8OnOSwoecSGAjukY55MSVTqidKIqWGgIp8HYsf) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for crimes he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him, and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6c4c21c02a84faa9d4b33787e86973a&_e=heNDjV0NyM5xaH0K9lDanPxvzcBmYhQmEdXYNPvDmPtUeIGhMiwwSssk3-83lAN0-18rcxl_RFhQPwugX8gkB0QfPFHf07lQ-wOcej4b2yyKGiJ9uCGMmyUJxdAfIqgSgBdFtd9PF_4uthWaEraReW1nNUIDJrVr6uflR31OhZuHMCWCbru-wKf5_lGvw2Pox0fQQxZsIifBu85ZnUqU-v3wK1cjyadwAN3ZmZg2V_NUxTH2qaVZiTa16zRENJJz_K8gRgCI3eDxHupEtweO6gVUuiPMyKijFFmlU_dW-V095h-mXEa-KXuih1wJJ1yFyU9WQbQzd_8ms0QAcIs0dj5EnrhDaLl4NpLNCc9h3ZIJotgh5WZ2ltCcF8GmYxZZ) I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha

President & Chief Counsel

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: What do you think about higher education today?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f169ca167c0846d4a3e5c0a3d469da7f&_e=Kbpa03I9_Y9mfYwCPXDE6iCg2RiObaX77RXjJcaGvZTfZFhLdNE1ZNfqb7wvrYUB6ZFpW5hFeB7rYO2Mj893GRZOAPVdd9oJe0UliUUYamDFP6_0Qwbx8V4Be6LBc6-bETwqz8iRCxQpByz26IkuXKcPh00_QAkZsvZpcu6RfQRsF_AOKw-7vkxcRDgvmT_92giMNoqP3sS1Xb83hvw7wIRr8jACKxO5bkrIPcCCvklofGxOig89w-iY5GVgq-wuSg7omoTvQonbszwKE74Nb_9Pr5bT18pl8kM3kE-u9qnIJ82zxtfprVk_ga5hFauQIBNQMNMVSBhhtkjEhfKwjVkX17QmN74wQsMYKnblG9hS56dYGubGnSr09YtGheHZ)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f169ca167c0846d4a3e5c0a3d469da7f&_e=Kbpa03I9_Y9mfYwCPXDE6iCg2RiObaX77RXjJcaGvZTfZFhLdNE1ZNfqb7wvrYUB6ZFpW5hFeB7rYO2Mj893GRZOAPVdd9oJe0UliUUYamDFP6_0Qwbx8V4Be6LBc6-bETwqz8iRCxQpByz26IkuXKcPh00_QAkZsvZpcu6RfQRsF_AOKw-7vkxcRDgvmT_92giMNoqP3sS1Xb83hvw7wIRr8jACKxO5bkrIPcCCvkkj3jpEN9zXBZw3zAcdyl5lcRfdZqS6jKXuskwFvNqwvwoqAdI5YGnUg5bO4-JckG5EL4g3XsO3fIyHEOvmUtswUHRImTqynmbdQxxYn17LY6pxw42uVUxiz7qqYYRgZdZBvi2zcoSicrlrSk7eDsYp) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f169ca167c0846d4a3e5c0a3d469da7f&_e=Kbpa03I9_Y9mfYwCPXDE6iCg2RiObaX77RXjJcaGvZTfZFhLdNE1ZNfqb7wvrYUB6ZFpW5hFeB7rYO2Mj893GRZOAPVdd9oJe0UliUUYamDFP6_0Qwbx8V4Be6LBc6-bETwqz8iRCxQpByz26IkuXKcPh00_QAkZsvZpcu6RfQRsF_AOKw-7vkxcRDgvmT_92giMNoqP3sS1Xb83hvw7wIRr8jACKxO5bkrIPcCCvkm9xJsAgzBe9rKaaZ21LAsJnDINrvtMBIP8iei7Eay5QLiLpFlHgATkc8DTjJZOc8v6UnUx4rVc-86jNg3ElDNT4kZcn_OoNEIX-rBlH0Gq3st1AZWBuNnvAv-Nrvoetf75vfWjrV0QS00dgaZpKCcL) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

# Another Voice: New York needs a rescue plan

Rob Ortt | January 22, 2023
---
| As we enter a new Legislative Session in Albany, New York is in need of a rescue plan.
Crime is up, economic activity is down, and our state continues to lead the nation in population loss. Individual rights and constitutional freedoms are under attack. These are just a few consequences of a state government controlled entirely by one party.
For years, we've witnessed a drastic decline in public safety, a depleted workforce, rising taxes, business-crippling regulations and a lackluster economic "recovery" from the Covid-19 pandemic. A legislature dominated by New York City progressives has sent our state down the wrong path.
The outmigration crisis is the biggest issue we face, and Albany Democrats have no solutions. Everyday we lose more population, representation and tax dollars to states with better business climates and safer streets. We are losing indispensable parts of the Empire State.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Insulin prices are out of control.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
No one should have to choose between paying for insulin and paying for groceries. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57869304/389366212/1166032298?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230127_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTNjNDEwYi02MDllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HaOowAwgQcgL1TBdowZSjD-AdGXE8TEVHR0v4VDNvFs=&emci=6251e4b7-f09c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=493c410b-609e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) Folks — The cost of insulin in America is out of control, and it’s putting Coloradans, especially those on fixed incomes, at risk. That’s why I led the fight to cap the cost of insulin as part of the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , and this month that cap went into effect for millions of senior citizens. **As of January 1, Medicare recipients won’t pay more than $35/month for their insulin prescription.** My work does not stop here – because I believe _no one_ , regardless of age or income, should have to choose between paying for insulin and paying for groceries. Last year, Senator Raphael Warnock and I introduced _The Affordable Insulin Now Act_ to cap _ALL_ patients’ out pocket costs for insulin at $35 per month. Passing this bill and capping insulin prices for _everyone_ won’t be easy, but I truly believe that if enough of us stand behind it we will get this done. **I need you to sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of my plan to cap insulin prices for all.** [**Please add your name alongside mine to call on Congress to cap insulin prices for everyone. Each signature brings us a tiny bit closer to lowering healthcare costs for millions of Americans with diabetes >>**** **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57869305/389366215/1166032298?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230127_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTNjNDEwYi02MDllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HaOowAwgQcgL1TBdowZSjD-AdGXE8TEVHR0v4VDNvFs=&emci=6251e4b7-f09c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=493c410b-609e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) | **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57869306/389366217/1166032298?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230127_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTNjNDEwYi02MDllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HaOowAwgQcgL1TBdowZSjD-AdGXE8TEVHR0v4VDNvFs=&emci=6251e4b7-f09c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=493c410b-609e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)**

Thank you,
Michael

Earlier this week, my team reached out to ask which issues are most important to you and your family. I was just reading through some of the responses, but I didn’t see your name.

Hey folks– Earlier this week, my team reached out to ask which issues are most important to you and your family. **I was just reading through some of the responses,_but I didn’t see your name._**

I’ve been proud to represent the people of Arizona in Congress since I was elected in 2018, but I’m relying on folks like you to share your thoughts about what you’d like me to focus on. [**So please, can you take a moment to complete our issues survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57871610/389374921/-174716866?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGI4ZmUzOGUtNjU5ZS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3hT84yjdOHWpRljtqJluqzGFbwakZSy-AsaDs0vjgEo=&emci=b34e891d-919d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4b8fe38e-659e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=7718777) | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57871611/389374922/-1779809945?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGI4ZmUzOGUtNjU5ZS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3hT84yjdOHWpRljtqJluqzGFbwakZSy-AsaDs0vjgEo=&emci=b34e891d-919d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4b8fe38e-659e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=7718777)**

subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
