---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6f5fht97l2ql3pollo0352nlkkc8vrpj2b4cuko_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3j69p30s3h2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfkc6l9b1ur563qum8lp8hd56a197vgp9jofk23g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3j69p30s3h2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zudeq36h15jgjd9c20friph2qsspjhqvrlce9c58_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3j69p30s3h2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmapaqeben6maslraujrspm80ajas902bv4348a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3j69p30s3h2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6630tvjfme788gdhulbb2oidnfodac1pk7n6458_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3j69p30s3h2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoer5j4ct5h06blr27crifnvpko7c0nvsq4d5uno_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3j69p30s3h2bs)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: BREAKING: We can shrink the GOP House Majority NEXT MONTH!!
body:
Take a House seat from the GOP?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb46eba19-cdec-4610-823a-a0d30b56263f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_BREAKING:_ We can shrink the GOP House Majority NEXT MONTH!!** _It's been painful watching the clown show in Congress, led by Weaker (as I like to call him) McCarthy. He's brought chaos, stupidity and incompetence to the House, and endangered us by putting Marjorie Taylor Greene on the Homeland Security Committee._ _Yet, his weakness is opportunity._ _House Republicans have one of the smallest majorities ever and we can shrink it further. There's an open seat in Virginia, sadly, vacated when Rep. Donald McEachin passed away in November. **Progressive Democrat Jennifer McClellan is running for it, and the election's less than a month away!**_** ** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in making history and adding another Democrat to the House? Can you please give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can elect Democrat Jennifer McClellan to Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2227ad31-731b-45e1-912a-b8014c3936cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Yes, it's a Democratic seat. Yet, so was George Santos' seat. We MUST NEVER take anything for granted. **
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89ff4b5c-43b2-4cab-b9e7-1db4de34a739/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_McClellan would be the first Black woman elected to the House from this district. __She has a long history of civil rights activism and was elected to the state assembly, then state senate, where now she serves. This Includes her role as Vice-Chair of the Virginia Legislative Black Caucus._** _McClellan's opponent is a MAGA nut who attacked our democracy and endangered election workers by claiming the 2020 election was stolen. He would ban abortion and eliminate all gun laws._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in making history and adding another Democrat to the House? Can you please give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can elect Democrat Jennifer McClellan to Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8420bfa6-e16a-43da-973b-ee37b3d0dcdd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping Democrats thrive, passing progressive policy and increasing Kevin McCarthy's suffering as he manages an even smaller caucus._ Cliff

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T535bf6d8-529e-4347-99cf-0a8ba0a19830/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

body:

_What has President Biden given us over the past two years?_

We've seen the highest inflation in 40 years, illegal immigrants flooding our country, a shameful withdrawal from Afghanistan, the weaponization of the government, and an overall disintegration of our nation.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ovbt7tl6p0tnrs8ldornoe3uoc75feomn0ojjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm4ob1chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztmg28o43fvqr9rordfudnqpr8cpnoju5jhdqf58_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm4ob1chh2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zljgtp63trntvq5aunimdep7m0g72qcgoe1k5pmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm4ob1chh2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcv115hcbn6ocvu1qm08cf9ris73460ds9acaja0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm4ob1chh2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2392i7pvgojvp5nvt2cuek91s0cgtfdsdeh0mfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm4ob1chh2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbe0mlkeajdtj2si51l0kouv18brmb945i88ic00_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm4ob1chh2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpqb7ak8768kqs5bq13bp7gldc2r6v8k52rrjnsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm4ob1chh2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlprtuu232qgugr5iunev002004b7cokm3cgc24g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm4ob1chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zta79bcfvgthgq3hu4s4aa9emg539bo0tdh8i07o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm4ob1chh2bs)
---

Friend, I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. If you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. body:
Will you please give me just a few moments of your time to introduce myself?
#
Hi Peter, my name is Lucas Tyree Kunce and I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
You know... This guy:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27089?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ)
**[CHIP IN TO DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27089?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ)**
Further along in this email, I’m going to ask you to **[become a founding member of my grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27089?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ) But first, will you please give me just a few moments of your time to introduce myself?**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27089?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ)
I grew up in a working-class neighborhood in Jeff City. Like so many Americans, my parents lived paycheck-to-paycheck — so when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, we struggled to get by.
**But we weren’t alone.**
When my parents had to take my sister to get surgeries at a hospital over 100 miles away in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes.
And when we couldn’t afford groceries, they brought more casserole and lasagna by the house than we could ever hope to eat.
**That’s the Missouri I grew up in.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27089?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ)
The support from our neighbors and friends motivated me to work hard, stay focused on school, and run on the cross-country team. After graduating from Jefferson City High School, I was able to get into Yale — which I could afford in part due to a Pell grant and scholarships from people around town.
I got to keep running at Yale, too.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27089?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ)
**After undergrad and then law school at Mizzou, I joined the Marine Corps to honor and serve the community that had done so much for me.**
Less than a year after I completed training, I deployed to Iraq on my first of three tours of duty in the War on Terror, before later being stationed at the Pentagon.
During those 13 years of active duty I learned firsthand what service and sacrifice for your country really means: Doing the right thing when you’re thousands of miles from home, believing in a mission that’s bigger than yourself, and never forgetting the community you signed up to serve.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27089?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ)
In Iraq, I deployed to the Sunni Triangle where I led a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman, running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi. From our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.
Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27089?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ)
When I got back from living next to that burn pit, I had developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic.
They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.
Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.
**So imagine how we all felt when politicians who had never worn the uniform, like Josh Hawley, threw us a giant middle finger and voted against aid for exposed veterans.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27089?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ)
My final tour was on the Joint Staff at the Pentagon. There, I worked with the National Security Council, State Department, Department of Homeland Security, FBI, CIA, and other agencies to stop the proliferation of nuclear, chemical, and missile technology around the globe, to keep these weapons out of the hands of bad actors.
I spent every day doing what I could to make the world a safer place, with fewer arms, less chance of conflict, and more money to spend on improving lives rather than destroying them.
One of the hardest things for me between these tours was coming back home to Jeff City, to the community I had signed up to serve, and seeing what was going on in my old neighborhood.
When I came back from Iraq, the first house I’d ever lived in was bulldozed down. **Now, it’s an empty lot:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27089?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ)
When I came back from Afghanistan, the house I lived in when I joined the Marine Corps was vacant and starting to fall apart. The corner store was boarded up.
The whole time all of us were risking our lives overseas, our leaders were spending trillions of dollars trying to build up towns in these other countries — places like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat — when we should have been spending our money, blood, and sweat on towns like St. Joe, St. Louis, and Jefferson City.
From the Middle East to the Pentagon, my time in the Marine Corps provided me with direct insight into the control that giant corporations have over our tax dollars, our politics, and our everyday lives.
So after active duty, I joined the American Economic Liberties Project — the nation’s leading non-profit in the fight against monopoly power in our economy and our democracy. We took on the corrupt politicians and monopolists who dominate our lives, squeeze small businesses out of our markets, and enrich corporate elites at the expense of everyday Americans — from Big Tech and agribusiness conglomerates, to pharmaceutical cartels and defense contractors.
But now corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley don’t just attack our way of life, but the democracy I swore to defend.
Everyday people should be calling the shots in our country — not giant corporations or the cowards and phonies they bought off in Washington. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate: To take power back for working families in Missouri and across America.
**And make no mistake about it, Missouri is on the frontline of this fight.**
While our state has been getting stripped for parts, politicians like Josh Hawley have been attacking workers with schemes like “Right-to-Work” and fighting to block wage increases for Missouri families — all to enrich multinational corporations and mega-donors who bankroll their campaigns.
As dozens of headquarters have been taken out of state, politicians in power like Josh Hawley were happy to sit back and watch it happen.
Manufacturing, agriculture, production — they’re shipping it all away to foreign oligarchs who don’t care about working people in our state. And while Missouri was getting gutted, these same politicians voted time and time again to spend trillions of dollars and thousands of lives on overseas wars that got their Big Oil friends rich.
They’ve spent decades sparking phony culture wars to distract and divide our families. They’ve become so obsessed with controlling our lives, they made Missouri the first state in the nation to ban abortion — without exceptions for victims of rape or incest.
**Our state deserves a Senator who will stand up and fight for it, not run for the exit like Josh Hawley.**
I’m running for U.S. Senate to be the warrior for working people that Missouri deserves — to fight like hell for our state and our people.
But to defeat Josh Hawley, we need to build a record-breaking, people-powered movement. That’s why I need your help.
**We’re building a truly grassroots campaign, without a cent from corporate PACs, so we can stand up to the status quo and take back power for real working people across the state.[So Peter, will you become a founding member of our people-powered movement by chipping in $10 today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27089?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27090?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=12&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27090?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=13&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27090?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=14&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27090?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=15&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27090?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=16&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27090?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=17&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27089?refcode=em20230127-2776&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=18&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ)
---
We can stop printing money for Wall Street and start funding our schools enough to get Missouri out of last place for starting teacher pay.
We can abolish corporate PACs and demand a government that safeguards our democracy and holds corrupt politicians accountable.
We can build an economy that puts American workers and small businesses first, not giant corporations and foreign oligarchs — an economy that invests in the next generation of energy.
And we can put an end to pointless, trillion-dollar wars and invest in a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a historic investment in our workers and communities to rebuild our forgotten towns and cities, and to finally start making stuff in America again.
It’s time to take our power back.
Thanks for all your support,
— Lucas Kunce
_P.S. It’s pronounced “koonce.”_

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230127-2776-footer&t=19&refcode2=2776_614464_HrkaYJ&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=20&akid=2776%2E614464%2EHrkaYJ). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: Joe Biden
subject: I'd love to call you, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I love talking directly with Democrats like you -- about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what got you in this fight. | |
---

**My election in 2020 was a bitter FIGHT.** At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by **NEARLY 30,000 VOTES!**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8c73152b7a744ef8bc3524bc32846edd&_e=KVE0x9WDAqOy1KxTD04SJGBmmbiH_wtq3tmY7ueqPu183aC8me5_1XZDFI4DtFG99p4kYgBpcVaPKWoFRPdIEf01xExnVHMlAy2C0ZANLL2QNOWwE52B5hmTMEo_MwbDRl1mJX2mTZwkDbz0WSdIpv6zLKuCLD05Zz3UIz23s06Dgpwydf2JQovVH9t3b9u2t-xUGUE10H2b5zJVgbVm1YQSvHpKrvYUPh5w7e6Ih8JkKVVGlhqHOcMo8Cx7qP2jbIJW-wbktxsnsR80maSmy8B2xIKeTZL9gEO1muhuu8SCc8wY88Ox-zG_tPbWxzHuIWtegU_WPBI2Wm2Gl0NC5woogW997gs3QpTnDVj7Bz1SDS6v2XpPK8_98zO4f68oNU1U0VMghhHbs_LIZKHmUqC3RbEU7-C60lw3E5VgahEp00glEzLTaJGdcsxu3gpIU5eRS2aDg8Vs1zB4RSOEWA%3D%3D)

From that moment on, I knew I needed to lead the election integrity effort.__**_And that’s why I founded and lead the Election Integrity Caucus in Congress._**

_But my fight didn’t stop there. _ At the same, I was SPEARHEADING an effort to overturn the unconstitutional concealed carry laws that plagued states like mine. **And I won.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8c73152b7a744ef8bc3524bc32846edd&_e=KVE0x9WDAqOy1KxTD04SJGBmmbiH_wtq3tmY7ueqPu183aC8me5_1XZDFI4DtFG99p4kYgBpcVaPKWoFRPdIEf01xExnVHMlAy2C0ZANLL2QNOWwE52B5hmTMEo_MwbDRl1mJX2mTZwkDbz0WSdIpv6zLKuCLD05Zz3UIz23s06Dgpwydf2JQovVH9t3b9u2t-xUGUE10H2b5zJVgbVm1YQSvHpKrvYUPh5w7e6Ih8JkKVVGlhqHOcMo8Cx7qP2jbIJW-wbktxsnsR80maSmy8B2xIKeTZL9gEO1muhuu8SCc8wY88Ox-zG_tPbWxzHuQfVvbNt5ASXf1LV096VjF3n6ljR-wlVaEGi6sKWpNynEf1Aq1eYn0y6dYoe6ppGzpz5Gr0rgT5L9Num7e_pXS3ZMibYYhhYWwdJrwq5oTH9seujrawc2gBwmnBOuuMxxwrX8YiJhAahFLWTCGbR-qA%3D%3D)

If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter, I’m Claudia Tenney—I’m a small business owner, proud Marine mom, and conservative Congresswoman from New York. I’ve been calling for Biden’s impeachment for some time, and now Big Tech wants this video taken down— | | With the fake news media failing to call out the lies coming from the White House, this type of aggressive messaging is what it takes to fight back and win, and I can't do it without your support. That’s why it’s vitally important we don’t let Joe Biden take this message down. Don't wait until it's too late--chip in now and make sure this video stays up. Want to hear a crazy story? I’m not your run-of-the-mill Republican. I’m a true patriot and a conservative with a proven record of fighting for the American people. My election in 2020 was a bitter FIGHT. At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by NEARLY 30,000 VOTES! Over the next 90 DAYS , we fought against a team of lawyers who pulled out every shady tactic in the book to push my opponent ahead. After every ballot was scrutinized and legal vote counted, I was declared the winner by a slim 109votes! From that moment on, I knew I needed to lead the election integrity effort._And that’s why I founded and lead the Election Integrity Caucus in Congress. But my fight didn’t stop there. At the same, I was SPEARHEADING an effort to overturn the unconstitutional concealed carry laws that plagued states like mine. And I won. There are too many Republicans who talk a good game but never actually fight for YOU. Thank you,Claudia Tenney | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | | |

Friend -- **AOTL President Kelly Burton joined Bloomberg’s “Downballot Counts” podcast last month to talk about how the House will be ‘competitive for the decade’ under new maps.**

The new competition is partly because of the democracy-saving work we’ve done in advocating for fair maps. The work continues as our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, supports voters in states like North Carolina and Alabama in U.S. Supreme Court cases.

**We set an end-of-month goal to raise $20,000 by midnight on Tuesday to continue our mobilization efforts holding map manipulators accountable in and outside the courts.**

**[Make a one-time donation of $20 right now to help us hit our goal before Febuary 1. We could use your help to ensure maps remain competitive for the next decade.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57876576/389390058/742344613?refcode=20230127_AOTL_F_OneDayResend_RedLiteXopeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiMGVlYWNjLTc0OWUtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LqbsZ2y6HCixUY8H4kL8FR58DK8ldHA_D5spBw62xOw=)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: We have a big deadline coming up in a few days. Do you have a minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We need a lot of donations before our deadline on Tuesday to put up the strongest number possible.
#

Friends
In a few days we will be at our first end-of-month deadline of the new year. It’s a big deal, and a big opportunity for this team to show that we are just as strong as ever.
And that’s important, because even though we won our race, our victory has put a target on our backs from the special interests and PACs who poured millions of dollars into this race to try and stop us. They will spend the next few years amassing massive war chests to try and unseat me again.
However, we’ve beat them not just once but twice. So I know this team is up for the challenge. It just means we have to keep our foot on the gas to make sure we are ready for those fights ahead.
Our goals are within reach and I’m confident we can get there if a few more people chip in before Tuesday. So please:
[**Can you make your first $3 contribution today? This is our first fundraising push of the new year and we need a lot of donations before our deadline to put up the strongest number possible.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan23.GMKlXM&refcode=em230127-1-subs&t=1&akid=4921%2E6688874%2E4EFB5R)

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Moving on from Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
Friend,

You’re probably as tired as I am of hearing about Donald Trump. And now that he’s running for president _again_ , we may be stuck having to talk about him for a lot longer than I hoped for. I’m currently holding focus groups with Trump voters to see if they’re just as sick of the former president. But I want to know how you feel about it too. **[Take this 6-question survey to share with us what you think about Trump’s 2024 run, and tell us whether you’re ready for the GOP to move on from Trump.](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVG7g_3fqq7VW3nzsQ45Dvz2bW6B8lDm4WjtlfN99fz9r3q90pV1-WJV7CgR42W6q8fzJ77B2yQVKb8zf3h0480W86qV-_5LbKPgVS4dzm8sJWgxW1-pFN41bb1qXW7VvvMC6xLmMLN7PKR-l-MTdJW8LSqyT82rkPdVSvsQB51tDdDW1Z8P9Z4-RBLQW4ZzC_r6JbgY3W17RVjw1fSsyHVFncMv2yKhM1W1Cg2GP681XyBW2jcqJW6FM8_0W6GNvw21jZV19W4H3RM942hHCKVNDX9875RXWNW61PMhF8tCfrdW3nkJmG69yNjxW8qT_Nq32q5yqW8_szMH6gDGYMW92tvg45DdzhdW3czs8R1d0SskV6tstP8zRDpsW5SnV848FW3k239Wg1) ** It’s time for us to get back to having two responsible governing parties. Trump is more vulnerable now than he’s ever been, and your thoughts will be a huge help in informing our work as we get ready to take on Trump for the third time. Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjss96ma5imc43an2am2lrtpt4uhb1erscfdj9po_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm6o31c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp4sd32v8r7gl6umpor2lb2u8cu9bu6lpccdlejo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm6o31c9h2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3gm5a5n38d56b3h07tirb6qq6sp17f0khuamp3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm6o31c9h2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z45rsoqutlft0lmllvtl1236gmhnoi4k1efrhge0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm6o31c9h2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2nbsnb7liqnb6gchfi8ct1omk747gtim0gfuj60_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm6o31c9h2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfh87k2na32jqaahaln8p7oq81mgclk35qftqs9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm6o31c9h2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2bs7da267pjn18mcfvulo1p3o0mpgilfpfp4a1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm6o31c9h2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbad166o4hkpvceq72lmtc2g7d9g7g3kl1vt73t8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm6o31c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgh0tbmu9543lcci56t9bgq8kb1s0ic27tpfs8c8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm6o31c9h2bs)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7835%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=gofyUEHXke9eQ%2fRJRs5kiQ&sysid=1)
| |
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93222%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fPAqx6YcolHl3h6AfMMvOA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93222%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fPAqx6YcolHl3h6AfMMvOA&sysid=1)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93223%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rhFzdm2vSvDLyoS4Ku10pQ&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93224%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MRpF5gf8jQZY2H5gLlaWeQ&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93222%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fPAqx6YcolHl3h6AfMMvOA&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93235%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sdbqXSgcW5oZvCyR55rFLw&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93236%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f7%2bDktEnrlPp6RovGiUddg&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93237%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HHVT%2b56OPw%2fCQdMJSPCXOA&sysid=1)
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93238%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lBksowiyohJvHzTH%2bVB7EQ&sysid=1)
---

---

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Week 3: Making Virginia a Safer Place for Families
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | **Week 3: Making Virginia a Safer Place for Families**
---
| | Despite the lightning-fast pace of the General Assembly session, House Republicans are working diligently to pass legislation that lowers costs, improves our schools, and makes our communities safer. This week, we have already advanced several key pieces of our public safety agenda that will reduce crime and protect Virginians. The legislation includes effective measures to prevent crimes before they happen, provide the necessary tools to law enforcement so they can do their jobs, and keep dangerous criminal and drug activity off our streets. _Stopping Crimes Before They Happen_ _ _ A critical piece of our public safety agenda includes undoing failed policies that passed the Democrat-controlled General Assembly three years ago. For instance, Democrats passed a law in 2020 that took away law enforcement’s ability to conduct various traffic stops that could subsequently reveal more serious offenses – such as possession of illegal firearms or deadly drugs – and allow law enforcement to take action to prevent more heinous crimes from happening. With an increase in traffic-related deaths and fatal drug overdoses over the last two years, local leaders across**** the 85th district and around Virginia have asked for legislation to reverse this policy. Fortunately, House Republicans are advancing legislation ([HB 1380](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/f126a2fe2f1b76b0/90ee12000b7bde53c3d6b838967d376c/37923)) sponsored by our late friend Delegate Ronnie Campbell that restores law enforcement’s ability to do its job and provides the necessary tools to prevent serious crimes from occurring. _Providing Tax Relief_** _ _** Meanwhile, we are delivering on our goal to bring tax relief to Virginians. Earlier this week, we passed a tax relief package ([HB 2319](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/f126a2fe2f1b76b0/d75c69e7244ec1b3c3d6b838967d376c/37923) and [HB 2138](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/f126a2fe2f1b76b0/774a457820bfcaa1c3d6b838967d376c/37923), McNamara) that will keep more of your hard-earned money in your pockets and better position Virginia to compete for jobs and spur economic growth. These changes will generate economic development, bring in more talent, spur innovation, and encourage more people to establish their roots in Virginia for years to come.
---
| | **My Session Updates**
---
| |
---
| | My first bill presentation for 2023, Election Accuracy HB 1377, passed subcommittee 19-2!
---
| |
---
| | I had the pleasure of meeting with Teresa Pregnall and her team from Concerned Women for America of Virginia.
---
| |
---
| | I spoke to a group from 4H along with Sheriff Stolle and Senator DeSteph. I am so excited about all this next generation of young people are doing!
---
| |
---
| | As a member of the Filipino-American Community Action Group (Fil-Am CAG) in Virginia Beach, I am honored to introduce HB2440. This bill creates the Asian American and Pacific Islander Heritage Commission. The commission will work with the Board of Education to create education standards regarding Asian or Asian American and Pacific Islander contributions, culture, history, heritage, and language.
---
| |
---
| | I had the pleasure of meeting with a number of individuals from Regent University and commending the incredible institution. Thank you for coming out Chris Lambert, Lou Isakoff, Joseph Umidi, Steve Bruce, Bill Hathaway, Martha Smith, and Claire Foster!!
---
| | As the legislative process moves quickly in Richmond, you can easily track the status of my [legislation here](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/f126a2fe2f1b76b0/bcb3162dc0f03942c3d6b838967d376c/37923). If you are interested in following any other legislation in the General Assembly, visit [www.lis.virginia.gov](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/f126a2fe2f1b76b0/4f85dd1d4f57ad7ac3d6b838967d376c/37923). If I can be of assistance to you or you would like to share your position on any of my legislation, please do not hesitate to reach out to me at delkgreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov or (804) 698-1085. You can also follow me on Twitter @KGreenhalgh85 or like my [Facebook page](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/f126a2fe2f1b76b0/3e47b8cfff8a9a81c3d6b838967d376c/37923) to stay up to date on what I’m working on in Richmond. Have a great weekend,
---
| |
---
| Your Delegate, Karen **Delegate Karen S. Greenhalgh** **House of Delegates** 1-804-698-1085 [karengreenhalgh.com](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/f126a2fe2f1b76b0/f6714aebc0bd3674c3d6b838967d376c/37923 "http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/9206fe5164b4fa85041ad8cde91a9694/37923/c1e1fdff1fcd89fe/178744a2ec7ca92cc3d6b838967d376c/37923")
---

clean_body: | | | | | Week 3: Making Virginia a Safer Place for Families | | Despite the lightning-fast pace of the General Assembly session, House Republicans are working diligently to pass legislation that lowers costs, improves our schools, and makes our communities safer. This week, we have already advanced several key pieces of our public safety agenda that will reduce crime and protect Virginians. The legislation includes effective measures to prevent crimes before they happen, provide the necessary tools to law enforcement so they can do their jobs, and keep dangerous criminal and drug activity off our streets. Stopping Crimes Before They Happen A critical piece of our public safety agenda includes undoing failed policies that passed the Democrat-controlled General Assembly three years ago. For instance, Democrats passed a law in 2020 that took away law enforcement’s ability to conduct various traffic stops that could subsequently reveal more serious offenses – such as possession of illegal firearms or deadly drugs – and allow law enforcement to take action to prevent more heinous crimes from happening. With an increase in traffic-related deaths and fatal drug overdoses over the last two years, local leaders across** the 85th district and around Virginia have asked for legislation to reverse this policy. Fortunately, House Republicans are advancing legislation () sponsored by our late friend Delegate Ronnie Campbell that restores law enforcement’s ability to do its job and provides the necessary tools to prevent serious crimes from occurring. Providing Tax Relief Meanwhile, we are delivering on our goal to bring tax relief to Virginians. Earlier this week, we passed a tax relief package ( and , McNamara) that will keep more of your hard-earned money in your pockets and better position Virginia to compete for jobs and spur economic growth. These changes will generate economic development, bring in more talent, spur innovation, and encourage more people to establish their roots in Virginia for years to come. | | My Session Updates | | | | My first bill presentation for 2023, Election Accuracy HB 1377, passed subcommittee 19-2! | | | | I had the pleasure of meeting with Teresa Pregnall and her team from Concerned Women for America of Virginia. | | | | I spoke to a group from 4H along with Sheriff Stolle and Senator DeSteph. I am so excited about all this next generation of young people are doing! | | | | As a member of the Filipino-American Community Action Group (Fil-Am CAG) in Virginia Beach, I am honored to introduce HB2440. This bill creates the Asian American and Pacific Islander Heritage Commission. The commission will work with the Board of Education to create education standards regarding Asian or Asian American and Pacific Islander contributions, culture, history, heritage, and language. | | | | I had the pleasure of meeting with a number of individuals from Regent University and commending the incredible institution. Thank you for coming out Chris Lambert, Lou Isakoff, Joseph Umidi, Steve Bruce, Bill Hathaway, Martha Smith, and Claire Foster!! | | As the legislative process moves quickly in Richmond, you can easily track the status of my . If you are interested in following any other legislation in the General Assembly, visit . If I can be of assistance to you or you would like to share your position on any of my legislation, please do not hesitate to reach out to me at delkgreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov or (804) 698-1085. You can also follow me on Twitter @KGreenhalgh85 or like my to stay up to date on what I’m working on in Richmond. Have a great weekend, | | | Your Delegate, Karen Delegate Karen S. Greenhalgh House of Delegates** 1-804-698-1085 "" | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate

clean_body: | | | Peter, I was just looking over our fundraising numbers, and I saw something I had to share with you. Right now, we’re just four days out from our FIRST end-of-month deadline of 2023, and we still have to raise $5000 to meet our goal. It seems like too high a mountain scale, Peter - but I know we can do it. From U.S. Army Special Forces training to taking on terrorists abroad, I’m used to accomplishing the impossible. Now, it’s time to do it again. I’ve never been afraid of a fight, Peter, from the battlefields of Afghanistan to the halls of Congress. But just like any tough mission, there’s no way we can succeed without every team member pulling their weight. I’m doing everything I can to help us meet this goal, Peter, but without you, there’s no way we can do it. | | In Service, Col. Mike WaltzSpecial Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (R-FL) | | Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress | | Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze1tcf5m3djbrkfo9vs9ukn12mukd1pse36f1qtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm6o31chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z601d108q82j8b92aeng0qauh16n0n8ibb6jruc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm6o31chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7hqndss83jq874o1hjmsqal7l4r1r5d5cq46n68_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gm6o31chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaqgnd50sjcd47l3jmcc4svut3mdb9g0kvodc0h8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5ge2or0c5i649fg)

| | LB626 Adopt the Nebraska Heartbeat Act HEARING NOTICE: WEDNESDAY, FEB 1NEBRASKA STATE CAPITOL*ROOM 1525TIME: 1:30 PM THIS IS ONE OF THE PRIORITY BILLS WE ARE ASKING FOR YOUR VOICE AND YOUR PRESENCE IN THE HOUSE. As Republicans, we believe in the sanctity of life. A heartbeat is a "universal sign of life". LB 626 protects the life of a child from the moment a "heartbeat" is detected. The Heartbeat Bill includes the exceptions of rape, incest, and preserving the life of the mother. We are asking for the people of Nebraska to FILL THE CAPITOL for this very important hearing. "BE THE VOICE OF THOSE WHO CANNOT SPEAK FOR THEMSELVES." 4) Call your Senator and let them know you support [LB-626](https://www.ne.gop/so/0dONpF4ZO/c?w=10L5d9wCDxBID3ZF8f_ktTWzJXEhoQJJjxqgGn52DaM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9GbG9vckRvY3MvMTA4L1BERi9JbnRyby9MQjYyNi5wZGYiLCJyIjoiMWYxOTUyZjEtMmI2NS00YmQwLTVmNzAtNzZjNDM4YzBjMmMxIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) *PLEASE NOTE THE ROOM NUMBER IS THE EXPECTED ROOM CHANGE FROM THE ORIGINAL ROOM POSTED ON THE WEBSITE *below taken from https://nebraskalegislature.gov/committees/landing_pages/index.php?cid=8 *Hearing ProceduresThe Legislature will no longer be accepting written, submitted testimony prior to the committee hearing. To appear on the transcript, a testifier must physically appear before a committee and be available to answer questions from the committee members.In-Person Testimony:As always, persons attending a public hearing in-person will have an opportunity to present verbal testimony to the committee and be subject to questioning by the committee members.Position Comments for the Public Hearing Record:If you are not testifying in-person at a public hearing on a bill or resolution and would like to submit written comments to be included in the official hearing record as an exhibit, you will find a link to submit your comments online on the chamber viewer page for each bill or resolution. Comments are allowed once a bill has been scheduled for a public hearing and must be submitted prior to 12:00 p.m. CST on the last work day prior to the public hearing to be included in the official hearing record.The comments submitted online prior to the deadline and identified as comments for the public hearing record will be the only method for submission of official hearing record comments other than testifying in-person. Letters and comments submitted via email or hand-delivered will no longer be included as part of the hearing record, although they are a viable option for communicating your views with an individual senator.
Submission of Online Comments:In order to facilitate public input on legislation, a feature was added to the Nebraska Legislature’s website for submission of written comments on pending legislation on the Legislature’s website at any stage of the process.For more information, please see the Legislature’s Public Input Options page at [https://nebraskalegislature.gov/committees/public-input.php](https://www.ne.gop/so/0dONpF4ZO/c?w=7dKTubgu-TPCbe_SCAHwETR0yGa_0S_jhIqXEiGEx-Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9jb21taXR0ZWVzL3B1YmxpYy1pbnB1dC5waHAiLCJyIjoiMWYxOTUyZjEtMmI2NS00YmQwLTVmNzAtNzZjNDM4YzBjMmMxIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0).

name: American Briefing
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqul1ana30mndt5rpcf8qu3ak31bul5lv9uf5ngo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gmap32chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaot2dobatso60nibnf57l2ggd6ipjq3fo14j128_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gmap32chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb277hktititncva7hrn6t9kjqt2giduc20mjsdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c3gmap32chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2zp9ulu2gvoqmd1i4ojgdec5pd26kgtcclmliqmro).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8u0j3j78norjlivhjsdj5eg7d8an5f5g7jco630_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5ge2pb4c9i649fg)

name: Giffords PAC
subject: Raising our collective voice
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Tuesday is our first monthly fundraising deadline of the year
#

Friends -
The tragic events of this past week have saddened and outraged all of us at Giffords. We understand you may feel discouraged, but we want to reach out to you today and ask you to not give up hope.
As Gabby always says, we must keep moving forward. Ending the gun violence epidemic in our country will not be easy, but the fights worth having rarely are.
We didn't get here overnight. Decades of weak gun laws and gun lobby lies have fueled this crisis. We can't reverse the damage overnight, either. It's going to take a variety of solutions—and our unending determination—to build a safer future.
We know that solutions like background checks save lives. We know that extreme risk—aka red flag—laws save lives. We know that if we keep up the fight to keep guns out of the wrong hands, a better future is possible.
Today we’re hoping we can ask you to join us in turning whatever emotions you may be feeling—whether that’s frustration, anger, or sorrow—into action.
Tuesday is our first monthly fundraising deadline of the year. At times like these, we need to know if you’re on board with us to keep up the fight to end the gun violence epidemic in our country.
Because we can’t work towards a better future without raising our collective voice to show that there is a movement that cares about keeping our communities safe.
When you support Giffords, you fuel organizing, lobbying, advertising, research, elections, and education. Every penny goes towards our work to fight for a future free from gun violence.
[**So what do you say? Will you contribute $3 to Giffords PAC today before our January fundraising drive comes to a close?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230127-1-15-b&t=1&akid=4170%2E3935704%2EWkOupL)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan23.4kE3Tp&amount=3&refcode=em230127-1-15-b&t=2&akid=4170%2E3935704%2EWkOupL)**
Thank you for your constant support of Giffords and our mission. We couldn’t do our work without you.
\- The team at Giffords PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4170%2E3935704%2EWkOupL) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Team Miyares
subject: ICYMI: Attorney General Jason Miyares Releases Report on Virginia Parole Board
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
It was worse than we thought...| | |
---
**In Case You Missed It: **
**Attorney General Jason Miyares Releases Report on Virginia Parole Board:_‘Worse than we thought’ _**
---
---
**VIRGINIA MERCURY:_[AG says former Va. Parole Board chair broke the law in 2020 release ‘frenzy’](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=e2e9bf1ce89b45559068a85978aae431&_e=rajO8VMAEdle2-b1NuGimA2CHcdw1mmmOZ7AgL4DjN4_liPqUp0BSAKpB5lJ3BS6Fyexbkt8mq4vAWjN5D5RMV2xhRx-peYYAiSz9A9m777O8whpijVW7eUQqqK4u8Li3w0ydUg8ce0pDPxMbY9CsdCGQoYon8BpYnJ-h5M2q9rXT6oXm2hlrQzWbwpCT-DZjG0-2U1qQBhIu-Mxiz4l_vMI4KkktNvAKhZVXf_i9J8PKDdOL4j62OsyPx6joxixnotGANkVcKmyCl9ktLfTGBfaam5f3LUaQEGi3XHcJjTiDF2mnYm8tc8qBP-z4yxsX5FmkiHrHRg2QaVNA1o4To7VyWjoqfXzA7mN4yk686MGCZL7a8-ytUWwIFpyLHmBtruJBRQ7TGua5DQ-YhEABmNIUBDuQWYYiBMNc9ABmy3TJ_fe6cJ0tWij0vWT_ns1)_** At a news conference in Richmond Wednesday announcing the release of an investigative report, Miyares said he and his team had found numerous instances of former Parole Board Chair Adrianne Bennett, who is now serving as a judge in Virginia Beach, falsifying official records. But because state law treats that as a misdemeanor offense, Miyares said, the one-year statute of limitations had already expired by the time his office’s investigation began. **RICHMOND TIMES-DISPATCH:_[Miyares says it is too late to prosecute former parole board chief](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=e2e9bf1ce89b45559068a85978aae431&_e=rajO8VMAEdle2-b1NuGimGqoL2TB5u5u3iLzyIyAbSuNCdXHdV_yNZWV2Vqv0JVFxm1hjhQxnAiwKqDE_1h-jEdTLl7C1hNIAlbnUxaW89aV6GaUCtCKbVcMswi_tJ2seR0fAkhhkeGTkLaAXCuZHobGKDco2iTekkU2nDmHaWG-u9JJ5qGNgLPvxQUsbXNloxGZb06NqoxCNcTEnhYCEnncNpbg8R-wSUQYPb_1cvBJajjjjV2gYhTK4ilfwPBSiHwGI2qpUSYBAF9j_dX91AHl-cbzvxfnYCaVvzs0fed3FEaW_ND7LofGF0kT4NSF58gPtfzSIdXEs4jdYP-eOms86U5U6VJb4F6hdqT20b8u4jjB4zZedmOpyQgdmwrPgR1ez-CgsGbqMjRtFYQNfW4uc6i3We7Wb0g9ZiL_Rqp-zRwxkDWms9LN4pQw-ge32ssRApLEh4SaEYvngjXJGblCs-JM2Wcz6swtPJq7OiSFfaRGd91qYOBr8mVaEXY_4iZ7Vy0JG62fdNJi_6lnnQ%3D%3D)_** Attorney General Jason Miyares said Wednesday that former Virginia Parole Board Chair Adrianne Bennett could have been charged with falsifying parole discharge records, but the alleged violations cannot be prosecuted because the statute of limitations has passed. He also asserted that Bennett “unlawfully suspended” Virginia’s “three strikes” parole ineligibility statute, but Brian Moran, then Virginia’s secretary of public safety, rejected her bid for “a new, lenient interpretation” of the statute. **WSET:_[‘Reckless disregard for the law:’ Miyares releases report on VA Parole Board practices](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=e2e9bf1ce89b45559068a85978aae431&_e=rajO8VMAEdle2-b1NuGimIS0yyaBq66wcKbpvby3y9efTGvTkzoFnSHa01ZKjk_J_WjJZpJRDqPkneSjE0ApvGfxgx2KKwyyWXCLnoGDSFbFHCKoRhGWT574VanWG1EMFDSUmu-pMT54uPx4tKjXtYknQimGaOJjmx77B4esy1eoBFJRoImXICAH2_j3w_fiunkr_CTBmbJJmLfiYqjvCZLJXbx53PtIQntI46c29wTwrQmYfibhnoEPbfPhBpoanyrXyAd_WPpXtmLogCNcTa7vnyYPn2aeoXS2jB_z6_u1arFOQYynHbYph90yCJ8dbtWfjOyKa9jIJWvQjseZwKJTEsTP-SRWsqbvvsaVK9NNt3QUWPMGt11Jpt4-2GGmY7pkAyASFae9Xap_-ENO5rpko84WibOsYyNAbmOefGpw_nbsTRp23Wkwq83NrQqd7HkBNjJx2yZwoAhmnwXFYRCcCdB4C1MYWPGllOjR6ag%3D)_** In 2020, the Virginia Parole Board’s actions came under elevated public scrutiny after it released 95 offenders in March 2020 – the highest number of releases ever granted in a single month. According to the report, the 95 offenders released in March 2020 included: 4 capital murderers, 31 first-degree murderers, 11 rapists, and 33 offenders convicted of robbery. Of the 134 offenders released between March 2020 and April 2020, Miyares said 130 of them were convicted of violent crimes. Only four were non-violent. **THE ASSOCIATED PRESS:_[AG: Ex-parole board chair violated law; too late for charges](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=e2e9bf1ce89b45559068a85978aae431&_e=rajO8VMAEdle2-b1NuGimFmKNmwXzDuXY1evMEZicLj4hkYaTQX8A4WSCvET-niPNallXLEzLSfk0uohx9s2kzlYrSMANw5Jp4spbu959DaL_0VHT0EoVHq0Ue86rbI0RwbmD-N3g9aakDiyeXwEaDjA9fA954F4g8VVyFi_2vfymvkiW0kb0UTK5tnLJrvAN-pV7cH88MAmgFAFc9L3UZtj0CeDT8h2JcJUrg1Kvs_f0Hoao7sP5xBnH4V8SA45yVNLuTaseqffLrnoHF-PhipJ_UgObRKzgJrs-Y0j0y8oSd9TToRBAzeIGDPuSeDLsayDrIvXIh4--PAwnscQliZKc7BjCjqWrsfS13_b8EURKJNjIIlsIJ4A-TM3xayVboXor1ZFJQxvO2FJ31z_0vXe7fAdoahot4KmuXGyX3I%3D)_** Republican Attorney General Jason Miyares laid out his allegations against Adrianne Bennett as he outlined the findings of a yearlong investigation by his office into the practices of the board. The probe focused especially on the board’s activities in March and April of 2020, when it granted release to a higher-than-normal number of inmates in what Miyares called a “parole-granting frenzy” carried out with “disregard” for victims. **THE PROGRESS-INDEX:_[Miyares: Former Virginia Parole Board head promoted ‘criminal-first, victim-last’ agenda](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=e2e9bf1ce89b45559068a85978aae431&_e=rajO8VMAEdle2-b1NuGimFMc8o10KVZQce4uahsklEwcWbqRvQFJIqYWnDiXOywoEkDTff5xVeLZda2mgz-gXD1gO9W5VOFsRH7IqrO5SBIUxayTOCe-3UmACm_PFZjYrIFS9BLeKb4xDMqMYiahmq21M1rpXSkFZJRXQDnajUsBzL2A4M5mPF0XKCFtUs0VWEns2ErrGy4TAqebiII3qc5AaMrnNjOOhB2hzNtKVrCb_wdTQDSx0_vCnc0VPOVc1hr_3RQnYYG_HF-KdNZh8jMlGMz4AkkBnCW0M0v-_vRr8aax21h7Xj4h6YpDDSfh_kN3DJgNm4ZwVc6N-Rbxyh3SzL9eWCNXLVxKBsR99nMPl1zFd07teFBYlmnRKrTaACSPsIxrsXSYpvIccuOWH77zAZA6_6wQJSLFyXqcdFzLG0KvaJNE13Kuu2xyWKe_vELNcFrOnd0gZFKCqRLsrA%3D%3D)_** The attorney general claimed Bennett ignored the board's "three strikes" parole-ineligibility statute and approved the releases despite being told not to by then-Gov. Ralph Northam's administration and the General Assembly's rejection of her request to repeal the statute. He said she also failed on numerous occasions to notify victims and their families of the inmates' releases. **THE WASHINGTON POST:_[Virginia attorney general accuses former parole chief of misconduct](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=e2e9bf1ce89b45559068a85978aae431&_e=rajO8VMAEdle2-b1NuGimAPPRdMOo_IC5m7LNcNsjVjevfu0zG_Wg2nLEq0VvZYAxY3hka1PGzmpEOEJoudu5YcIatJHGwKLGSAmD7bOWjMmX8lXCiKnBpBcgn20xbTq_vasCuvBxrXFyC1_tqGY7oStGMvcdczW5TZB7YowOgk5lEWCH4CPBNxcu18C_wzz9-VKi9fwV4ZtfbdQDpEW8UGp8MgSaU7-uRT1GxErfgKwTgoK1kOYMK6hsf9Loe-UWh3sQCGsrpSC7yDt-DSyjOhwHTgo_nCeYjiazcsijvdbSwcUxuXtT_7-yrk7bFv8E_LrK5PupsvzSHmJGozHqvr8oYJ7aKAdEoeZdKgOAaBT5-syPhJcGTDzXXO8bPTTeh120W8MHzhnOTCuJVDo9A%3D%3D)_** The latest report from Miyares offers more details, charging that 130 of the released inmates had been convicted of violent crimes.
