Team, Now that I am officially in Congress representing Oregon’s 6th, it’s time to start looking forward to the challenges ahead. In 2022 we overcame previously insurmountable odds. Thanks to your support, I made history as one of the first Latinas to represent Oregon in Congress. **2022 was our year, team. Now it’s time to take on 2023 with that same energy.** A few days ago my team told you about our [**2023 Founding Donor Fund**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57894711/389416205/-2053298293?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.27_b1_AS_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ4ZmI5Ny04YTllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PQpfLCcGs96B978glYCjq5qi2bESsCWU3RQYCQxTa0=), which will help support me and the rest of our team during my first year in Congress. I’m ready to take on the toughest challenges facing Oregonians, like defending the right to choose, tackling homelessness, and creating jobs that pay a living wage. **But none of that will be possible without you.** **We’re only keeping our 2023 Founding Donor fund open for a limited time, and I hope that you can join during this pivotal moment for our team.[I need you with me in this fight, which is why I’m asking you to join us as a 2023 Founding Donor by making any contribution to our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57894712/389416206/-2053298293?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.27_b1_AS_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ4ZmI5Ny04YTllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PQpfLCcGs96B978glYCjq5qi2bESsCWU3RQYCQxTa0=)** | _[Become a Founding Donor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57894713/389416207/-2053298293?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.27_b1_AS_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ4ZmI5Ny04YTllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PQpfLCcGs96B978glYCjq5qi2bESsCWU3RQYCQxTa0=)_

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: Welcome to El Paso
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
It is a humanitarian disaster.
Fellow American - After two years as our Commander-in-Chief, Joe Biden made his FIRST visit to our southern border.

**It's about time, Mr. President.**

Kids are being raped by cartel members. Tons of drugs are flooding across the border that will kill Americans. Millions of illegal aliens are flooding across the border (including suspected terrorists).

_Yet Joe Biden doesn't care._

Fellow American, since Joe has been absent from our border towns, I think we need to show him a Texas welcome to see first-hand the mess he's ignored.

Let's welcome Joe Biden to the border:

| [** Welcome to El Paso >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4556f66841af4813b92accb69fcb4277&_e=2m89EIz1uP6w8BqJJI8RQAoxAGckjjK3Na-w45CB1PMv9E3HB5TGofo_GyFBeS3TQ0OFZ7KsWjtF5OyNGTeuZD68YdmbyRTnr2Oj_6zt4mwToi71-Wsy085YF9OAcm9oazFAIIASs_dx5azn8KQiRid-CVFslWnSpnaKHAvuz5xnXzKBhobyIlA3R3R8d8dmaN5nbqRq7hp-ispkmgwWwIFZbjzPjajliAr3c6tDNS6SH09255Cfk-7DJ6VQf6RRmT9xJ-VZ8cdi8wwAJu-BkJiNGf19LBnaRyzLZ7HvBsU-teHy28sPxBAOwxC5MTKQDGof5NJl3MPKBj_AS6B2rUve6LndAgrf3JHzhhEFnyY5B_00qt9cXdWo4ObrgZXZcwviaN5jWluKFQOq9g8U07quulyNG4DbwMw9_OsxeqBCX2k4DGUhON5h2Gl3RheA)

clean_body: It is a humanitarian disaster. Fellow American - After two years as our Commander-in-Chief, Joe Biden made his FIRST visit to our southern border. It's about time, Mr. President. Kids are being raped by cartel members. Tons of drugs are flooding across the border that will kill Americans. Millions of illegal aliens are flooding across the border (including suspected terrorists). Yet Joe Biden doesn't care. Fellow American, since Joe has been absent from our border towns, I think we need to show him a Texas welcome to see first-hand the mess he's ignored. Let's welcome Joe Biden to the border: | Now that Joe Biden finally made an appearance at the border, he is blaming Republicans for the #BidenBorderCrisis - but I know you won't be fooled. To make sure Biden's first border trip is one to remember, For Freedom, Ted Cruz P.S. . I am counting on you, Fellow American. name: VoteVets
subject: Why do we send all these fundraising emails? And why, on this random Friday at the end of January, is it so important for you to make a donation to VoteVets today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Totally fair questions.
#

Derek -
Why do we send all these fundraising emails? And why, on this random Friday at the end of January, is it so important for you to make a donation to VoteVets today?
Totally fair questions. Here’s our shot at answering:
First, there’s the debt ceiling fight. Republicans are going to want to cut, cut, cut all kinds of spending — including spending that funds Veterans programs.
We can’t let that happen. We need to make sure our elected officials are hearing from Veterans and Military Families. We need to make sure those programs are saved.
That is the work VoteVets does. But the flights to DC for Veterans, the ads, the calls into offices — those aren’t free.
Then there are elections. This is the most important election cycle in modern American history. EVERYTHING is on the line. Trump, the White House, and control of the House and Senate are so close...
We are going to take a portion of every donation and squirrel it away for that work as well. And we have to start now because these campaigns are starting now.
And the truth is, almost all of our donations come from emails like this. We spent $24 million last cycle, and we don’t raise that all in a day. So that’s why all the emails. And that is why today, we are asking:
[**Can you please make a contribution of $3 or any amount you can afford to VoteVets today? We will put it to work saving Veterans programs from Republican cuts and toward our electoral work this cycle.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.jVZiAM&refcode=em230127-1-15&t=1&akid=7309%2E3013755%2EnzLQ18)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.bl6-DZ&refcode=em230127-1-15&t=20&akid=7309%2E3013755%2EnzLQ18)**
---
****
| **[Rush $25 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2935?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.Xk4KIQ&refcode=em230127-1-15&t=21&akid=7309%2E3013755%2EnzLQ18)**
---
****
| | **[Rush $50 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2928?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.SFvRve&refcode=em230127-1-15&t=22&akid=7309%2E3013755%2EnzLQ18)**
---
****
| **[Rush $100 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2929?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.Qt7iV0&refcode=em230127-1-15&t=23&akid=7309%2E3013755%2EnzLQ18)**
---
****
| | **[Rush $250 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2930?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.lZSit-&refcode=em230127-1-15&t=24&akid=7309%2E3013755%2EnzLQ18)**
---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.Pk7gBV&refcode=em230127-1-15&t=25&akid=7309%2E3013755%2EnzLQ18)**
---
****
Thanks for reading, and for being such a big part of the work we do. Honestly, we couldn’t do it without the support of you and people like you.
VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE

| Peter,

Did you catch Abigail's important update regarding her commonsense reform to strengthen public trust in our government?

Abigail has spearheaded the charge to ban individual stock trading by members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children. Her bill has bipartisan and broad public support, [_**and we 're counting on yours to keep her in Congress. Will you contribute to our campaign?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/I0Q_BoOG8N5K30jjJQWs7v7pSwE_Fk3B-tw3kasbA8I=/aF2NHkOa8667l1BsQnpvS5cLEdtfs1KkFtBwun-e9-I=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230127-1-EM&amount=25)

_**Read more from her about the bill 's impact here:**_
* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/I0Q_BoOG8N5K30jjJQWs7v7pSwE_Fk3B-tw3kasbA8I=/aF2NHkOa8667l1BsQnpvS5cLEdtfs1KkFtBwun-e9-I=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230127-1-EM&amount=25)
Peter,

Now that this new Congress has begun, I have once again introduced my bipartisan legislation to ban members of Congress [and our spouses and dependent children] from buying or selling individual stocks.

In our day-to-day work, we receive briefings and have discussions with industry leaders that should inform the governing choices we make, not the stocks we buy or sell.

Our constituents should know that with every vote and decision, we are looking out for our constituents, not their financial portfolios. To continue this important mission in Congress, I need your support. [_**Will you contribute to our campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/I0Q_BoOG8N5K30jjJQWs7v7pSwE_Fk3B-tw3kasbA8I=/aF2NHkOa8667l1BsQnpvS5cLEdtfs1KkFtBwun-e9-I=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230127-1-EM&amount=25)

The consensus on both sides of the aisle is clear: Americans don't want their members of Congress trading stocks while doing the business of the people. My bill is a commonsense ethics reform.

Work like this is vital, and I'm proud to spearhead it in Congress. To make sure I can maintain the promising momentum behind passing my bill, I need your support. clean_body: | Peter, Did you catch Abigail's important update regarding her commonsense reform to strengthen public trust in our government? Abigail has spearheaded the charge to ban individual stock trading by members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children. Her bill has bipartisan and broad public support, | Read more from her about the bill 's impact here: Peter, Now that this new Congress has begun, I have once again introduced my bipartisan legislation to ban members of Congress [and our spouses and dependent children] from buying or selling individual stocks. In our day-to-day work, we receive briefings and have discussions with industry leaders that should inform the governing choices we make, not the stocks we buy or sell. Our constituents should know that with every vote and decision, we are looking out for our constituents, not their financial portfolios. To continue this important mission in Congress, I need your support. | The consensus on both sides of the aisle is clear: Americans don't want their members of Congress trading stocks while doing the business of the people. My bill is a commonsense ethics reform. Work like this is vital, and I'm proud to spearhead it in Congress. To make sure I can maintain the promising momentum behind passing my bill, I need your support. | | | | | | | Thank you for your confidence, Abigail | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg VA 22402 United States | = | = | = ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. name: VADEMS
subject: Local Elections build the present and future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
electing tomorrow’s leaders

|
---
Derek, Local elected officials are the backbone of our government. Not only are they the folks who decide to put up stop signs and build new roads, but they also have the potential to run for higher office. **Before he was the Junior Senator from Virginia, before he was governor or Lt. governor, Tim Kaine was a city council member and mayor of Richmond. Many members of Congress and the General Assembly served on county boards and town councils.** Building the Democratic bench, with candidates of color, young folks, and folks who truly care about their community and the Commonwealth is critical to the success of our party and the future of Virginia. body:
With honesty and courage, we will defend our democracy. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57895224/389417518/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGMyMGM2MC04ZDllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VA9H5BBakmxW8xcdfoHqB9ekalvOQQkfUqLV0wyu4R8=&emci=ae4b807a-749e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=94c20c60-8d9e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, I’m thrilled to announce that I’ve been appointed to the U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Accountability! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57895225/389417519/443125869?refcode=E20127-20230127-OversightCommittee-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGMyMGM2MC04ZDllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VA9H5BBakmxW8xcdfoHqB9ekalvOQQkfUqLV0wyu4R8=) Oversight and Accountability is the main investigative committee in the House, and has extremely broad jurisdiction, which means we will be searching for truth and transparency on a wide range of issues – from looking into the actions of individual politicians, to assessing the legality of corporate practices, the impact of conspiracy theories on our democracy, the effectiveness of certain laws and policies, and more. In the United States, the power vested in our government comes from _the people_ – and without transparency to earn and keep the people’s trust, our democracy loses its legitimacy. **I ran for office because I will not let democracy fail in my lifetime – and I will be working overtime to make sure that we deliver answers, results, and the truth to the American people on the issues that matter most. Our democracy demands it, and you deserve nothing less.** **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57895226/389417520/1869993778?refcode=E20127-20230127-OversightCommittee-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGMyMGM2MC04ZDllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VA9H5BBakmxW8xcdfoHqB9ekalvOQQkfUqLV0wyu4R8=)** Yours, Becca Balint

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e9987ad156864afe85e06eaa28e3993b&_e=znxAn7bZ95SOXuCeEK4OKd2SkQQBc-1rnenTY6KAIs4c5c9lYK-qRt-sx6Vcd3LC169eFqs0dJKrgLgVTjyfxMnqj29MyU0hs6oLTT85zc6obAiLdMf0p6mjF6Yb-GJdbXS5VSaNQytwAMNbPxYqvhF9jitfA-L9_oPB22SNp6rDdzpVqyGmdGsV439nbaZondk-4wyfhS-NYMlwaZ_umNd2qDZdrqdyk8aglGkIlBjD7tf7ljI4sPfesXfVs-sdjyzL1nqkwq6IAkcRGKWLBAOfWmxCn0T29oBjkeEBteNAFeSx9_02Y17Nju8niFU3PepWg_Jiz9_gSXVMEeF6BQ%3D%3D)

| | **The Issue With Ukraine 🚫**
---
| |
---
The United States has poured a whopping [$113.4 billion](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e9987ad156864afe85e06eaa28e3993b&_e=znxAn7bZ95SOXuCeEK4OKYlMkw-DhDNnlQ6t0uNntsbHMH6W58KQqEWoB1UJ6hAqmz5u44FtQXMkZq1Re6MKQlHnJWXebGsWYrFoza-Ol663tmgNacuU1e3Xq16U82rtIeHW4EqyaTLi22Z-MkEJIaZYLQbr0ZixdNMYaeMJjFJGyJa7Tf9K1DDCy4K-iZh72HXX-PKk-BUBCXRbszp92f3f_85it0oYJ2h2a6EvX4ca7ZccQ03hSG1QtVLLhEn2-0lSZAJEokFjpF-t1jT0Uxce4EXsC8t5LebKnUsJ5pM%3D) into Ukraine (yes, that's billion with a b). And who is Biden placing on the hook for footing this bill? The U.S. [taxpayers.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e9987ad156864afe85e06eaa28e3993b&_e=znxAn7bZ95SOXuCeEK4OKW8E3bKryrdkggyn7bTULgyyMYwMyO8kiAwbqTfIlgZzRHqfGbv3anDD1C7DROZqIUYh5bXfoLBedAYa6lFOs5Bt-uXJECWDARR8khUD3KYhc0tRvk6sEyyVWWOGy8iS8x6uCFbn5kndkhU5pQKx82z2YA9jCqCL4SssC88E-gCBbhAkdzc_ztew27QOIkKDjDvK3iojDQj1_31poBSlHYEpseNFC4n4d4_js3jDENnbwaVmxSyLNnfQAJKukMq1GjCXMkb2MPPHq7KHHoEDHYU3HGv0KSZgyFGp4-KjG5kn) Make no mistake–I support the Ukrainian people in their fight for freedom against Russia. Defeating Putin would cause a lot of good, ceasing future Russian aggression and showing China the west can’t be messed with. But I can’t support blindly sending billions of dollars overseas while our own [economy](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e9987ad156864afe85e06eaa28e3993b&_e=znxAn7bZ95SOXuCeEK4OKW8E3bKryrdkggyn7bTULgwPqq_QLOqZM8wJReboS_tVGDHaUhwqrHGycgoSZdGO0ThAXa7P0uwJRXvI1XlM7PDEIryujlifag5IX9YskjT4aVIGHr79ndbtwHtRwyvbrgfwokHIO9yPpzTN3nDFyOMgxwLw31oW2kr7y16LksIYMWC_XcFPyvdVNA3LMYi8UDhLet3MfUicG8xEgrHyjAgNrV60rS0QEf8O5Bc9BiVETOYZCvqkSWoALi-BiSD9JxEB1q2S-eq5nI93JlhZuDE%3D) gets worse every day. Europe needs to step up and take more of the lead in assisting Ukraine since this gruesome war is right on its doorstep. There’s a way to do what’s right on the world stage while also looking out for our people here at home. And that means offering our assistance only where absolutely necessary and letting Europe fight this war for themselves.
---
| | |
---

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | | | The Issue With Ukraine 🚫 | | The United States has poured a whopping into Ukraine (yes, that's billion with a b). And who is Biden placing on the hook for footing this bill? The U.S. Make no mistake–I support the Ukrainian people in their fight for freedom against Russia. Defeating Putin would cause a lot of good, ceasing future Russian aggression and showing China the west can’t be messed with. But I can’t support blindly sending billions of dollars overseas while our own gets worse every day. Europe needs to step up and take more of the lead in assisting Ukraine since this gruesome war is right on its doorstep. There’s a way to do what’s right on the world stage while also looking out for our people here at home. And that means offering our assistance only where absolutely necessary and letting Europe fight this war for themselves. | | | | | Most Important Poll Yet 🚨 | | I want your input on a really important matter... Should I keep or shave the beard? There’s a lot riding on this, so please, take some time and | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → Would love to hear her thoughts on Monet 😂👶 () → Father-son silliness 😌💖 ()→ Being handy is cool 😎👍 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

| | Hi Peter, In honor of National School Choice Week, I’m thrilled to share some exciting updates. Our organization has been standing with parents on the frontlines of the school choice fight, and we’re already seeing record enthusiasm and action across the country for 2023.

| MESSAGE FROM KAT:
Since taking office, Biden has done everything he can to expand the federal government's role, and after wasting trillions of dollars, I want your help to fight back!
When our nation was enduring the beginnings of a recession, Biden didn't bat an eye, continued to spend trillions, and ensured his agenda came FIRST. He put every American last, so I'm ready to demand accountability from the White House!
---
| | [SIGN ON AND DEMAND ACCOUNTABILITY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BTVeNq7jFVkpYNCcY5FDxsqvMWpZWGT1k0FPkypPKHLoJlXTFU_j2kdOIaYBeaH-S4C6WMPXCHaD7-dYMF7XK8HIvPyDXK32doS5WR5jHa2tkx1gl9N8Hd-Co3EXBYd1hhCW7xvDuQlNG-I1IN1e-6We2fmcyfKorFCHdyaw01H-bYrvQoqGuHNcDmMzZMYeT1inP59UtJs=&c=yhEW4Sy3wp8lTWNi3oqg82KFMSkMjwheT1pwghvA8fQRW8VVP4NqQQ==&ch=qwJP3bgHfuRCFfPuoAPLTD7E_Dn9TLMD4cmeA7h2LLbeNz4VM9lVpA==)

No other time in American history has a president knowingly put his nation through a recession so that they could meet their policy goals. Biden has ensured that America will be paying for his mistakes for generations, but after so much overreach, I need your help to fight back!
I want to show Biden that we're ready and willing to fight back, and while he continues to spend big, [I want you to sign on to my petition and tell Biden that we will hold him accountable!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BTVeNq7jFVkpYNCcY5FDxsqvMWpZWGT1k0FPkypPKHLoJlXTFU_j2kdOIaYBeaH-S4C6WMPXCHaD7-dYMF7XK8HIvPyDXK32doS5WR5jHa2tkx1gl9N8Hd-Co3EXBYd1hhCW7xvDuQlNG-I1IN1e-6We2fmcyfKorFCHdyaw01H-bYrvQoqGuHNcDmMzZMYeT1inP59UtJs=&c=yhEW4Sy3wp8lTWNi3oqg82KFMSkMjwheT1pwghvA8fQRW8VVP4NqQQ==&ch=qwJP3bgHfuRCFfPuoAPLTD7E_Dn9TLMD4cmeA7h2LLbeNz4VM9lVpA==)

subject: My first week in office
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57896470/389421452/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTVkZDVkOC05MjllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KW9PUX16yEvKUf0OJBTEwhCLMExulIKl24y_pcV6QmM=&emci=9fa5e701-519e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=355dd5d8-929e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
Friend, I just wrapped up my first week in office as your 63rd Governor of Maryland, and like Aruna and I promised, we got right to work on Day 1. Last Thursday, **my first order of business was issuing an executive order to establish the Maryland Department of Service and Civic Innovation, home of the Service Year Option**. Going forward, high school graduates will have the opportunity to serve their communities and their state, be paid for their work, and learn skills that will serve them in their futures. Maryland will lead, and we will lead with service. **I also announced the release of $69 million in funding that was previously approved by the General Assembly but withheld by the former governor.** This includes:
* $9 million for action on climate change and conservation
* $10 million for paid family and medical leave
* $46.5 million for cannabis reform
* $3.5 million to for abortion care access

These investments will impact every community in Maryland, and demonstrate our administration’s willingness to work with the General Assembly to provide bold solutions to the issues facing Marylanders. **We also released our first preliminary budget for fiscal year 2024, making historic investments in education, transportation improvements, public safety reform, healthcare expansion, and environmental protection.** Through this budget, we aim to be bold without being reckless: it prepares us to weather changes in the national economy and makes historic investments to position us for our future growth and make this next decade Maryland’s decade. These are big moves to ensure that Maryland is a state where we leave no one behind, and we’re just getting started! Thank you for trusting me and Aruna to lead our beloved state forward. We’ll be in touch with more updates as we continue to deliver for you, the people. Elevate, Wes
---
Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense.
---

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Holocaust Remembrance Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
My family survived the Holocaust and made it to America. Can I tell you their story? | Hi folks, My mom was born in Warsaw, Poland in the summer of 1938 — just a year before the Nazis took the city. She and her parents were Polish Jews who survived the Holocaust, and today, on Holocaust Remembrance Day, I hope you’ll take a moment to read their story. When the Nazis reached Warsaw, my mom and her parents were separated and forced to flee their home. My grandfather hid in a candy-maker’s cellar. My grandmother in a Catholic convent. My mom with a nurse in countryside village. Through the kindness of strangers, my family survived and was reunited, but their home and lives were upended. They left Warsaw, moving to Stockholm, then Mexico City. **Finally, they found refuge in the only place they truly believed they could rebuild their shattered lives: America.** To my mom, America was a beacon of opportunity — a safehaven where she could rebuild her life, enroll in school, find a job, and raise a family. She gave us more chances than she ever had, and she taught us that our job is to extend opportunity so others can rise. I think of my mom’s story often as I walk the halls of Congress. It inspires me to work for an America where everyone can work hard and do well. Where an immigrant to our country can become a librarian — and her child a United States Senator. An America that stands up to bullies, bigots, and demagogues. An America that is what my mom believed it to be: the most hopeful nation on Earth. Friends, the last few years have been difficult, but I still believe in the America my mother believed in. I know we can create a place where truth, and hard work, and the people’s will always prevails. We just need to fight for it. Thank you for reading my family’s story, and thank you for fighting with me. — Michael |
---

PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Kevin McCarthy's cheap political stunts
body:
McCarthy has already made good on two of his promises to his right-wing allies and corporate donors, and I'm his next target.
#
Peter — it's officially happened.
Kevin McCarthy and the House Republicans have removed both Rep. Adam Schiff and Rep. Eric Swalwell from their House Intelligence Committee assignments.
**This move from Speaker McCarthy and the GOP is not just a cheap political stunt — it is a blow to the integrity of our democracy and a threat to our national security.**
McCarthy has already made good on two of his promises to his right-wing allies and corporate donors, and I'm his next target. After months and months of endless attacks, it's so important that our movement continues to stand together and fight back.
That's why I'm sincerely asking:
[**Will you split a contribution — of $3 or anything you can afford — between our people-powered campaign and Justice Democrats today? This is such an important time to show the strength of our grassroots movement.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125912?refcode=em20230127-27257&t=1&akid=27257%2E1203867%2Ej0-hVo)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125912?refcode=em20230127-27257&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=27257%2E1203867%2Ej0-hVo)**
Here's the truth, Peter:
Our democracy depends on healthy and vibrant debate. Our strength lies not in our perfection, but in the diversity of our voices.
That is why — whatever our disagreements might be as members of Congress — policy differences alone are not cause for removing someone from serving on a committee.
In modern American history, the punishment of stripping a member of Congress of their committee assignments has been reserved only for the most extreme wrongdoings.
That means representatives who have been indicted on charges of corruption, who have engaged in bribery, sexual misconduct, or encouraged violence against other members.
Rep. Schiff and Rep. Swalwell, on the other hand, have been removed as retaliation for their tireless work bringing the truth about the January 6 insurrection to the American people.
I'm under attack because nothing scares the Republican Party more than a Black, Muslim, progressive refugee relentlessly fighting for a better world.
**These attempts to silence us and undo the progress our movement has made together are a cheap, personal, and political stunt — and we will always stand up to them. So please:**
[**Can you split a $3 contribution between me and Justice Democrats so we have the resources to fight back? I would not be asking if your support were not so important.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125912?refcode=em20230127-27257&t=21&akid=27257%2E1203867%2Ej0-hVo)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125912?refcode=em20230127-27257&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=27257%2E1203867%2Ej0-hVo)**
Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in our fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.
Thank you, as always, for being a part of it.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=41&akid=27257%2E1203867%2Ej0-hVo) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=42&akid=27257%2E1203867%2Ej0-hVo) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230127-27257-footer&t=43&refcode2=27257_1203867_j0-hVo&akid=27257%2E1203867%2Ej0-hVo)**
---

|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I was appointed to serve on the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence. This is in addition to my continuing seat on Energy and Commerce, where I will serve on the Health Subcommittee, the Environment, Manufacturing, and Critical Minerals Subcommittee, and the Oversight and Investigations Subcommittee. Between these committees, I will be front and center in the fight over every major policy debate for the next two years: national security, energy independence, trade, big tech, healthcare, and much more.
I also filed a bill to rein in the overzealous, anti-gun bureaucrats at the ATF and another bill that would end the ridiculous polygraph requirements at CBP for applicants who have military clearances or law enforcement backgrounds. And I called out Biden for putting American energy security at risk by diminishing our Strategic Petroleum Reserve.
As always, thank you for your support.
Here's your brief:
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| FIGHTING BACK AGAINST AN ABSURD ATTACK ON LAW-ABIDING GUN OWNERS
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00177Cg0-uiRtnRn7I5Ihd2mrV5-O3rhY1TmW3mBsZdVxLXviByTuOa0X8jsrE--A3Pbb4C5NsthFLhGPK7b-nXaN6eB6EDsamri4Fbs4UWOxvHU1Q_4ky3nq4Jm6_ukrVG1NcdzdYMTjUbhFHzb-5KLIR2jEQVrJtAMSqz5FOZiotD-SfXBWNWyrOlbnIetVmfXKLvQnyzpeCKGLo8It4zF9ISbRiHq4PJ0I54LfV-rFOYAWVVh1KvYyctSwhzu7ZXraJ_i2JoBBoLoFqkJxxuEdp8L1GWEfiu&c=aQ7EQ9n4OAM0-gvUceM-dsTKdrEUBWmsiYKm0p3vltWLy04Aj2O0Cw==&ch=vn99jI3-AV0vJR4AQtucFbpvRbUtc-KNxANIfg6PcLwH1GWb6jIpmA==)

| |
---
| Anti-gun government bureaucrats shouldn't block law-abiding Americans from exercising their fundamental rights, and the overzealous Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives (ATF) has done exactly that. Their most recent unconstitutional regulatory overreach is a new rule banning the use of pistol braces, an attachment that allows users to safely fire a gun with one hand.
The ATF has a pathological obsession with pistol braces. Why? Who knows. They feel like it's "cheating" and that makes them upset. But there aren't any substantive arguments against pistol braces. Many disabled gun owners use them, for instance. It doesn't make a gun any more "lethal." In fact you might argue it makes it safer because you increase stability and accuracy.
On Wednesday I dropped the ATF Accountability Act, a bill I originally introduced in the last Congress which the Democrats blocked. This bill would allow small business owners to appeal ATF's haphazard rulings and creates an avenue to have their appeals heard in front of an administrative law judge. Most other federal regulatory bodies have similar appeals processes to keep them accountable and answerable to the public. The ATF should be treated no different, especially when it has authority to regulate a fundamental right of law-abiding Americans.

| It's no surprise that Border Patrol is having trouble hiring. CBP agents have to deal everyday with thousands of new migrant crossings, an administration that refuses to enforce our immigration laws, and heavily armed cartels.
But the recruitment process for CBP is also creating an unnecessary hurdle for qualified candidates by requiring a polygraph examination. The bill I re-introduced this week would eliminate that requirement for some candidates with law enforcement or military credentials.
Polygraph tests are notoriously unreliable and easy to manipulate. Beyond serving as an interrogation tool for intelligence officers when vetting an asset, they have almost no useful purpose. They aren't useful legally and get thrown out as evidence in court all the time. Overly aggressive and unaccountable polygraph testers are causing failure rates of around 50% according to the National Border Patrol Council.
To be honest, polygraph testing should be eliminated for all CBP applicants. Hopefully with Pelosi's iron fist no longer controlling Congress, we can get enough bipartisan support to at least end the polygraph requirement for law enforcement and military credentialed applicants. If your congressman is a Democrat, please call their office and demand they support this bill.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| BIDEN DRAINED THE STRATEGIC PETROLEUM RESERVE

| The Biden Administration has a habit of draining our resources.
The latest example: drawing down more than 250 million barrels of oil from our Strategic Petroleum Reserve in less than 2 years--dropping it to the lowest levels since 1984. Luckily, Republicans (once again) have a plan to fix their mistakes: the Strategic Production Response Act. We passed it out of the House today.
Unsurprisingly, the Biden Administration is threatening to veto it, and promoting lies about what the bill actually does. Let's talk facts.
Last spring, Biden announced that he would be draining 180 million barrels of oil from the Strategic Petroleum Reserve--the largest number ever--to "lower gas prices." There's no proof that the SPR releases had any significant impact on gas prices.
This threatened national and economic security. You can't drain a reserve--intended for real emergencies--and not replenish it, without making us a target. And right now the U.S. is producing well-below its peak production of 13M barrels a day in 2019, at about 11.7M barrels per day.
Why is it down? This admin's quiet war on fossil fuels--be it through EPA overreach, delaying the nation's offshore leasing plan, or SEC climate disclosure rules--affects investment sentiment. Why deploy capital towards these projects if the government is working against your bottom line? You don't, which is why there is underinvestment in the sector to the tune of $400 billion+.
If the President wanted to drain the SPR for a non-emergency reason, then Energy Secretary Granholm would have to create plans to increase domestic energy production. This should be a no-brainer. That's the framework which the Strategic Production Response Act creates.
The solution is simple: unleash America's full energy potential. Restore and replenish our SPR. Stop the war on American oil and gas.

This is in addition to my continuing seat on Energy and Commerce, where I will serve on the Health Subcommittee, the Environment, Manufacturing, and Critical Minerals Subcommittee, and the Oversight and Investigations Subcommittee. Between these committees, I will be front and center in the fight over every major policy debate for the next two years: national security, energy independence, trade, big tech, healthcare, and much more. I also filed a bill to rein in the overzealous, anti-gun bureaucrats at the ATF and another bill that would end the ridiculous polygraph requirements at CBP for applicants who have military clearances or law enforcement backgrounds. And I called out Biden for putting American energy security at risk by diminishing our Strategic Petroleum Reserve. As always, thank you for your support. Here's your brief: | | | | | | | | FIGHTING BACK AGAINST AN ABSURD ATTACK ON LAW-ABIDING GUN OWNERS | | | == | == | | | Anti-gun government bureaucrats shouldn't block law-abiding Americans from exercising their fundamental rights, and the overzealous Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives (ATF) has done exactly that. Their most recent unconstitutional regulatory overreach is a new rule banning the use of pistol braces, an attachment that allows users to safely fire a gun with one hand. The ATF has a pathological obsession with pistol braces. Why? Who knows. They feel like it's "cheating" and that makes them upset. But there aren't any substantive arguments against pistol braces. Many disabled gun owners use them, for instance. It doesn't make a gun any more "lethal." In fact you might argue it makes it safer because you increase stability and accuracy. On Wednesday I dropped the ATF Accountability Act, a bill I originally introduced in the last Congress which the Democrats blocked. This bill would allow small business owners to appeal ATF's haphazard rulings and creates an avenue to have their appeals heard in front of an administrative law judge. Most other federal regulatory bodies have similar appeals processes to keep them accountable and answerable to the public. The ATF should be treated no different, especially when it has authority to regulate a fundamental right of law-abiding Americans. | | | | | | | | BORDER PATROL'S RECRUITMENT CRISIS | | | == | == | | | It's no surprise that Border Patrol is having trouble hiring. CBP agents have to deal everyday with thousands of new migrant crossings, an administration that refuses to enforce our immigration laws, and heavily armed cartels. To be honest, polygraph testing should be eliminated for all CBP applicants. And right now the U.S. is producing well-below its peak production of 13M barrels a day in 2019, at about 11.7M barrels per day. Why is it down? This admin's quiet war on fossil fuels--be it through EPA overreach, delaying the nation's offshore leasing plan, or SEC climate disclosure rules--affects investment sentiment. Why deploy capital towards these projects if the government is working against your bottom line? You don't, which is why there is underinvestment in the sector to the tune of $400 billion+. If the President wanted to drain the SPR for a non-emergency reason, then Energy Secretary Granholm would have to create plans to increase domestic energy production. This should be a no-brainer. body:
| |
---
| | | I think I'm going to be sick...

Will you join me in this fight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57873668/389381171/1634307625?source=20230127_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTgxY2U2YS02YzllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUjDF7OVpPy0I7EKXD57OS8mOjz_cDIurf7Z6GUk6Qc=&emci=1574b9c1-619e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=5581ce6a-6c9e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) I need you to know the facts, Peter. In the 2020 presidential election, 46% of Americans mailed in their ballots. Over half of President Biden’s supporters sent in absentee or mail-in ballots. [_**I cannot stress this enough: Mail-in votes are at the core of America’s democratic systems. DeJoy is HARMING our elections with his longer delivery windows, shutdowns, and price hikes. Which is why I need as many voices as possible -- 5,000 signatures strong before midnight -- to OUST DeJoy once and for all. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57873669/389381172/1634307625?source=20230127_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTgxY2U2YS02YzllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUjDF7OVpPy0I7EKXD57OS8mOjz_cDIurf7Z6GUk6Qc=&emci=1574b9c1-619e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=5581ce6a-6c9e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) | [**SAVE THE POST OFFICE. Peter, I’m working hard to remove DeJoy from office for good.
I’ve heard from constituents all across the country about their outrageous mail delays.
I’ve grilled Trump’s Postmaster General DeJoy in front of my committee, _[**twice.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57873673/389381177/1634307625?source=20230127_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTgxY2U2YS02YzllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUjDF7OVpPy0I7EKXD57OS8mOjz_cDIurf7Z6GUk6Qc=&emci=1574b9c1-619e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=5581ce6a-6c9e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)_
Now, I’m calling on the USPS Board to dismiss DeJoy.
[**And I won’t stop until we oust him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57873674/389381178/1634307625?source=20230127_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTgxY2U2YS02YzllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUjDF7OVpPy0I7EKXD57OS8mOjz_cDIurf7Z6GUk6Qc=&emci=1574b9c1-619e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=5581ce6a-6c9e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)
[_**Before midnight, I hope you’ll sign your name in support of firing DeJoy once and for all. I need a resounding 5,000 supporters on my emergency petition demanding Trump’s Postmaster General DeJoy be fired to SAVE the USPS. I want to prove we have a MASSIVE wave of grassroots supporters looking out for the Post Office. Can I count on you in this fight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57873676/389381179/1634307625?source=20230127_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTgxY2U2YS02YzllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUjDF7OVpPy0I7EKXD57OS8mOjz_cDIurf7Z6GUk6Qc=&emci=1574b9c1-619e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=5581ce6a-6c9e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)
Thank you,
Raja

clean_body: I need you to know the facts, Peter. In the 2020 presidential election, 46% of Americans mailed in their ballots. Over half of President Biden’s supporters sent in absentee or mail-in ballots. | | Peter, I’m working hard to remove DeJoy from office for good. I’ve heard from constituents all across the country about their outrageous mail delays. I’ve grilled Trump’s Postmaster General DeJoy in front of my committee, Now, I’m calling on the USPS Board to dismiss DeJoy. Thank you, Raja | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | = | | Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

|

It’s no secret that we still have work to do because redistricting isn’t over. However, redistricting reform progress reports are in, and we cannot wait to share them with you, team. We’re happy to report significant progress in redistricting reform in states like Michigan and Colorado, which helped us develop working strategies for 2023 and beyond.

**Key Takeaways:**
* In Michigan, we witnessed the highest level of participation in midterm elections for the state and it was even more impactful because of the citizen-led fair maps.
* In Colorado, our 2020 redistricting advocacy work before the Independent Congressional Redistricting Commission resulted in a congressional map that assures the increasing Latino population has an opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice. By keeping communities together, the new 8th congressional district has the most population of Latinos in the state. The election of Colorado's first Latina congresswoman was evidence of our grassroots advocacy efforts.

Our efforts are changing the fate of democracy for the better. **Democracy-saving work can only happen when people, like you, advocate in communities and courts across the country.** And in 2023, we are working to continue this work so other states can achieve the progress we've seen in Michigan and Colorado. [**Join our democracy-saving work by pitching in $25, $35, or $50 today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57897325/389424431/1438368617?refcode=20230127_AOTL_F_reportcard_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkOTU2ODUwLTk2OWUtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UHq5FaDvOipIFeqE5Xt3UM4KUCtuTl99GW-vzyWpgPA=)
Together, we can set our democracy up for success.

\-- Marco Dorado
Reform Director

| | Peter,

With the 2022 elections in the rearview mirror, all eyes are still on Georgia.

Experts are saying that Georgia will be the key state in determining who wins the White House in 2024. President Biden won Georgia by just 0.23% in 2020, and it could be even closer next year.

As you’re reading this, President Biden and the DNC are determining where to invest resources ahead of the 2024 election. They’re deciding the order of the primaries, where the 2024 Democratic National Convention will be hosted, and more. And they’re looking at what states have what it takes to stop Donald Trump in 2024.

[**_This is why we need your help, Peter. We have a critical end-of-month deadline coming up in just a few days, and we need to use this opportunity to show President Biden and the DNC that we have a winning grassroots team in Georgia. So we are humbly asking for $5, $10, or whatever you can spare at this critical juncture for our party, for Georgia, and for the country._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57873747/389381347/710125701?refcode=20230127.1_PSD_1AF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTZjZWM4ZS02YzllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zX413jFwr_u4T1Kb6A3KhG0rVlIgzoHcBv3IZrKGJSs=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

They’re deciding the order of the primaries, where the 2024 Democratic National Convention will be hosted, and more. And they’re looking at what states have what it takes to stop Donald Trump in 2024. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for all you do. Let’s finish this month strong. –GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. **Big news, Peter! I have been assigned to two U.S. House Committees this week: Oversight and Accountability, and Agriculture.**
It is an honor to serve on these committees for the 118th Congress and help guide legislation which will help working people in the U.S. — but I have to be honest — the next two years our work to fight against right-wing propaganda will be more important than ever.
[**I’m going to break down what these assignments mean, but first, if you’re able today, I am asking for your contribution to help keep our work powered in Congress. Can you chip in $5 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57897746/389425670/-893385466?refcode=em-20230127&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2M0N2ViZS05NzllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqloK7u5gbjrfRblNNwWOFUK-pReasEcKHcDgmyTeic=)

Congressional committees serve a critical role in pushing legislation forward. While thousands of bills are introduced each year, different committees decide which move forward in the legislative process by holding hearings for public and expert input on each topic the bill covers.
Both of these committees provide a unique opportunity to push our progressive agenda forward.
**First, the decisions made on the Oversight Committee impact our democracy and livelihoods at every level.**
* Our free & fair elections
* Our civil rights
* Our economic security
* Our environmental protections

**Next, the Agriculture Committee impacts everything we eat, the nutrition programs we invest in, and how we support our farmers and farmworkers.** This year, the Ag Committee will take up a huge bill – The Farm Bill – that will impact our entire economy for years to come.
We’re going to see House Republicans continue to bring up political schemes to attack President Biden, progressive legislation, and protect ultra-wealthy people and corporations. That's why I’m proud to bring a progressive voice to each of these committees and fight for the working people of Texas and the U.S.
[**I am fired up and ready to get to work on these items, Peter****! Will you chip in today to help our team continue to fight for our constituents?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57897750/389425674/-1783649226?refcode=em-20230127&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2M0N2ViZS05NzllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqloK7u5gbjrfRblNNwWOFUK-pReasEcKHcDgmyTeic=)
Thank you,
Greg

Last year I spoke out against Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats' election reform bill which would have weakened the integrity of our elections.
---
**And I would do it all over again.**
---
We need to strengthen our elections system to keep democracy alive and well. It should be easy to vote, but hard to cheat.
---
_Doing nothing and ignoring the legitimate concerns of so many Americans is not an option._
---
And that’s why I need you to complete my poll to help us fight for election integrity and security to protect **YOUR** vote.
---

clean_body: Do you have confidence in our elections? | Friend, Recent poll results were released that show that in over just ONE YEAR, confidence in our election system has declined by about 17%. With Republicans back in the majority, one of our top priorities is to strengthen Americans’ trust in our elections. But first, I want to first hear from YOU and other concerned voters, about your confidence in our elections to ensure I am fighting for what is important to you. Official Election Security Poll Participant: dpwillis67@gmail.com Status: Pending Deadline: 1/27 @ 11:15 P.M. Last year I spoke out against Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats' election reform bill which would have weakened the integrity of our elections. And I would do it all over again. We need to strengthen our elections system to keep democracy alive and well. It should be easy to vote, but hard to cheat. Doing nothing and ignoring the legitimate concerns of so many Americans is not an option. And that’s why I need you to complete my poll to help us fight for election integrity and security to protect YOUR vote. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil Wisconsin’s 1st Congressional District PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

name: Team Baldwin
subject: January 31, 2023
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
**November 6, 2012** The date Tammy made history as Wisconsin's first woman elected to serve in the U.S. Senate and the first openly gay member elected to the U.S. Senate, Peter. She’s still hard at work breaking barriers and delivering results for people across our state and country! **January 31, 2023** The date of our first fundraising deadline of the year and of the new election cycle. How much we raise is going to determine how we can allocate our resources in what is going to be an incredibly competitive race here in Wisconsin. **January 27, 2023** Today’s date! We also hope it’s the day you will help Tammy and our team catch up on our fundraising. We’re building a movement that works for Wisconsinites’ most pressing needs: expanding reproductive healthcare access, protecting our voting rights, lowering costs for working families, fighting climate change, and so much more. Reaching our monthly goal will help us continue working on your top priorities as we also prepare for 2024 to defend our Senate majority — but truth be told, we’re about $15,000 short of where we need to be. We know it’s a lot, but this team has always been there for us when we need it most, which is why we’re asking: **Peter, will you make a donation of $5 — or whatever works best for you — to our campaign today before our end-of-month deadline? clean_body: | November 6, 2012 The date Tammy made history as Wisconsin's first woman elected to serve in the U.S. Senate and the first openly gay member elected to the U.S. Senate, Peter. She’s still hard at work breaking barriers and delivering results for people across our state and country! January 31, 2023 The date of our first fundraising deadline of the year and of the new election cycle. How much we raise is going to determine how we can allocate our resources in what is going to be an incredibly competitive race here in Wisconsin. January 27, 2023 Today’s date! We also hope it’s the day you will help Tammy and our team catch up on our fundraising. We’re building a movement that works for Wisconsinites’ most pressing needs: expanding reproductive healthcare access, protecting our voting rights, lowering costs for working families, fighting climate change, and so much more. Reaching our monthly goal will help us continue working on your top priorities as we also prepare for 2024 to defend our Senate majority — but truth be told, we’re about $15,000 short of where we need to be. We know it’s a lot, but this team has always been there for us when we need it most, which is why we’re asking: Peter, will you make a donation of $5 — or whatever works best for you — to our campaign today before our end-of-month deadline? Any amount you pitch in will make a great difference in the weeks and months to come. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for your continued support — it means so much to us to know you have our backs through thick and thin. — Team Baldwin PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Tammy Baldwin for Senate P.O. Box 696 Madison, WI 53701 United States | |

subject: Lindsey Graham supports Donald Trump’s presidential campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Graham is campaigning for Trump this weekend in South Carolina.
| **BREAKING: Lindsey Graham to join Trump for South Carolina campaign team launch**

As one of the most popular Senators in the GOP, Graham’s support for Trump could sway enough Republican voters to secure the nomination for him.

**_Americans across the country are FURIOUS with Graham._**

So we’re conducting an urgent poll to send Graham’s approval rating plummeting and convince him to change his mind about supporting Donald Trump: | [**Do you approve of Senator Lindsey Graham?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Graham-Approval/?source=VPP_20230127_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=6159%2E878179%2EmoYhII) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Graham-Approval/?source=VPP_20230127_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=6159%2E878179%2EmoYhII) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Graham-Approval/?source=VPP_20230127_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=6159%2E878179%2EmoYhII)

*YOU ARE **ONE OF 150 TOP DEMOCRATS** SELECTED FOR THIS VITAL ONE CLICK POLL. PLEASE, ANSWER HONESTLY BEFORE MIDNIGHT!*
We’re disgusted that Lindsey Graham is campaigning for Trump.

Donald Trump has spewed hate, colluded with foreign governments to steal an election, and incited an armed insurrection to stay in power.

_Donald Trump is far too dangerous to be allowed to have a second term as President._

That’s why it’s vital that you complete our urgent poll and show Lindsey Graham that supporting Donald Trump has consequences.
[**Do you approve of Senator Lindsey Graham?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Graham-Approval/?source=VPP_20230127_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=11&akid=6159%2E878179%2EmoYhII)

Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

Can I count on your support before the End of Week Deadline? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57875874/389387875/1694452237?refcode=20230127_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmM3NDU5YS03MDllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZkoEosRUO0ShG5uWEhgeGZfwgYHh4TwffXro7uQW9c=)

body:
| | | | | |
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b60aa1fbda&e=fdefed58de)
Peter,When you think of Kentucky, what do you think of? We have some amazing exports like prize-winning thoroughbred horses and handcrafted bourbons.Unfortunately, recently we became known for something else. Sen. Mitch McConnell, Kentucky’s senior Senator, became the longest serving party leader in Senate history. McConnell, 80, overcame ten Republican “no” votes in November to remain minority leader.The votes against McConnell marked the first time McConnell had received a “no” vote as leader, a sign that true Conservative Senators had begun to turn against his establishment agenda. Those “no” votes are a good start, but not nearly enough.Establishment “Republicans” like McConnell just show how corrupt the system is. Mitch actively funded centrist candidates against conservatives, helped and enabled Sleepy Joe Biden to pass leftist legislation, voted to give Ukraine over $100 billion dollars, supported gun control measures and refused to condemn Biden’s speech in Philadelphia that labeled “MAGA Republicans” a threat to the nation.**IS THAT THE KIND OF “CONSERVATIVE” EXPORT YOU WOULD EXPECT TO SEE COMING OUT OF A RED STATE LIKE KENTUCKY?**
| [HELP ERIC FIGHT MCCONNELL & THE ESTABLISHMENT! ](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=965b4cf9b6&e=fdefed58de)
---
This is all why I’m fighting to win my race for Governor of Kentucky. So called “Conservatives” like Mitch represent the worst of Establishment politics. Under Mitch, the national debt has risen, illegal immigration has continued and real wages for American workers have not grown.If we can get actual America First patriots with a backbone elected, then we can push back against the horrible policies from people like Mitch McConnell and Joe Biden. Governors are the backstop against federal over-reach!
Democrats and their Establishment Elite “Republican” lackeys like Mitch have clearly shown they have NO interest in putting Americans first. In 2024, we MUST work together to get freedom-loving Governors elected and bring back President Donald J. Trump!**WILL YOU JOIN US IN OUR MISSION TO KEEP AMERICA GREAT BY SUPPORTING THIS CAMPAIGN WITH A GENEROUS CONTRIBUTION?**
| [DONATE NOW: HELP ERIC WIN THIS RACE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d122e07de6&e=fdefed58de)
---
It is essential that we elect good conservatives to lead states this election who will do the hard work to build a wall, fuel our growing economy and protect the lives of the innocent unborn— even if those claim to be from within our own party won’t! It's time Democrats and “LAME-STREAM REPUBLICANS” stop sabotaging the future of our country.McConnell Republicans are a scam. If one of my McConnell-backed opponents get the nomination for Kentucky Governor, we will certainly be looking at our Democrat governor getting re-elected.I’m the only one who can stop McConnell’s scam and beat the Democrat in November. And, yes, **it is this November — not 2024! Our primary is in May 2023 — just FOUR months away.****Help me stop McConnell’s scam!**

Mitch McConnell, Kentucky’s senior Senator, became the longest serving party leader in Senate history. McConnell, 80, overcame ten Republican “no” votes in November to remain minority leader.The votes against McConnell marked the first time McConnell had received a “no” vote as leader, a sign that true Conservative Senators had begun to turn against his establishment agenda. Those “no” votes are a good start, but not nearly enough.Establishment “Republicans” like McConnell just show how corrupt the system is. Mitch actively funded centrist candidates against conservatives, helped and enabled Sleepy Joe Biden to pass leftist legislation, voted to give Ukraine over $100 billion dollars, supported gun control measures and refused to condemn Biden’s speech in Philadelphia that labeled “MAGA Republicans” a threat to the nation.IS THAT THE KIND OF “CONSERVATIVE” EXPORT YOU WOULD EXPECT TO SEE COMING OUT OF A RED STATE LIKE KENTUCKY? | This is all why I’m fighting to win my race for Governor of Kentucky. So called “Conservatives” like Mitch represent the worst of Establishment politics. Under Mitch, the national debt has risen, illegal immigration has continued and real wages for American workers have not grown.If we can get actual America First patriots with a backbone elected, then we can push back against the horrible policies from people like Mitch McConnell and Joe Biden. Governors are the backstop against federal over-reach! Democrats and their Establishment Elite “Republican” lackeys like Mitch have clearly shown they have NO interest in putting Americans first. In 2024, we MUST work together to get freedom-loving Governors elected and bring back President Donald J. Trump!WILL YOU JOIN US IN OUR MISSION TO KEEP AMERICA GREAT BY SUPPORTING THIS CAMPAIGN WITH A GENEROUS CONTRIBUTION? | It is essential that we elect good conservatives to lead states this election who will do the hard work to build a wall, fuel our growing economy and protect the lives of the innocent unborn— even if those claim to be from within our own party won’t! It's time Democrats and “LAME-STREAM REPUBLICANS” stop sabotaging the future of our country.McConnell Republicans are a scam. If one of my McConnell-backed opponents get the nomination for Kentucky Governor, we will certainly be looking at our Democrat governor getting re-elected.I’m the only one who can stop McConnell’s scam and beat the Democrat in November. And, yes, it is this November — not 2024! Our primary is in May 2023 — just FOUR months away.Help me stop McConnell’s scam! | | | | | With your prayers and financial support, I know we will succeed! Thank you, Eric | Paid for by Eric Deters for Governor | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Conservatives United. All rights reserved.

Last night, a celebration party for the now 58-year-old newly elected Speaker of the House, Rep. Kevin McCarthy, was held in Washington, D.C., on his birthday. The event was attended by members of the Republican Party and their families, as well as several high-profile political figures from around the country. There were speeches from prominent Republicans, including Rep. McCarthy himself, and a presentation of awards to some of the party’s top leaders who had been selected for outstanding service.

body:

subject: ALERT: Former NRA President Stands Up for DuPage Sheriff Mendrick
body:
As the radical left has waged war against law and order, former NRA President speaks up in support of DuPage County Sheriff Jim Mendrick.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/fdcdf87991ab/alert-former-nra-president-stands-up-for-dupage-sheriff-mendrick?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Exclusive: Former NRA President Says We Are Fortunate that Men Like DuPage County Sheriff James Mendrick Still "Revere the Constitution" (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/exclusive-former-nra-president-says-we-are-fortunate-that-men-like-dupage-county-sheriff-james-mendrick-still-revere-the-constitution.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In an exclusive with Illinois Review on Thursday, former National Rifle Association (NRA) president and current board member David Keene offered words of support for DuPage County Sheriff James Mendrick, saying,
“Sheriff Mendrick is to be commended as an elected official who takes the oath he took when he was elected seriously. The legislation was passed even though its authors and those who voted for it knew it would never pass constitutional muster. We are fortunate that there are still men and women like Sheriff Mendrick who revere the Constitution and the Supreme Court and refuse to cower before political bullies.”

On January 10, 2023, Illinois became one of several states in the nation to ban assault weapons after Gov. JB Pritzker held a signing ceremony at the State Capitol in Springfield. After the ceremony, Prtizker spoke to the press, where he had a stern warning for conservative gun owners across the state: there will be consequences for not following the law. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/exclusive-former-nra-president-says-we-are-fortunate-that-men-like-dupage-county-sheriff-james-mendrick-still-revere-the-constitution.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/exclusive-former-nra-president-says-we-are-fortunate-that-men-like-dupage-county-sheriff-james-mendrick-still-revere-the-constitution.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

BREAKING: Former Republican Nominee for Governor Darren Bailey Calls on IL GOP Chair Don Tracy to "Step Down" (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-former-republican-nominee-for-governor-darren-bailey-calls-on-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-to-step-down.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In a Facebook post on Tuesday, former Illinois State Senator and Republican nominee for governor Darren Bailey publicly called for the first time for IL GOP chairman Don Tracy to “step down,” writing,
“Enough with this nonsense! The Republican Party wants to distract from their failures by blaming the candidates that they have no control over! THE PEOPLE PICK THE CANDIDATES! Mr. Tracy, I have been patient with you, but it’s time to follow Jim Durkin’s lead and step down. The Republican Party Platform has the answers to all of our state’s problems. We simply need real leadership and candidates who will stand For The People!!!”

The post was in response to Tracy, who on Monday, appeared on Bishop on Air on WMAY radio and blamed Bailey for midterm election losses, and said the IL GOP needs to re-evaluate their primary election neutrality policy moving forward. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-former-republican-nominee-for-governor-darren-bailey-calls-on-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-to-step-down.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-former-republican-nominee-for-governor-darren-bailey-calls-on-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-to-step-down.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Stephen Boulton, Addicted to Attacking Conservatives, Rules Chicago GOP Like a Third-World Dictator, And It's Time to Go (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/stephen-boulton-addicted-to-attacking-conservatives-rules-chicago-gop-like-a-third-world-dictator-and-its-time-to-go.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
In the last several days since Illinois Review published two articles exposing Chicago Republican Party Chairman Stephen Boulton as a man with anger issues who constantly attacks his fellow locally-elected ward committeeman and grassroots conservatives – and who believes that if you are unvaccinated, then you should pay for your own hospital costs; and if you require lifesaving measures due to COVID-19 – the resources spent to save your life would be a “waste” of money – literally dozens of people have reached out with copies of emails and screenshots of Facebook comments that prove even more abusive behavior from Boulton.

The information collected over the last several days is enough to create a whole series of articles that prove that Boulton is a better fit as a waiter at Ed Debevic’s, where being rude and a bully is part of the charm – then serving as the chairman of the Chicago Republican Party.

Politics is about addition – and Boulton screams subtraction. And the numbers prove it.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/stephen-boulton-addicted-to-attacking-conservatives-rules-chicago-gop-like-a-third-world-dictator-and-its-time-to-go.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/stephen-boulton-addicted-to-attacking-conservatives-rules-chicago-gop-like-a-third-world-dictator-and-its-time-to-go.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Chicago GOP Chair Stephen Boulton Has a History of Attacking Women, Conservatives on Social Media Using Personal and Official GOP Accounts (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-chair-stephen-boulton-has-a-history-of-attacking-women-conservatives-on-social-media-using-personal-and-official-gop-accounts.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
A quick glance at comments on social media accounts on Facebook and Twitter, and you’ll see that Chicago GOP chair Stephen Boulton – the man that represents the principles and ideals of what it means to be a Republican in Chicago – viciously attacking women and conservative Republicans online.

Boulton even uses the official Chicago Republican Party handle to level attacks not at the Democrats – but against conservative grassroots Republicans – whom he despises.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-chair-stephen-boulton-has-a-history-of-attacking-women-conservatives-on-social-media-using-personal-and-official-gop-accounts.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-chair-stephen-boulton-has-a-history-of-attacking-women-conservatives-on-social-media-using-personal-and-official-gop-accounts.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Chicago GOP Chair Disses the Unvaccinated, Says They Should Pay for Own COVID Costs, Considers Saving a Life "Wasteful" Spending (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-chair-disses-the-unvaccinated-says-they-should-pay-for-own-covid-hospitalization-costs-considers-saving-a-life-wasteful-spending.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In a recently uncovered Facebook thread from a year ago, Chicago GOP chairman Stephen Boulton offers some shocking admissions when it comes to the unvaccinated population, writing,

“I find it unfathomable that people are risking their lives to dodge two little shots....Now a lot of people are going to die for nothing but ‘principle’ grounded in ignorance – or, even worse, politics.”

Boulton then borrowed a line from Joe Biden and the Democrats by blaming the unvaccinated, saying,

“We have people who won’t get the vaccine, creating the problem now.”
** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-chair-disses-the-unvaccinated-says-they-should-pay-for-own-covid-hospitalization-costs-considers-saving-a-life-wasteful-spending.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-chair-disses-the-unvaccinated-says-they-should-pay-for-own-covid-hospitalization-costs-considers-saving-a-life-wasteful-spending.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** BREAKING: White County Judge Hears DeVore's Arguments during Hearing on Assault Weapons Ban, No Ruling Yet (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-white-county-judge-hears-devores-arguments-during-hearing-on-assault-weapons-ban-no-ruling-yet.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Wednesday morning, in a hearing to discuss Democratic Gov. JB Pritzker’s assault weapons ban, White County Judge T. Scott Webb heard arguments from representatives of Attorney General Kwame Raoul’s office, and from Tom DeVore, who is representing over 1,600 plaintiffs, including former Illinois State Senator and Republican nominee for governor Darren Bailey; 68 federal firearms dealers and 92 counties, saying the case is “under advisement” and that a ruling would follow after further review. ** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-white-county-judge-hears-devores-arguments-during-hearing-on-assault-weapons-ban-no-ruling-yet.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-white-county-judge-hears-devores-arguments-during-hearing-on-assault-weapons-ban-no-ruling-yet.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** How Censuring Anti-Grassroots, RINO State Party Officials Can Help the RNC Start Winning Again (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/how-censuring-anti-grassroots-rino-state-party-officials-can-help-the-rnc-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

As chairwoman of the RNC, conservative grassroots Republican Harmeet Dhillon will have significant influence over the party’s direction in 2024 and beyond – and if elected, she’ll certainly have her work cut out for her.

But ridding our party of RINO’s should be one of her top priorities – and censuring state party officials who hurt the conservative cause, rather than advance it, should be one of her first acts as RNC chairwoman.
** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/how-censuring-anti-grassroots-rino-state-party-officials-can-help-the-rnc-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/how-censuring-anti-grassroots-rino-state-party-officials-can-help-the-rnc-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** (https://youtu.be/rviiaSus70k?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Roger Stone joined Editor Mark Vargas and Publisher Scott Kaspar on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas" on AM 560 The Answer, where Stone made the bold prediction that Joe Biden will be out of the White House by summer (Jan. 22, 2023).

To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=148f60b7b7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_27_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-148f60b7b7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

body:

## Longtime reporter Mark Halperin joins the podcast...
This week on “Beyond the Briefing” podcast, we had an in-depth conversation with long time journalist Mark Halperin. We talked about him literally starting at the bottom of the newsroom and working his way up, his thoughts on covering campaigns, where he learned the most, the evolution of email newsletters and more. A lot to be learned in this episode with Mark:
| [Listen here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c966bbd550&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
And as I mentioned in the podcast, I’m out of the country on military leave, but I’ll be back Monday to talk about all the stories I’ve missed. Get notified as soon as it drops:
| [Subscribe here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=eb9d2a3814&e=f6564bbe3b)

|

[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b10a3f8625&e=f6564bbe3b)

## Franklin Graham on helping American veterans on Spicer & Co...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=71f0c21771&e=f6564bbe3b)
