name: Dan Goldman
subject: Preventing gun violence, standing up to the QAnon Caucus, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
Some updates from this week in Washington: |
#
---
_Content warning: This message contains mentions of gun violence._ Peter, I hope you are finding these emails informative as we work to keep you in the loop through substantive, thoughtful messages about what I’m doing in Washington to serve New York’s Tenth District — without contributing to the landscape of political emails that are cluttering our inboxes and always tell us how “the sky is falling.” Over the last few weeks, I’ve updated you about my first few weeks in Congress — from everything I am doing to hold George Santos and Republican leadership accountable for their complicity in his scheme to defraud voters, to my work to improve mental health care services and provide long overdue funding for NYCHA residents, to how House Republicans are planning to interfere with the Department of Justice through what I call their GOP Subommittee to Obstruct Justice. While our goal is to send fewer emails, the truth is that it hasn’t changed our need to raise money. Next week is our first end-of-month fundraising target since getting to Congress, and I’ll be upfront: you will hear a few more times from me in the coming days about the importance of hitting this goal. If you are ready to make a contribution before reading more, please click below to chip in now. I’m grateful for your support. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57878696/389396516/1288870341?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRjNzQxMy03YjllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV7ooPKcS4L8Ax_Vxa_qLZhqHmgfJUkKNzZ3wo7GbHs=)
---
This week, I returned back to Washington after a productive week meeting with outstanding community leaders and organizations in NY-10 that do so much important work for our community. And I had the honor of kicking off Lunar New Year celebrations in New York City’s historic Chinatown.
Tragically, this year’s joyous celebrations were also marked by profound anguish and tragedy, after a shooting at a Lunar New Year festival in Monterey Park, California killed 11 people.
And just days later, another mass shooting in California claimed seven more innocent lives.
America is the only industrialized nation that faces this routine horror. It’s an inexcusable scourge on our nation. We’re not even through January yet, and there have already been 39 mass shootings this year.
I’m proud to serve as a Vice Chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force — a bipartisan group of my colleagues that are working together to find common-sense solutions to prevent gun violence.
**And yesterday, I joined my fellow Vice Chairs — Representatives Maxwell Alejandro Frost and Jared Moskowitz of Florida — in calling for a classified briefing for all members of Congress on mass shootings in the United States from the FBI and other relevant agencies.**
These tragedies have become so commonplace in our country that we risk becoming desensitized to the pain and destruction that these events have on victims, loved ones, and their communities.
A classified, bipartisan briefing would be a step in the right direction — and it’s my hope that it would educate members of Congress about mass shootings so that we can come together to find solutions.
* * *
This week, I was recommended to serve on the House Committee on Oversight and Accountability, a powerful panel that has a long history of exposing corporate bad actors, special interests, and corruption in our government — and ensuring that they are held accountable for their actions. Under the leadership of the Ranking Member on the committee, Jamie Raskin, that is exactly what my Democratic colleagues and I will do.
But the same cannot be said of the Republican majority, who have made it abundantly clear that they intend to use the Committee to fuel their conspiracy-theory filled agenda by tapping QAnon, MAGA extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Paul Gosar to lead bogus investigations into President Biden’s family — a shameless political effort only intended to hurt Democrats before the 2024 election.
The QAnon Caucus running the show should prepare themselves for what’s coming.
Because I’m ready to stand up to them face-to-face — just as I did as lead counsel in President Trump’s first impeachment, and when I handed George Santos a copy of the Ethics complaint I filed to investigate him, and as I’m doing every day to hold Republican leadership accountable for their complicity in his scheme to defraud voters.
With everything I’m doing to hold MAGA Republicans accountable, we must prepare for the onslaught of attacks that are sure to come my way, and generous donations from supporters like you in moments like this say a lot about the strength of this team and our shared commitment to defending our democracy.
**If you’re able, please add a contribution of any amount ahead of Tuesday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline to help support my fight for accountability — and for all the challenges that we’ll be facing in the coming weeks and months. I’m grateful for a contribution of any amount that’s meaningful to you.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57878706/389396520/1288870341?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRjNzQxMy03YjllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV7ooPKcS4L8Ax_Vxa_qLZhqHmgfJUkKNzZ3wo7GbHs=)

[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57878716/389396530/1288870341?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRjNzQxMy03YjllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV7ooPKcS4L8Ax_Vxa_qLZhqHmgfJUkKNzZ3wo7GbHs=)

| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57878717/389396535/1288870341?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRjNzQxMy03YjllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV7ooPKcS4L8Ax_Vxa_qLZhqHmgfJUkKNzZ3wo7GbHs=)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57878718/389396538/1288870341?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRjNzQxMy03YjllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV7ooPKcS4L8Ax_Vxa_qLZhqHmgfJUkKNzZ3wo7GbHs=)

| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57878719/389396539/1288870341?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRjNzQxMy03YjllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV7ooPKcS4L8Ax_Vxa_qLZhqHmgfJUkKNzZ3wo7GbHs=)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57878720/389396540/1288870341?express_lane=true&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRjNzQxMy03YjllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV7ooPKcS4L8Ax_Vxa_qLZhqHmgfJUkKNzZ3wo7GbHs=)
---
Thank you.
Talk soon,
Dan
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008
United States **[dangoldmanforny.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57878721/389396541/1064912967?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRjNzQxMy03YjllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV7ooPKcS4L8Ax_Vxa_qLZhqHmgfJUkKNzZ3wo7GbHs=&emci=8aa8b947-6f9e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=5fdc7413-7b9e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823) | [info@dangoldmanforny.com](mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com)** | **Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
---

If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lRuS4-CjnEe3IkMH5LeSZA2?unsubscribedata=DPrNnEnFlxeWOrYNnwE0R46lmZjSv%2BloiUsCTfjvvNM0Ca%2FCe8Z7GqCXH8%2BnNhKCKhiYfeOa8psg7k8TpetY3apl7ET65JpBrD6FkoVldru1moYHy8t%2B8RYu2NexTzyzzKCHJyuWT60OC23yrLlKCzkc9g8T2gPa4gtnm4pvAyDLbbiJTfhyXOxauRC0DepFyrtuzMcXOM6XD98%2B%2F4aTf%2BVw%2BS9iiKjP7JgxctT1SGzR1jUgwmBTvwOHCmX3SBf79v9wHIx6U8VwNrz295puDnPgPFzKgla5p6%2F7%2BDF8OVQ%2FO1tG9xnlOFYOBHGjbs61NO0mpC7p%2FDyDBXAawCIlEQ1LRstFYTOu7j8eLHfYkNwMa%2FXiU6x8OMboq7GWLhRN6ps%2Fw8E4bX3yhNFt3BTcjlPH6bCX2Wj6EVDyapIclAy%2FmAZM3hVqQq14cMxgG0WD)**

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69aaf7335c6e49f2885824a699f9365e&_e=AjvnMU27X_vAXEfhHGYyQ_ac0ajPldTgwCC6_42jhffuYifyEuz13lQr7pE063ujsFnAFeXlHMVXxCf3apev-aS4yi_4UWIF9P9QzQQDRvyFUmS5Z4X1dgU9TUbw863tlPaiZefxxCTHpXjMo6U15mIddmzuTpqFAVC26NGyzFS8GPPIgW-V13YrAabWrQCkGqg0CW9HT-tXkBMnh9tNNJtjeT6-KTUJUHtml5dQfpnb9mkQTbCf9tCgBu-tfBKuv_l-IUPEbQE3gB-laqBu5yiyGzS1C4N9K0FpxJgm5M4fL6pkDH61cwji2BRzjGPZGk5QqlaL8B9veLI5gY3LH6JrmOpbLPSsYI_TEyDiqXNn2hZVvrm8xpKvy6qogN4vj8yE7O-eQ4GXKBSXy55_Fg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69aaf7335c6e49f2885824a699f9365e&_e=AjvnMU27X_vAXEfhHGYyQ_ac0ajPldTgwCC6_42jhffuYifyEuz13lQr7pE063ujsFnAFeXlHMVXxCf3apev-aS4yi_4UWIF9P9QzQQDRvyFUmS5Z4X1dgU9TUbw863tlPaiZefxxCTHpXjMo6U15mIddmzuTpqFAVC26NGyzFS8GPPIgW-V13YrAabWrQCkGqg0CW9HT-tXkBMnh9tNNJtjeT6-KTUJUHtml5dQfpnb9mkQTbCf9tCgBu-tfBKu4DCrk47b6T-PMJ4kJicjNxUIkG9G61yNtrgg5i-984A4h8dgtuztKFs-Qdky2zaD53ot_86YDTg6j32B-NNQroVucgsiUS_DpkZBOgqna8imT5fpHHjKSsWRcP-4ALXM-4KeNrzfE8feYH1PKZ4BFw%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69aaf7335c6e49f2885824a699f9365e&_e=AjvnMU27X_vAXEfhHGYyQ_ac0ajPldTgwCC6_42jhffuYifyEuz13lQr7pE063ujsFnAFeXlHMVXxCf3apev-aS4yi_4UWIF9P9QzQQDRvyFUmS5Z4X1dgU9TUbw863tlPaiZefxxCTHpXjMo6U15mIddmzuTpqFAVC26NGyzFS8GPPIgW-V13YrAabWrQCkGqg0CW9HT-tXkBMnh9tNNJtjeT6-KTUJUHtml5dQfpnb9mkQTbCf9tCgBu-tfBKu3pyoXXQ4jGHAbtfU1s9iqGzUgEAvM8I3jTuarhsOfQspI0ik-6dn5NxGLN-0DZ0t_m7AWU59rgmjZLUqdtBzWTLp33WBeNYrc1tpzpBD3rTi7JwjekxPSmjNODBo5YK_xVUgDJ-xE1-hSF3ViI-B_Q%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. I wanted you to hear it from me first. I’m running for the U.S. Senate in 2024, to protect our democracy and to build an economy that works for everyone.

**Because we’re in the fight of our lives for the future of our country.**

Our democracy is under assault by an extreme and power-hungry GOP whose leadership doesn’t care about truth, decency, or right and wrong. And they must be stopped. We did far better than expected against these radical Republicans in the midterms, but we are not out of the woods. Donald Trump is still the dominant voice in his party, and he has spawned a dangerous crowd of imitators.

_This is the fight of my life_ — to protect our democracy, build it back stronger, and hold those who would tear it down accountable.

And at a time when our economy simply isn’t working for millions of Americans, who see their wages fail to keep pace with the cost of food, education, and housing, and who don’t have the same opportunity to succeed as their parents, we simply can’t afford to wait and hope the economy fixes itself.

Because if hard-working folks don’t have a chance to succeed, they start looking for alternatives — like a demagogue who promises that he alone can fix it.

With our economy and our democracy at risk, _we must fight:_

For an economy that works for everyone and leaves no one behind. For universal health care. Against climate change and for a healthy planet. To stop gun violence and protect our children. To realize a bold and progressive future for the Golden State and our nation.

**With Trump on the ballot and control of the House and Senate at stake in 2024, I truly believe that the future of our country hinges on this election. That’s why I need to know that you’re ready for the fight ahead.**

Senator Feinstein hasn’t announced her plans yet. But we need to start preparing for the fights ahead right now.

Over the last six years, I’ve taken on Trump and Trumpism to protect our country. And I’d do it again. In a heartbeat.

Already, the Republicans are going after me. Trump bellows at me at his rallies. Fox News runs its constant smears, and Kevin McCarthy is promising to remove me from the Intelligence Committee. They don’t want me to continue holding them accountable, and they certainly don’t want me in the Senate.

Many of Trump’s worst enablers are in the U.S. Senate, and it’s where a lot of the critical fights for the future will take place.

When I led the Senate impeachment trial against Trump, I stood my ground, no matter what they threw at me. And I will take on anyone to protect the country I love and its proud legacy of self-government. As I run for the Senate, I need to know that you are by my side.

[**Can I count on you to be a Founding Member of Team Schiff before the end of the day? Even $3, $10, or $15 goes a long way.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57878702/389396521/-648933138?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230127_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzZGM3NDEzLTdiOWUtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=izgsnlk2IDGLqPC7I3wmadeCKJ9fxM6B0-7aahcoM70=)

clean_body: I’m running for the U.S. Senate in 2024, to protect our democracy and to build an economy that works for everyone. | Peter — I wanted you to hear it from me first. I’m running for the U.S. Senate in 2024, to protect our democracy and to build an economy that works for everyone. Because we’re in the fight of our lives for the future of our country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = = = Our democracy is under assault by an extreme and power-hungry GOP whose leadership doesn’t care about truth, decency, or right and wrong. And they must be stopped. We did far better than expected against these radical Republicans in the midterms, but we are not out of the woods. Donald Trump is still the dominant voice in his party, and he has spawned a dangerous crowd of imitators. This is the fight of my life — to protect our democracy, build it back stronger, and hold those who would tear it down accountable. And at a time when our economy simply isn’t working for millions of Americans, who see their wages fail to keep pace with the cost of food, education, and housing, and who don’t have the same opportunity to succeed as their parents, we simply can’t afford to wait and hope the economy fixes itself. Because if hard-working folks don’t have a chance to succeed, they start looking for alternatives — like a demagogue who promises that he alone can fix it. With our economy and our democracy at risk, we must fight: For an economy that works for everyone and leaves no one behind. For universal health care. Against climate change and for a healthy planet. To stop gun violence and protect our children. To realize a bold and progressive future for the Golden State and our nation. With Trump on the ballot and control of the House and Senate at stake in 2024, I truly believe that the future of our country hinges on this election. That’s why I need to know that you’re ready for the fight ahead. Senator Feinstein hasn’t announced her plans yet. But we need to start preparing for the fights ahead right now. Over the last six years, I’ve taken on Trump and Trumpism to protect our country. And I’d do it again. In a heartbeat. Already, the Republicans are going after me. Trump bellows at me at his rallies. Fox News runs its constant smears, and Kevin McCarthy is promising to remove me from the Intelligence Committee. They don’t want me to continue holding them accountable, and they certainly don’t want me in the Senate. Many of Trump’s worst enablers are in the U.S. Senate, and it’s where a lot of the critical fights for the future will take place. When I led the Senate impeachment trial against Trump, I stood my ground, no matter what they threw at me. And I will take on anyone to protect the country I love and its proud legacy of self-government. As I run for the Senate, I need to know that you are by my side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: = = = = I’ll keep you posted every step of the way, and I can’t thank you enough for all you’ve done for me and to protect our democracy. Talk soon, Adam | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 to receive fewer emails. to update your information. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The GOP is eager to take me on
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
The first end-of-month deadline of the year is this Tuesday -- and it's the first since an opponent entered our race. Our team has set an ambitious goal to bring in 10,000 contributions by the end of the month.
I’m hoping I can count on your support for my re-election campaign. Will you make your first contribution of the year? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230127?refcode=sbe230127nd]
As one of three Democratic Senators representing states Trump won in 2020 and the last statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, our race is attracting a lot of attention.
While we just got our first opponent for 2024, there are several more GOP candidates considering throwing their hats in the ring in the coming weeks. And we know regardless of who emerges as the Republican nominee, Mitch McConnell will spend whatever he can to flip this seat.
Our race is heating up, and we need to be ready for whatever lies ahead -- and that means reaching every fundraising goal is essential. Will you chip in before the deadline? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230127?refcode=sbe230127nd]
With gratitude,
Sherrod

We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny Co only, unless otherwise determined: HD32, HD34, HD35 Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: “Impeach Joe Biden”
body:
They keep saying it.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49a485ed-30a3-4685-814c-e4ee2395ad96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_" Impeach Joe Biden"_** _These words are being uttered by clownish security threat and holder of Kevin McCarthy's leash, Marjorie Taylor Greene. Why? She doesn't know, she'll work that part out later. _ **_The President has presided over a term that must be mentioned in the same breath as FDR's. We just learned we had 2.9% economic growth the last quarter of 2022, unemployment is at a 50 year low, and in some states such as Wisconsin, Georgia, Arizona, Montana, West Virginia and more, it is the lowest it has EVER been. Biden has lowered the Trump Deficit by $1.8 Trillion--yep, that's with a T._** But the corporate media won't tell you this, except in passing before the move onto Hunter Biden's laptop, because they're scared of the right-wing owners of their outlets, feel the need to *both sides* everything or are just looking for clicks on their story, no matter the cost to our democracy. So We must share the truth about what Joe Biden has done. _**For example, he got Republicans to support bipartisan measures, passing a huge, job-creating infrastructure bill and the first gun-safety bill in a generation. ****But, he also wasn't scared to push ahead by himself when Republicans acted in bad faith. The historic Inflation Reduction Act, CHIPS legislation, bringing high-paying manufacturing jobs back home, helping students in debt to predatory lenders, funding historically Black universities, reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act and much more.**_ [_**Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight for Joe Biden's presidency. **_**_There will be never be a more important race in our lifetimes than this one._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tebe36b48-8b82-4808-b921-c5e709bab0e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**When the midterm approached, The President--in an important rhetorical move--called out MAGA "semi-fascists."** The result? **Per historian Michael Beschloss, President Biden had the strongest midterm congressional showing of any President in 88 years. **Yet, again, you'd think Republicans would be happy with a stronger more prosperous America. But you'd be wrong. This was the response from the real leader of the GOP House Caucus, who takes Kevin McCarthy for his dog walk eveyr while telling him "good boy," and making her demands:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33ece96e-3148-4cc9-bc4f-0369af946e8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcce5d9b1-9a9f-482d-b2e6-d70d67812f58/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _The authoritarian Republican Party will do whatever it takes to destroy Joe Biden--sabotage our economy, do the bidding of foreign dictators, even attack our Capitol, as we saw two years ago January 6th. As President Biden approaches his State of the Union address and announcing his presidential reelection campaign, please j_ _oin us in backing President Joe Biden and ensuring Marjorie Taylor Greene's party isn't rewarded for betraying our country---_ [_**Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight for Joe Biden's presidency. **_**_There will be never be a more important race in our lifetimes than this one._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T026b7656-9287-4b0d-94cd-a259fc37500e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e8076fb-c08c-4cc1-9593-454e83ddef12/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=891c64ca239c4cf3a71a7cff2d4a753e&_e=aL7fkVwuLtcaBVN3YpkOBWEYqc7zKHdQHf0WJ1RzoxhxC9Z8XWBcHAXz6bfHhuuiEvd6EeIimqqEzOBfp7EN6qD8VxmTB0huLC_6XBgfo7fg_y8PXcSSZu5L6tTK-X-yqylPMHCiRxXpPUoFv-vV15Qg2U04NVZXaHF8cI6eOmWBeBUapRpgDR-sbmD0s5X6EUXmVEJHCPVhK8T6rOm7H1PVmQPfuRRiR7PAuS7WT-Wa5-VeEH_9zdf1CX1QWnN6PSWoccO3jDcrA-hBj8tBzCDNzYFgYJTNUgQ0WafN8K5e3iZeeyL0au5Voan5tiUCWXO3yx80NwXEqIM4REdK8n1mMPSRxqgc0kSa-xvhS67ANa_63BzVXMUGA6sSCsGdUSEMQpzMiBO8VhBvN8xN5A%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=891c64ca239c4cf3a71a7cff2d4a753e&_e=aL7fkVwuLtcaBVN3YpkOBWEYqc7zKHdQHf0WJ1RzoxhxC9Z8XWBcHAXz6bfHhuuiEvd6EeIimqqEzOBfp7EN6qD8VxmTB0huLC_6XBgfo7fg_y8PXcSSZu5L6tTK-X-yqylPMHCiRxXpPUoFv-vV15Qg2U04NVZXaHF8cI6eOmWBeBUapRpgDR-sbmD0s5X6EUXmVEJHCPVhK8T6rOm7H1PVmQPfuRRiR7PAuS7WT-VmAPtdzZo-J508vlqjS7yvph4JCMGGGbo1dZ6VACuYfYLxz0EKFtqB0hri_ii_6lQD6nA10pBOdPdXHQJJlCD3rm5x5Bfj3aSm-RvlPhrjsoM8wt3o4LxDcpJlDRWlS829vIifIHMGBOual8rFzmu5gvORQgOQ0SbYnv64V6kitA%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=891c64ca239c4cf3a71a7cff2d4a753e&_e=aL7fkVwuLtcaBVN3YpkOBWEYqc7zKHdQHf0WJ1RzoxhxC9Z8XWBcHAXz6bfHhuuiEvd6EeIimqqEzOBfp7EN6qD8VxmTB0huLC_6XBgfo7fg_y8PXcSSZu5L6tTK-X-yqylPMHCiRxXpPUoFv-vV15Qg2U04NVZXaHF8cI6eOmWBeBUapRpgDR-sbmD0s5X6EUXmVEJHCPVhK8T6rOm7H1PVmQPfuRRiR7PAuS7WT-UhJWBseBDmhMFMJJ1f9QpfeaqLGSrjoAYV5q6HUjWxTV1I7uD6wX2FAsPB9ZoDFbyigeHHWJl1RVdk7T6rPqfmL_1ZXsgS0-ZwODpNa6hnUPvimg5bmFbadNzAFdnqsvmnsAk_j14NFpkstExwZohamyecFAMvxXifJ0SO3fqYYA%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Trump returning to New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Trump’s visit makes clear that the Granite State is one of his top priorities as he looks to stage his comeback.
| | |
---
Friend –

Donald Trump is coming back to New Hampshire TOMORROW. This is bad news. Trump’s visit makes clear that the Granite State is one of his top priorities as he looks to stage his comeback.

**Trump is already starting his 2024 campaign in earnest, and New Hampshire is one of his first stops in spreading misinformation and sewing distrust.**

I don’t have to tell you how dangerous another four years of Donald Trump would be for this country. He has threatened the very heart of democracy itself by refusing to accept election results that don’t go his way and by inciting unprecedented attacks on our nation’s Capitol.

**We have to ensure that we have the resources to withstand what is sure to be a dangerous and deceitful campaign.[Can you chip in $3 today or more to show Donald Trump that we won’t put up with another four years of his leadership?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57880313/389401515/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2198-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGEzZDIyZi03ZDllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pvTRKSTUqsh62hRyF3V0EG4K-hkuLcIfWblgCBRygDw=)**

If elected, it is all but certain that Donald Trump would try to sign a national abortion ban into law and would support policies that accelerate climate change. Trump would threaten to undermine all the progress we’ve worked so hard to achieve, and **his plan to get back to the White House starts in New Hampshire.**

**[Everything we care about is on the line. So please, consider chipping in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57880314/389401516/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2198-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGEzZDIyZi03ZDllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pvTRKSTUqsh62hRyF3V0EG4K-hkuLcIfWblgCBRygDw=)**

Thank you.

With every good wish,

clean_body: Trump’s visit makes clear that the Granite State is one of his top priorities as he looks to stage his comeback. | | | Friend – Donald Trump is coming back to New Hampshire TOMORROW. This is bad news. Trump’s visit makes clear that the Granite State is one of his top priorities as he looks to stage his comeback. Trump is already starting his 2024 campaign in earnest, and New Hampshire is one of his first stops in spreading misinformation and sewing distrust. I don’t have to tell you how dangerous another four years of Donald Trump would be for this country. He has threatened the very heart of democracy itself by refusing to accept election results that don’t go his way and by inciting unprecedented attacks on our nation’s Capitol. We have to ensure that we have the resources to withstand what is sure to be a dangerous and deceitful campaign.= If elected, it is all but certain that Donald Trump would try to sign a national abortion ban into law and would support policies that accelerate climate change. Trump would threaten to undermine all the progress we’ve worked so hard to achieve, and his plan to get back to the White House starts in New Hampshire. = Thank you. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Peter, trying to reach you (via moms in office)
subject: What's your why?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
Here is our why...
Can we ask for a few minutes of your time to tell you why this work is so important and why we need you on our side?
This is a longer email, but we hope that you read it — [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice] and pitch in $5 to help us reach our $10,000 fundraising goal before the end of January. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice]
Campaigning for an elected position is a full time, unpaid job. As such, many qualified women with caregiving responsibilities don’t run for office.
They can't afford to give up their jobs and take care of their families, all while running a campaign. The numbers simply don’t add up for them, the risk is too great. We need to lessen the risk and level the playing field.
Here is where we come in.
Moms in Office is changing that with a future-minded focus. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice]
Each campaign cycle we endorse pro-choice moms running for office to level the playing field and elevate the power of all moms.
Our work is too important to slow down right now. Paid leave, universal childcare, the child tax credit, and more — that’s what we’re fighting for. If we want to make our government work for working families, we need to elect leaders who know firsthand what families are up against each day. This is what we are preparing to do next year and in 2024.
Can we count on you to chip in today to help us keep up the momentum and reach our $10,000 goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice]

We know that times are tough and this may not be a good time to make a contribution. We always love to hear from you and learn more about the issues that matter to you the most.
What's your why? [https://secure.everyaction.com/CQB7Z2tPoE6dw_p5--14cQ2]
Non of this transformational work would be possible without you.
Thank you for everything!
Simona Grace

Peter, When it comes to representing Arizona, Kyrsten Sinema has done a subpar job to say the least: she makes no time for her constituents, while making plenty of time for corporate lobbyists, rich donors, Wall Street, and her weekly massage appointments. It’s no wonder she’s getting headlines like this:
With the 2024 election just around the corner, we’re doing everything we can to hold Sinema accountable for prioritizing money over constituents and jeopardizing the Democrats agenda. Every dollar you contribute goes to spreading awareness about Sinema’s despicable behavior. She sold out Arizona and we need to make sure every Arizonan is aware of that come election day. name: Ryan Chamberlin Campaign
subject: This SATURDAY on NEWSMAX!
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hRPam9bhDQve0iI&b=9wSTrH5lxrkbwKUMDUVyrg)
---
Share:
[ ](http://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https://archive.aweber.com/awlist6407924/EXbPQ) [ ](http://www.twitter.com/share?url=https://archive.aweber.com/awlist6407924/EXbPQ)
This letter is to alert you about two important events happening this Saturday. _If you care about our great state of Florida and the upcoming Special Election, please read on._

**This****Saturday at 9 PM****, I’ll be going LIVE with Benny on his Newsmax program. **

Benny Johnson is a conservative creator and social media sensation. He’s known for his political wit and humor, and hosts a show on Newsmax called The Benny Report.

We’re going to dive deep into the state of Florida politics and this very Special Election here in Marion County. **Join me and Benny tomorrow night on Newsmax TV to find out why I'm the right man for the job!**
### _**Also happening this Saturday...**_
###

The Marion County Candidate Forum will put me and my opponents on full display for voters of Florida's 24th District. This is a terrific way to find out what each of us brings to the table before it's time to vote!

**The event is completely free and open to the public** — please refer to the poster above for details.
### **A Note on the Upcoming Special Election this March 7th**
I’m running for Florida House District 24 because I believe that if we elect great leaders, we can have the greatest state in the union.

Unfortunately, many of my opponents are RINO establishment members hoping to sneak their way into power without YOU noticing. They may put an “R” next to their name on the ballot, but they are weak on the issues that matter most to our state: **the right to life, the second amendment, the transgender crisis, and the woke indoctrination of our youth.**

Who needs Democrats when you have “Republicans” like that?

This is why it’s critical that a strong conservative is elected– **someone who will fight with Governor DeSantis, not against him.** Tune in tomorrow to find out why I am the right man for the job.

Sincerely,

Ryan Chamberlin
Candidate for Florida State House of Representatives
[](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hRPam9bhDQve0iI&b=mcbygs12MZBapbrP4i652A)

[P.S. Click here to contribute to my grassroots conservative campaign- donations of any amount are appreciated.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hRPam9bhDQve0iI&b=MgGeAGQcF2vVEeXdhTOORw)

12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd
Belleview FL 34420
USA

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
The first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

| Fight for Progress is dedicated to building a more progressive America and has raised over $300,000 for Democratic candidates. If you would like to donate to a deserving Democrat, you can do so _[here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57882936/389405839/838935893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhZThhNDkyLTdmOWUtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CCoxqKyd0QqoSQDua_VQ6cpvOCoYhM_hIEUP97Dp8g0=&emci=61aaf28b-7f9e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=2ae8a492-7f9e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=22408598#candidate-inner)_ And of course, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/z4lkEUrOvESaGxr1QVEGJw2?unsubscribedata=EdWjUKBjpRC02grGAfU%2FlipbbAK2vMovGUagSjZyOdIdjnBuW3okL0hnszRnAZiioP5PhFtsFOSsWFA7xfZ%2BKPv%2BkP9%2F0%2B30MswKmEyG9woUA5VjhKXpcRoZjWxvwfMtYEwn%2FgB1k9koMVvdenkqfAA7syTzHn4OSPADfI8%2B5hRfuaiDAdi6t%2BHMjaQ2ZRQwdrG%2FxuZLkS6FNkwff%2B03tWnbnG7RcjlZTnNnxvMumCxOjF2n6wX0e17EWLw4buzgBX%2FtHsSYNwpvSmfc546U69F8K4xMlAZBUBje6d9bosVjbcAuDTYWeQVRNr0ybkTOYURYxEzPGxPBg8sBxj267YSo8wxArnulyonez80%2FiscOm2d5Wnfu9e%2FcM7ICOXjKKbd5V%2B0DkJBBy00ziZsDfZNAzyXq%2BqdfO0gDWSnojnU%3D) at any time.
---
| Peter -

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[_**Can you please split a $5 contribution between Fight for Progress and my United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so important.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57882939/389405840/880176479?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230127-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhZThhNDkyLTdmOWUtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CCoxqKyd0QqoSQDua_VQ6cpvOCoYhM_hIEUP97Dp8g0=)

clean_body: The first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left. | Fight for Progress is dedicated to building a more progressive America and has raised over $300,000 for Democratic candidates. If you would like to donate to a deserving Democrat, you can do so And of course, you can at any time. | Peter - I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left. Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that. Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name just two. Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress. The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals. As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone. I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please: = | | | = | = | = | = | = The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do yet, either. subject: Let us continue to uplift our communities in the wake of these tragedies.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57883939/389406373/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTZmMWE1My04MDllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98OscGWgxEHZpbFodhgLao-q_-XBf9enQ7FsmUnq-u8=&emci=81e94641-959d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=ee6f1a53-809e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **Last weekend, I woke to a flurry of calls and texts after celebrating Lunar New Year with my family to learn of the mass shooting in California – where ten were killed at a Lunar New Year celebration like the one my family and I had attended.** Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) communities around the nation planned festivities for Sunday and had been planning for months. Many in the community are now feeling shattered and scared. The common phrase I heard is, _"I don't know how to process this."_ What does it mean that it happened on Lunar New Year? What does it mean that it was an elderly Asian American man who was the murderer? What do we do next to help communities feel safe? Many talked about how they grew up in Monterey Park, hung out there, or knew people there that they are now desperate to connect with and hope are safe. Then we got word of another shooting in Half Moon Bay, California. Then another in Iowa. Then Washington state. Then North Carolina. Over and over again. This violence is becoming normalized in our nation in a way we should never accept. **I'm sad, angry, and grieving for the friends and family who lost someone.** I cannot imagine how the communities suffering are coping after these mass shootings. Whether it is an AAPI community or any community, we stand in solidarity with them and will refuse to accept this violence as normal. [**If you feel moved to help, please click here to donate to the families of the victims of the shooting in Monterey Park.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57883940/389406374/-377499728?member=24599709&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTZmMWE1My04MDllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98OscGWgxEHZpbFodhgLao-q_-XBf9enQ7FsmUnq-u8=&emci=81e94641-959d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=ee6f1a53-809e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389) **Second, if you want to address the continued challenges facing the AAPI community, I am asking you to join me in supporting AAPI non-profit organizations that are dedicated to helping our community thrive. Here are a few suggestions:** **The Asian American Foundation** provides funding and resources to build the infrastructure to improve AAPI advocacy, power, and representation. [**Donate to TAAF here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57883941/389406375/284293382?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTZmMWE1My04MDllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98OscGWgxEHZpbFodhgLao-q_-XBf9enQ7FsmUnq-u8=&emci=81e94641-959d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=ee6f1a53-809e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389) **Asian Americans Advancing Justice** works to advance the civil and human rights of Asian Americans and to build and promote a fair and equitable society for all. clean_body: | | | | Last weekend, I woke to a flurry of calls and texts after celebrating Lunar New Year with my family to learn of the mass shooting in California – where ten were killed at a Lunar New Year celebration like the one my family and I had attended. Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) communities around the nation planned festivities for Sunday and had been planning for months. Many in the community are now feeling shattered and scared. The common phrase I heard is, "I don't know how to process this." What does it mean that it happened on Lunar New Year? What does it mean that it was an elderly Asian American man who was the murderer? What do we do next to help communities feel safe? Many talked about how they grew up in Monterey Park, hung out there, or knew people there that they are now desperate to connect with and hope are safe. Then we got word of another shooting in Half Moon Bay, California. Then another in Iowa. Then Washington state. Then North Carolina. Over and over again. This violence is becoming normalized in our nation in a way we should never accept. I'm sad, angry, and grieving for the friends and family who lost someone. I cannot imagine how the communities suffering are coping after these mass shootings. Whether it is an AAPI community or any community, we stand in solidarity with them and will refuse to accept this violence as normal. Second, if you want to address the continued challenges facing the AAPI community, I am asking you to join me in supporting AAPI non-profit organizations that are dedicated to helping our community thrive. Here are a few suggestions: The Asian American Foundation provides funding and resources to build the infrastructure to improve AAPI advocacy, power, and representation. Asian Americans Advancing Justice works to advance the civil and human rights of Asian Americans and to build and promote a fair and equitable society for all. The National Council for Asian Pacific Americans serves to represent the interests of the greater Asian American (AA) and Native Hawaiian Pacific Islander (NHPI) communities and to provide a national voice for AA and NHPI issues. Finally, gun violence affects all of us. Here are some organizations working on efforts to keep our communities safe. Moms Demand Action is a grassroots organization started by a mother after the deadly Sandy Hook school shooting, fighting for public safety measures to end gun violence. = Giffords, an organization founded by a former Congresswoman and victim of gun violence, is committed to ending gun violence by working to elect gun safety champions. = Everytown is a gun violence prevention movement of Americans working to introduce evidence-based solutions in every town in America to end gun violence. = In the face of these tragedies, let us not lose hope. Let us continue to uplift each other. Andy | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress. | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

| | Friend, Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the Democrats ignore the crisis taking place at our southern border. [](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=d448e70d33cc48d9a10b31e1a2023b63&_e=H_wz1M6D7lwuc3HyIuxBdsjUYozRQeXyzS8YZfUGWUFt_ZakdHFFYHYsCqCXqhopiBAeSgJLVx_JT7yYj-9oyG1cjIS5G1JGMQgK5dvtwlFp5cswso4pfrQ8mfOnLM7aQqDMYsWsdnQCVjDN7KJYpK30y1RUHMXyBdqRqOyS4TE_flOvPJ0CfkYst9l2HL4T15ROLlQ8_h3iBgCqymMuuZbC4TIcfMLNh9V1E4jkasDEoHTxy7wFCZxVcnl7GSdcyGnKCq9afbXp4_RlWPUbebuY_k-rutC9vtGzgWmD38dcbN5_mRm-1NheyqZCmjOCvXRpi1wvhGOi42M9ob1Kn8lIOyu7d0FZ4xQtTfy4DFJ-UwNGzoofn5rZ6qWSFuPqibQ5SGHfIJ3jppHEbCcedQ%3D%3D)

For _year_ s, conservatives warned about the dangers of leaving our border wide open – to drug cartels, to human smugglers, and to those looking to harm our nation. _[**_SECURE THE BORDER >>_**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=d448e70d33cc48d9a10b31e1a2023b63&_e=H_wz1M6D7lwuc3HyIuxBdsjUYozRQeXyzS8YZfUGWUFt_ZakdHFFYHYsCqCXqhopiBAeSgJLVx_JT7yYj-9oyG1cjIS5G1JGMQgK5dvtwlFp5cswso4pfrQ8mfOnLM7aQqDMYsWsdnQCVjDN7KJYpK30y1RUHMXyBdqRqOyS4TE_flOvPJ0CfkYst9l2HL4T15ROLlQ8_h3iBgCqymMuuZbC4TIcfMLNh9V1E4jkasDEoHTxy7wFCZxVcnl7GSdcSjitJnAkA2OMeHRTeT7_Ay38W9gleYRx1_Ls4RMyaUlFPuCSD_fJaruodiqnp9sfLsoHFkw7Ne1FpNBzxv-M7pXicpmu7_kIsC1ZKzEGanmwaxsxwiqYMf81MsX99jXZBX9-OsbpubG4xyxB2ll05A%3D%3D)_ **_Now, we’re dealing with LITERAL terrorists sneaking into the United States!_**

[**PROTECT OUR NATIONAL SECURITY**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=d448e70d33cc48d9a10b31e1a2023b63&_e=H_wz1M6D7lwuc3HyIuxBdsjUYozRQeXyzS8YZfUGWUFt_ZakdHFFYHYsCqCXqhopiBAeSgJLVx_JT7yYj-9oyG1cjIS5G1JGMQgK5dvtwlFp5cswso4pfrQ8mfOnLM7aQqDMYsWsdnQCVjDN7KJYpK30y1RUHMXyBdqRqOyS4TE_flOvPJ0CfkYst9l2HL4T15ROLlQ8_h3iBgCqymMuuZbC4TIcfMLNh9V1E4jkasDEoHTxy7wFCZxVcnl7GSdciJEf8qAf__29TAhO6AIx6p0oog1Bc4sLifFVO_SgINzXBsW4xBYpQrCFetJr21u4zlM8pxzxofl1BjLJnsrsbyaR56PVVMi6IJ84jr2rcCfA-eXT8iWjzEkmnv8RCT6BcBfjvJ-IDK5dMkMEyjdEwg%3D%3D)

clean_body: The Biden Administration sent the wrong message to the world – and now Americans are suffering because of it.| | | | Friend, Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the Democrats ignore the crisis taking place at our southern border. They believe if they , it’ll cease to exist. But we both know that’s NOT how these things work. In fact, the crisis has gotten much, much worse since they turned a blind eye to illegal immigration. For year s, conservatives warned about the dangers of leaving our border wide open – to drug cartels, to human smugglers, and to those looking to harm our nation. Now, we’re dealing with LITERAL terrorists sneaking into the United States! | | Friend, the Biden Administration has sent the wrong message to the world: that our lax national security measures can be taken advantage of. It’s time to address our border crisis, provide Border Patrol agents with the resources they desperately need, finish building the wall, and FINALLY SECURE OUR BORDER! Thank you, Darin LaHood Congressman, IL-16 | | | | Paid for by LaHood for Congress | | P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Team Fetterman
subject: We're wayyyy behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John's hard at work in the Senate to fight for PA.
#
Here's the deal, Derek:
Our January end-of-month fundraising deadline is just a few short days away.
John's just getting started working in the Senate to fight for PA. But we've got to be ready for what's ahead. GOP super PACs spent billion$ in 2022, and their power is growing. 🤢
**So we're setting a goal: $100K by the end of the month to be ready for whatever comes our way.**
We're wayyyyy behind where we were in 2022. It's no surprise -- we knew that fundraising would slow down after the big election, **[but we need your help to be able to continue powering this movement for the rest of John's freshman term.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230127-1?refcode=em20230127-1-8224&refcode2=8224_434096_WxTF0l&akid=8224%2E434096%2EWxTF0l)**
**[So what do you say, will you chip in?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230127-1?refcode=em20230127-1-8224&refcode2=8224_434096_WxTF0l&akid=8224%2E434096%2EWxTF0l)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230127-1?refcode=em20230127-8224&refcode2=8224_434096_WxTF0l&akid=8224%2E434096%2EWxTF0l)**
We're so glad you're on this team -- together, we'll hit this $100,000 goal and keep John fighting for PA + all of us in the Senate.
Together,
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230127-8224-footer&t=1&refcode2=8224_434096_WxTF0l&akid=8224%2E434096%2EWxTF0l)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Special Election Day in Allegheny County Feb. 7th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Good afternoon, friends, advocates and voters.
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
There’s three special elections taking place on Tuesday, February 7 in three Allegheny County districts, representing more than 200,000 Pennsylvanians. If you live in one of the three House districts including; HD32 (formerly represented by Anthony DeLuca, deceased), HD34 (formerly represented by Congresswoman Summer Lee) and HD35 (formerly represented by Lt. Governor Austin Davis) we encourage you to cast your vote on Election Day or before with a vote by mail ballot.
Control of the House and who has the constitutional authority to the Speaker’s gavel will be determined by the three special elections in parts of Allegheny. To find out if you live in the 32nd, 34th or 35th district, or to check your registration status click here [http://vote.pa.gov/status] .
New Pennsylvania Project's Tweet: #VotePA #VotersDecide. Shared picture of the PA Department of State Tweet: Special elections will be held in parts of Allegheny County of Feb. 7, 2023, for the following state House legislative districts: 32nd, 34th, 35th. Find your voting district and your polling place: vote.pa.gov/status [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Image%20%288%29.jpeg]
Whats Happening In Harrisburg
Speaker Mark Rozzi adjourned the PA State House until February 27, 2023 and started a listening tour [https://www.penncapital-star.com/government-politics/looking-to-solve-a-harrisburg-problem-pa-house-speaker-rozzi-turns-to-pittsburgh-for-advice/] with his workgroup to move Pennsylvania forward [https://www.penncapital-star.com/civil-rights-social-justice/rozzi-to-appoint-working-group-on-legal-relief-for-abuse-survivors-after-special-session-stalls/?eType=EmailBlastContent&eId=44444444-4444-4444-4444-444444444444] to get in-put from Pennsylvanians about how they would like to see their government function.
With the adjournment of the house, SB1 will not see movement until after the special elections.
Read more here [https://www.penncapital-star.com/government-politics/looking-to-break-a-logjam-in-hbg-pa-house-speaker-takes-show-on-the-road-monday-morning-coffee/] .
News You Can Use
Read Pa. Gov. Josh Shapiro’s inauguration speech [https://www.pennlive.com/politics/2023/01/read-pa-gov-josh-shapiros-inauguration-speech.html] (PennLive)
Hand Recount of 2020 Election Results in Lycoming [https://www.nytimes.com/2023/01/15/us/politics/2020-recount-lycoming-county.html] (NY Times)
Commonwealth Court Sets House Special Election Dates For Feb. 7 [https://www.politicspa.com/commonwealth-court-sets-house-special-election-dates-for-feb-7/117386/] (PoliticsPA)
“Tuesday, February 7 will be Super Tuesday in Allegheny County.
The Pennsylvania Commonwealth Court ruled [https://www.pacourts.us/Storage/media/pdfs/20230113/183545-jan.13,2022-preliminaryobjectionssustained.pdf] that the state House special elections in the 34th and 35th Districts will be held on that date, alongside the 32nd District election that was already agreed upon.”
2. Commonwealth Court Sets Special Election Dates for Feb 7: Tuesday, February 7 will be Super Tuesday in Allegheny County. The Pennsylvania Commonwealth Court ruled that the state Housespecial elections in the 34th and 35th Districts will be held on that date, alongside the 32nd District election that was already agreed upon. (PoliticsPA) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/image0%20%281%29_2.jpeg]
NPP In The News
50 Years after Roe v. Wade, State Courts Are the Last Line of Defense for Abortion in Pennsylvania [https://buckscountybeacon.com/2023/01/50-years-after-roe-v-wade-state-courts-last-line-of-defense-for-abortion-in-pennsylvania/] (Bucks County Beacon)
“The sad reality is that regular Pennsylvanians can no longer depend on the federal judiciary to protect them. Instead, we must turn to our own state courts, now transformed into the last line of defense for abortion access and all sorts of other fundamental rights and freedoms, including our freedom to vote. But if we really want our courts to do their job in protecting us, we must be willing to stand up to defend our courts. And the best way to do that right now is to make our voices heard in the Commonwealth’s judicial elections in November.”
Continue MLK’s Work To ‘Make Real The Promises Of Democracy’ By Fighting For Voting Rights In Pennsylvania [https://buckscountybeacon.com/2023/01/continue-mlks-work-to-make-real-the-promises-of-democracy-by-fighting-for-voting-rights-in-pennsylvania/] (Bucks County Beacon)
New Pennsylvania Project CEO Kadida Kenner's keynote address on voting rights at the 34th Annual Dr. King Commemorative event Sunday in Media, PA.
Picture of NPP's CEO, Kadida Kenner, holding a customized cover picture bearing her name and headshot standing next to a poster board of Bayard Rustin, Civil & Gay Rights Advocate at the MLK Day event in Media, PA [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/image2.jpeg]
Volunteer with NPP

clean_body: [] Good afternoon, friends, advocates and voters. We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well. There’s three special elections taking place on Tuesday, February 7 in three Allegheny County districts, representing more than 200,000 Pennsylvanians. If you live in one of the three House districts including; HD32 (formerly represented by Anthony DeLuca, deceased), HD34 (formerly represented by Congresswoman Summer Lee) and HD35 (formerly represented by Lt. Governor Austin Davis) we encourage you to cast your vote on Election Day or before with a vote by mail ballot. Control of the House and who has the constitutional authority to the Speaker’s gavel will be determined by the three special elections in parts of Allegheny. To find out if you live in the 32nd, 34th or 35th district, or to check your registration status click here [] . New Pennsylvania Project's Tweet: #VotePA #VotersDecide. Shared picture of the PA Department of State Tweet: Special elections will be held in parts of Allegheny County of Feb. 7, 2023, for the following state House legislative districts: 32nd, 34th, 35th. Find your voting district and your polling place: vote.pa.gov/status [] Whats Happening In Harrisburg Speaker Mark Rozzi adjourned the PA State House until February 27, 2023 and started a listening tour [] with his workgroup to move Pennsylvania forward [] to get in-put from Pennsylvanians about how they would like to see their government function. With the adjournment of the house, SB1 will not see movement until after the special elections. Read more here [] . News You Can Use Read Pa. Gov. Josh Shapiro’s inauguration speech [] (PennLive) Hand Recount of 2020 Election Results in Lycoming [] (NY Times) Commonwealth Court Sets House Special Election Dates For Feb. 7 [] (PoliticsPA) “Tuesday, February 7 will be Super Tuesday in Allegheny County. The Pennsylvania Commonwealth Court ruled [] that the state House special elections in the 34th and 35th Districts will be held on that date, alongside the 32nd District election that was already agreed upon.” 2. Commonwealth Court Sets Special Election Dates for Feb 7: Tuesday, February 7 will be Super Tuesday in Allegheny County. The Pennsylvania Commonwealth Court ruled that the state Housespecial elections in the 34th and 35th Districts will be held on that date, alongside the 32nd District election that was already agreed upon. (PoliticsPA) [] NPP In The News 50 Years after Roe v. Wade, State Courts Are the Last Line of Defense for Abortion in Pennsylvania [] (Bucks County Beacon) “The sad reality is that regular Pennsylvanians can no longer depend on the federal judiciary to protect them. Instead, we must turn to our own state courts, now transformed into the last line of defense for abortion access and all sorts of other fundamental rights and freedoms, including our freedom to vote. But if we really want our courts to do their job in protecting us, we must be willing to stand up to defend our courts. And the best way to do that right now is to make our voices heard in the Commonwealth’s judicial elections in November.” Continue MLK’s Work To ‘Make Real The Promises Of Democracy’ By Fighting For Voting Rights In Pennsylvania [] (Bucks County Beacon) New Pennsylvania Project CEO Kadida Kenner's keynote address on voting rights at the 34th Annual Dr. King Commemorative event Sunday in Media, PA. Peter, over the course of **44 hours, three mass shootings in California claimed the lives of 19 people. **

The first tragedy was in Monterey Park, where a celebration of the Lunar New Year in the heart of the city’s Asian American community ended in 11 lives lost. The next was in a rural seaside town in northern California, where seven immigrant laborers were killed. And the third tragedy in less than 48 hours was in Oakland, where one person was killed and seven others were wounded during the filming of a music video.

**Our nation’s bloody history of gun violence has proven time and time again that assault weapons are the weapon of choice for mass shooters – and yet we are _still_ fighting tooth and nail against the gun lobby and its favorite politicians to get these military-style weapons of war off the streets of America. **
**Peter, I refuse to back down from this fight, but I’m counting on fearless fighters like _you_**** __ to stand with me. That’s why I urgently need at least 10,000 supporters to recommit themselves to our fight against gun violence.**

So please, before this poll closes at midnight, will you respond to join the fight against gun violence and call on Congress to take action?
| | **Should Congress ban military-style assault weapons?**

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Retaking the majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi there,

In their first month in the majority, House Republicans have shown us exactly how they plan to govern the House.

After a protracted and embarrassing Speaker election, they’ve passed legislation that offers tax breaks to their rich friends and donors and attacks reproductive freedom nationwide.

Instead of addressing inflation, cutting costs, or creating jobs, they’re putting their energy into baseless political “investigations”.

You and I both know that people are sick and tired of negativity in politics... They want leaders who focus on governing, not scoring petty political points. That’s what I’m dedicated to doing every day. As our new Leader, Hakeem Jeffries put it, I’m in Congress to champion normalcy instead of negativity, democracy instead of demagogues, and economic opportunity instead of political extremism. That’s what I want to see Congress get back to.

That’s why it’s critically important to retake the House majority in 2024, so we can get back to delivering for the American people.

**We’re up against our first big test of 2023: The end-of-month fundraising deadline on Tuesday.** We need to raise another $14,000 by the end of January to stay on track with our goals, and I’m asking you to step up.

**[Can you contribute $20 or any amount before the end of the month so we can hit our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57892618/389414267/-1716626802?amount=20&contactdata=ctyPgGytVxnoOhxoXIpSkKRUxEwHmQs0tst0wv9Pw8raKBQUzqu11u/gk5RQX/06OD+1WwsCc47IdyWnT4bnZEWU6aKx0K6K3YRI81aznpMv9QHuk5A4hppX2sPjgBd6cuP7TELz8ZjtyrxVcE9trg==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230127_FR_1.1_0_6MO_candidate_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2I2ZDZkYi04NzllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EuSu6qoAkJ8W6aLVDS0tMHHLF-V_fWEiBGuSzCHOgUA=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: | Hi there, In their first month in the majority, House Republicans have shown us exactly how they plan to govern the House. After a protracted and embarrassing Speaker election, they’ve passed legislation that offers tax breaks to their rich friends and donors and attacks reproductive freedom nationwide. Instead of addressing inflation, cutting costs, or creating jobs, they’re putting their energy into baseless political “investigations”. You and I both know that people are sick and tired of negativity in politics... They want leaders who focus on governing, not scoring petty political points. That’s what I’m dedicated to doing every day. As our new Leader, Hakeem Jeffries put it, I’m in Congress to champion normalcy instead of negativity, democracy instead of demagogues, and economic opportunity instead of political extremism. That’s what I want to see Congress get back to. That’s why it’s critically important to retake the House majority in 2024, so we can get back to delivering for the American people. We’re up against our first big test of 2023: The end-of-month fundraising deadline on Tuesday. We need to raise another $14,000 by the end of January to stay on track with our goals, and I’m asking you to step up. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = We know that seats like mine will be targeted in 2024 and our race will be just as difficult as it was in the midterms. But if we can protect swing seats like mine and flip just a handful of seats, we will retake control of the House so we can get back to work. = Thank you so much, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. Our democracy is under assault by an extreme and power-hungry GOP whose leadership doesn’t care about truth, decency, or right and wrong. And they must be stopped. We did far better than expected against these radical Republicans in the midterms, but we are not out of the woods. Donald Trump is still the dominant voice in his party, and he has spawned a dangerous crowd of imitators.

_This is the fight of my life_ — to protect our democracy, build it back stronger, and hold those who would tear it down accountable.

And at a time when our economy simply isn’t working for millions of Americans, who see their wages fail to keep pace with the cost of food, education, and housing, and who don’t have the same opportunity to succeed as their parents, we simply can’t afford to wait and hope the economy fixes itself.

Because if hard-working folks don’t have a chance to succeed, they start looking for alternatives — like a demagogue who promises that he alone can fix it.

With our economy and our democracy at risk, we _must fight:_

For an economy that works for everyone and leaves no one behind. For universal health care. Against climate change and for a healthy planet. To stop gun violence and protect our children. To realize a bold and progressive future for the Golden State and our nation.

**With Trump on the ballot and control of the House and Senate at stake in 2024, I truly believe that the future of our country hinges on this election. That’s why I need to know that you’re ready for the fight ahead.**

Senator Feinstein hasn’t announced her plans yet. But we need to start preparing for the fights ahead right now.

Over the last six years, I’ve taken on Trump and Trumpism to protect our country. And I’d do it again. In a heartbeat.

Already, the Republicans are going after me. Trump bellows at me at his rallies. Fox News runs its constant smears, and Kevin McCarthy is promising to remove me from the Intelligence Committee. They don’t want me to continue holding them accountable, and they certainly don’t want me in the Senate.

Many of Trump’s worst enablers are in the U.S. Senate, and it’s where a lot of the critical fights for the future will take place.

When I led the Senate impeachment trial against Trump, I stood my ground, no matter what they threw at me. And I will take on anyone to protect the country I love and its proud legacy of self-government. As I run for the Senate, I need to know that you are by my side.

[Can I count on you to be a Founding Member of Team Schiff before the end of the day?
