clean_body: | = Peter— I wanted you to hear it from me first. I’m running for the U.S. Senate in 2024, to protect our democracy and to build an economy that works for everyone. Because we’re in the fight of our lives for the future of our country. If you’re with me, chip in $10 right now to be one of the Founding Members of Team Schiff. Here’s a personal link:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Our democracy is under assault by an extreme and power-hungry GOP whose leadership doesn’t care about truth, decency, or right and wrong. And they must be stopped. We did far better than expected against these radical Republicans in the midterms, but we are not out of the woods. Donald Trump is still the dominant voice in his party, and he has spawned a dangerous crowd of imitators. This is the fight of my life — to protect our democracy, build it back stronger, and hold those who would tear it down accountable. And at a time when our economy simply isn’t working for millions of Americans, who see their wages fail to keep pace with the cost of food, education, and housing, and who don’t have the same opportunity to succeed as their parents, we simply can’t afford to wait and hope the economy fixes itself. Because if hard-working folks don’t have a chance to succeed, they start looking for alternatives — like a demagogue who promises that he alone can fix it. With our economy and our democracy at risk, we must fight: For an economy that works for everyone and leaves no one behind. For universal health care. Against climate change and for a healthy planet. To stop gun violence and protect our children. To realize a bold and progressive future for the Golden State and our nation. With Trump on the ballot and control of the House and Senate at stake in 2024, I truly believe that the future of our country hinges on this election. That’s why I need to know that you’re ready for the fight ahead. Senator Feinstein hasn’t announced her plans yet. But we need to start preparing for the fights ahead right now. Over the last six years, I’ve taken on Trump and Trumpism to protect our country. And I’d do it again. In a heartbeat. Already, the Republicans are going after me. Trump bellows at me at his rallies. Fox News runs its constant smears, and Kevin McCarthy is promising to remove me from the Intelligence Committee. They don’t want me to continue holding them accountable, and they certainly don’t want me in the Senate. Many of Trump’s worst enablers are in the U.S. Senate, and it’s where a lot of the critical fights for the future will take place. When I led the Senate impeachment trial against Trump, I stood my ground, no matter what they threw at me. And I will take on anyone to protect the country I love and its proud legacy of self-government. As I run for the Senate, I need to know that you are by my side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: = = = = = I’ll keep you posted every step of the way, and I can’t thank you enough for all you’ve done for me and to protect our democracy. We must be able to defend our homeland, our allies, and our military assets around the world from the threat of hypersonic missiles, no matter where they are launched from. Just as President Trump rebuilt our military, President Trump will build a state-of-the-art next-generation missile defense shield to defend America from missile attack.

Under Joe Biden the world has become **vastly more dangerous** , and there is no greater danger than the deadly menace of **nuclear weapons and hypersonic missiles**.

World War Three would be a **catastrophe unlike any other**. The best way to ensure that such a conflict ever happens is to **be prepared with unmatched technology and unrivaled strength**.

President Trump will work with Congress and our great military leaders to **build a state-of-the-art, next generation missile defense shield** , just as Israel is now protected by the Iron Dome.

America must have an impenetrable dome to **protect our people**.

President Trump **rebuilt our military at a level that nobody thought possible** , but we must **take that further step**.

Trump January 27th, 2023 We must be able to defend our homeland, our allies, and our military assets around the world from the threat of hypersonic missiles, no matter where they are launched from. Just as President Trump rebuilt our military, President Trump will build a state-of-the-art next-generation missile defense shield to defend America from missile attack. Under Joe Biden the world has become vastly more dangerous , and there is no greater danger than the deadly menace of nuclear weapons and hypersonic missiles. World War Three would be a catastrophe unlike any other. The best way to ensure that such a conflict ever happens is to be prepared with unmatched technology and unrivaled strength. President Trump will work with Congress and our great military leaders to build a state-of-the-art, next generation missile defense shield , just as Israel is now protected by the Iron Dome. America must have an impenetrable dome to protect our people. President Trump rebuilt our military at a level that nobody thought possible , but we must take that further step. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 27th, 2023 The violent and vicious riots in Atlanta carried out by the anti-police, radical left anarchists are an abomination. Unfortunately, nothing will happen to most of these rioters because of the Marxist prosecutors who have seized control of our justice system. As always, hardworking, law-abiding citizens of all backgrounds pay the price for this George Soros-sponsored, radical left extremism. The rioters who attack our wonderful police officers and destroy so many lives must be punished to the fullest extent of the law. If Marxist prosecutors betray their oaths and refuse to protect our citizens, President Trump will send in federal law enforcement to restore peace and public safety. Washington D.C. has the worst record on crime and murder that it’s ever had, yet this bill: Reduces the penalties for carjackers. Reduces the penalties for robberies. body:
| | | **ALERT: Experts warn that Social Security could be on the Supreme Court's chopping block**

_We urgently need to know where you stand on this issue -- but we have**NO RECORD** of your answer:_

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/11641?ask=5&t=3&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230127-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230127-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9533%2E9716520%2E7zSSev)
**Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/11641?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230127-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230127-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9533%2E9716520%2E7zSSev)

| [No](http://go.dscc.org/go/11641?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230127-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230127-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9533%2E9716520%2E7zSSev)
---

Team -- By overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , the Supreme Court has proven that **_NOTHING_** is safe from the conservative justices' right-wing majority.

**In fact, experts warn that Social Security could be in danger, too.** During her confirmation hearings, Amy Coney Barrett famously REFUSED to say if Social Security was constitutional -- and if the Court strikes it down, **_65 million Americans_ will LOSE the benefits they earned.**

We can’t risk losing this _**bedrock**_ of Americans' retirement, so we’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE that the American people support upholding Social Security -- _but we’re still short 49 responses in Pennsylvania! _

**Please, answer before midnight:**
**Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/11641?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230127-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230127-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9533%2E9716520%2E7zSSev)

| [No](http://go.dscc.org/go/11641?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230127-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230127-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9533%2E9716520%2E7zSSev)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I just got fired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
In the middle of the night, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.
| Team,

It actually happened.

In the middle of the night, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.

Kevin McCarthy is obsessed with me. Why? _Because I have worked tirelessly to bring the American people the truth about the January 6th attack on our democracy._ Kevin McCarthy has a personal vendetta against us and is using his new power to attempt to silence us. But I will never back down. **That’s why we're working to fight back against these attacks.[_Can you split a donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project today so we can continue telling the truth about McCarthy’s corrupt, anti-democracy party?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39239?t=6&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK)** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39239?t=7&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK)
---
McCarthy wants to replace my colleagues and me with Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, and George Santos. _A triple threat trio of bigotry, violence, and corruption._ I mean, what could go wrong with these three on the House’s most influential committees?

[Let’s show McCarthy we won’t give in to his bullying tactics like his Republican colleagues. If you’re with me, can you rush a contribution to be split between Voter Protection Project and me?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39239?t=8&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Eric Swalwell and VPP will go through immediately:
[$10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39240?t=9&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK) | [$25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39241?t=10&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK)
---|---
[$50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39242?t=11&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK) | [$100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39243?t=12&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK)
[$250 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39244?t=13&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK) | [Custom »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39249?t=14&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK)
Thanks for standing by me,

Eric
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6177%2E878179%2E3dpOqK)

body:
It’s time to hold this administration accountable
| [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=2583a130a62f4075b5fa05e2e0925511&_e=XtnPn-frApRfVv-EjNUEcd1NE6igxVM9Tmv8fj1G2TAfGkSEC27yfSPyETSi_115Qsr73nyjMx8u9n78ndQ3--w4LBFEYsDKXIlTnreh3X-O6xP1gROKoJTwZhWfmmXGw4b2VobGizABvS8OGWPda1P89yBvh-DhoJVSLeKVfzSGMafts92ehkiNt_u61Kn-rIbqOZ0GCt19F0VQf8xcPLffS-RIrKkCV3PnMqkBzT-s2g8jEqfO5GFXDIarhl-NM_KORfOp2QjZggZ43neEvOpsrnbYy08MkNW9TjPBwHafy_Oq6rvutJ8VUmlTJmkSaOu6D5g09c1_Df8rdLetU8zQHtFe0oiCV5n3IZ2dShg%3D)

name: Ryan Chamberlin Campaign
subject: VIDEO: CONGRESSMAN TED YOHO SAYS RYAN CHAMBERLIN IS BEST CONSERVATIVE TO STAND WITH GOV. RON DESANTIS!
body:
| | |
---

My fellow conservatives,

This week was an exciting for our campaign as we rolled out more endorsements including Congressman Ted Yoho who spoke at our fundraising event on Tuesday night. You can catch his statement in a short campaign [video here](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=fzy0aa0PDQve0iI&b=8FZPad7GLWRjx7L2.83bgQ):

[](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=fzy0aa0PDQve0iI&b=8FZPad7GLWRjx7L2.83bgQ)

Share:
[ ](http://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https://archive.aweber.com/awlist6407924/5QmvQ) [ ](http://www.twitter.com/share?url=https://archive.aweber.com/awlist6407924/5QmvQ)

We also rolled out other endorsements including several key medical doctors and personnel and former County Commissioner Parnell Townley. This all means one thing. We are winning.

But I need your help. The Tallahassee establishment is already pushing back, and I have been warned that attacks are coming. In fact, this week, they began the hit pieces on me saying that I am too conservative to serve in the legislature. Now think about that, who would be concerned about me being too conservative? The woke left, special interests, insiders, and liberal Republicans, that’s who.

Out of all of those folks, the ones that frustrate me the most are liberal Republicans. They tell us one thing on the campaign trail and then run off and act just like Nancy Pelosi when they get elected. We don’t need another one of those serving in the legislature, and that’s one of the big reasons why I’m running.

I am glad Congressman Ted Yoho agrees, and with your help, we can keep this seat in conservative hands.

But I need your help. The special interests are funding these attacks, and we need the messaging ammo to compete and win. Please consider a donation of any amount which you can give easily at this link on our campaign website: [**CLICK HERE**](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=fzy0aa0PDQve0iI&b=JjgMz0.y6zADsiJMQB2m9Q)

Thank you again for all of your support.

Sincerely,

Ryan

12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd
Belleview FL 34420
USA

name: Cori Bush
subject: It's time to lead with love.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
#
Hi Peter,
I'm so glad to have you in this movement.
**Let me start by introducing myself:** I'm a nurse, activist, organizer, pastor, single mother, and proud representative of St. Louis in Congress. I'm working to build a people-powered movement in Congress so we can enact the transformative policies our communities need.
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230127-2.SNsfht&refcode=em20230127-2081&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2081%2E1082990%2Ei3v_nx)
I ran for Congress because I understand firsthand the urgent challenges our communities face.
When you've lived out of a car with your babies, _you know that affordable housing isn't just a nice idea, it's a necessity._
When you've seen your neighbors lose their lives to police violence, you know that defunding the police and investing in our communities isn't just a catchphrase, _but an urgent call to save Black lives._
When you've been forced to decide between affording groceries and utilities, _you know that the "handouts" Republicans keep attacking are life-saving policies for our families that our own tax dollars have funded._
These are the struggles that so many of us have lived. These struggles are why I'm working every day in Congress to create a new kind of politics rooted in love and compassion.
But the challenges we face right now in Congress — from the Jim Crow filibuster, to the dark money funding too many of our elected officials' campaigns — have made it clear that **it's going to take a widespread, grassroots effort to bring these transformative policies to life.**
[**If you're with me in this movement, will you chip in $5 or anything you can so we can continue growing our progressive movement and pass the change our communities need?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230127-2.SNsfht&refcode=em20230127-2081&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2081%2E1082990%2Ei3v_nx)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230127-2.SNsfht&refcode=em20230127-2081&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2081%2E1082990%2Ei3v_nx)**
When you love all of humanity, you care that everyone is housed. You care that everyone is fed. You care that everyone is safe. You care that everyone has health care. You care that everyone has an education.
**This is what I'm striving for.** It seems like common sense — but dark money, white supremacy, disinformation, and our broken political system have made this vision, a divisive one.
**The challenges we face are immense. But I know that when we work together, we have the power to move mountains.**
Even just in our first term in Congress, we've pushed the needle on issues like environmental justice, transforming public safety, housing for all, and health care — **all because of folks like you, Peter.**
You are part of a larger people-powered movement that's gaining momentum and transforming the way we do politics. Together, we are making progress and demanding the change we deserve.
That's why today I'm asking for a favor: I'm ready to keep working for policies that lift ALL of us up, but I can't do this alone. I need your support as we organize and legislate in Congress for an agenda that puts people first. [**If you can afford it, will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help us continue doing this work?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230127-2.SNsfht&refcode=em20230127-2081&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2081%2E1082990%2Ei3v_nx)
Thank you for all of your support.
Your Congresswoman loves you,
Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230127-2?refcode=em20230127-2081-footer&t=24&refcode2=2081_1082990_i3v_nx&akid=2081%2E1082990%2Ei3v_nx) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=25&akid=2081%2E1082990%2Ei3v_nx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2081%2E1082990%2Ei3v_nx)

When you've seen your neighbors lose their lives to police violence, you know that defunding the police and investing in our communities isn't just a catchphrase, but an urgent call to save Black lives. When you've been forced to decide between affording groceries and utilities, you know that the "handouts" Republicans keep attacking are life-saving policies for our families that our own tax dollars have funded. These are the struggles that so many of us have lived. These struggles are why I'm working every day in Congress to create a new kind of politics rooted in love and compassion. But the challenges we face right now in Congress — from the Jim Crow filibuster, to the dark money funding too many of our elected officials' campaigns — have made it clear that it's going to take a widespread, grassroots effort to bring these transformative policies to life. When you love all of humanity, you care that everyone is housed. You care that everyone is fed. You care that everyone is safe. You care that everyone has health care. You care that everyone has an education. This is what I'm striving for. It seems like common sense — but dark money, white supremacy, disinformation, and our broken political system have made this vision, a divisive one. The challenges we face are immense. But I know that when we work together, we have the power to move mountains. Even just in our first term in Congress, we've pushed the needle on issues like environmental justice, transforming public safety, housing for all, and health care — all because of folks like you, Peter. You are part of a larger people-powered movement that's gaining momentum and transforming the way we do politics. Together, we are making progress and demanding the change we deserve. That's why today I'm asking for a favor: I'm ready to keep working for policies that lift ALL of us up, but I can't do this alone. I need your support as we organize and legislate in Congress for an agenda that puts people first. Thank you for all of your support. Your Congresswoman loves you, Cori Follow us on , , , and . This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121. Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress *

body:
No BS, just a quick explanation of our end of month goal.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16664%2E3422442%2EIbF4PX)
We’ve set a goal of raising $150,000 before the end of the month. Here’s why:
* The other candidate in this race jumped in with **_three times_ the cash on hand** we had when we launched. It’s a significant advantage and now we need to catch up.
* Running a campaign in the most populous state with some of the country’s most expensive media markets simply takes a lot of resources. Meeting this goal will help us stay on track and plan for the tough race ahead.
* There’s a saying in politics. **“Early money is like yeast, it helps the dough rise.”** By investing in our campaign early on, you can help us cement Katie as the frontrunner, and reporting a strong number can even deter super PACs from attacking us.

name: Young Kim (R-CA)
subject: The American Dream is about to collapse.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Protecting the American Dream will take everything we have to survive
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259539:6wDypHGNW:m:1:3367311000:BADEC9B6D50DE57B05E570B66DC1E989:r)

Peter,
I am living the American Dream.
As a young girl, I moved to this country from South Korea and had to start life from scratch. I had to learn a new language, make new friends, and adopt a new way of life.
It was not easy. In fact, it was one of the most challenging experiences of my life.
But now, because of the freedom and opportunity here in America, I can confidently tell you this was **THE BEST THING** to happen in my life. The American Dream is real.
And now, I have dedicated my life to **PROTECTING** that American Dream. But it's getting much harder.
The Far Left has put everything my family strived to reach in danger for those seeking to build a better life right here. I have witnessed what the Corrupt Left is up to in Washington, DC, and I am mortified. And frankly, you should be too.
Freedom has never been free, and neither will defending it from the Radical Left. [**It will take everything and more to protect our God-given freedoms from the Socialist Left 's agenda. And it starts with DEFENDING THIS SEAT.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259540:6wDypHGNW:m:1:3367311000:BADEC9B6D50DE57B05E570B66DC1E989:r)
Peter, there's only one way we will **WIN** and **SAVE AMERICA** from destruction, and that is putting this seat on the map for **EVERY CONSERVATIVE** to get out and vote.
That will never be accomplished without your help.
[**Peter, all I 'm asking for is a little bit of help. If I can count on you and 576 others by midnight, I will reach my goal needed to put this race in the bag and carry the American Dream to safety.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259540:6wDypHGNW:m:1:3367311000:BADEC9B6D50DE57B05E570B66DC1E989:r)
Can you step up and help your country?
For the American Dream,
Young Kim

__
* * *
__
_We 'll get straight to the point, Peter: _
__
_We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats._
__
__YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she 's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations.__
__
_[_**So, we 're humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you.**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259541:6wDypHGNW:m:1:3367311000:BADEC9B6D50DE57B05E570B66DC1E989:r)_
__ [**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259541:6wDypHGNW:m:1:3367311000:BADEC9B6D50DE57B05E570B66DC1E989:r)
---

__
_Also, don 't miss a message from Young! To receive texts from Young Kim and our team,**text YOUNG to 67074.**_
__ Paid for by Young Kim for Congress

Anaheim, CA 92817

name: Hillsdale College via Free Thinker Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9UMFunTAQ_Bq4gew1YDhwSENSVcnL4alJ1V6ejL2AFQOWMan4-xpKIlmWdmZ2PB6sacGzMi8rymJVZyBoJ2NdAwFGKHAARglLoeDAeKt4UfGcCBplBEehTdo5RD_o6R2dCvOWynmMh7osaJWTIuNAsrKrWiho3jEmWSlFiahiUw_e2yVidxE8hmNsOmhjFiUMpqjWAKFB6WcnTCJnY7DHZFndB277Antc_Xhb5tVJjFhj3bzYoNZTH0GxUyMqvY6BOmKeoBSjFbqfdvjT_Haa3z7N_yvnyePkg_ChuSSqTb7CJTgS2iaE0CBdZFBcniogD5fyXLVra_QyoAtU51VAb5PRKkw_m-td9XJ9-vNygINW4f_NFZ9_CPv7OXa1sn_DM3opeOi3P_rd6wypje62OuLfIoBjDeBoDlbP3sTr68VtyQf9lXzP36DfSbgPt98sfilPk_TsAyLe_AOwmaD8) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9UMFOhDAU_Bq4QdpXlsKBg7qrMe4mxsQ1etkU-oBqgaYUDX9vQdakafJm5k2ngwVNeZLtspyyUBYJCFpXoSqAACMUOACjhMWQcmC8lDzN-Y4IGiQEO6F0XFtE16r-C6308xxXQxe2BSsTgTXmNSec5KTOocxIlrAdybiQIg910TpnxoDdBHDvjzZxq7QepdAYo5w8hBorN1iho2rQGhuMxsl-47wssPvJdZdxmGyFAdsbO4zGq1XfBJAuVIdSTZ2n1pgbWInOCNX0C3w1v2zml6v5n3LoHfbOCw_7UyTL6D9chB2hZUQI9dKx8orTUw7kcMq2VTOVWo0tWk_VTnr00msl_XT-qJK3z682eV7BVkn___0LHh-FeT-GtpDmxz-jxpT7fpu136VOn1qrei4CfhsArGsAa3MwOXYWr68nO0ff9C162J2hWUi487ebDf4rN5N46wMCvv8FkLqhwg) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9UEtvnDAQ_jVwA9ljFsOBQ9rdVFWyl0pJ1L2sjD2AVfOQMVvx7ztQEsmyNN_L4w8rnsusOBUlF7GpMlC80bGtgIFgHCSA4EykkEsQsjYyL-WJKR5lDHtlXdp4xNDZ4Q96Q_Oa6rGPO8pptOaSTDk3WcGyPM8QTckENGVRn2JXdSFMcySeInim46a0s87NRjlM0SwEoUMdRq9cokfnsMVkXvwD180gnpfQ3-dx8RojcZ78OE-ktkMbQb5RPRq79ETtax6gVv2kbDts8Gf4_Qi_f4b_V45DwCGQ8HK-JqZOvpZLsGe8ThjjJJ01Ka4vJbDLtTis01I7O3foiWqCIfQ-OGtour18PKBdb5fbDnbW0P_Pv_D1p5p-v8a-MtNfesbOuaR-273frU7a2tlmrSL5LQLYbQB7c7AE8a7e3q5-TR78I_lxeod2I-E73WGd8Et5hKRHHxDJ8z8AbaF-) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

108 S Washington St. Suite 300 Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I wanted you to hear it from me first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| I’ve got some bad news:

In the dead of night, Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party did what they’ve threatened for the last two years.

**They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.**

This is political retribution for my leading the impeachment of Donald Trump, pure and simple, and a dangerous effort to go after anyone who holds them accountable. It also turns the Intelligence Committee into a political plaything for their right-wing supporters.

Peter, I really need you with me to help respond to this baseless attack on my ability to serve my constituents and the American people.

[**Please, contribute $10 or whatever you can spare today to our campaign and Mark Takano to help me respond to Republicans’ baseless attacks on my ability to hold them accountable. This isn’t the end of my fight for truth, accountability, and our democracy. name: INDEMS
subject: Kernel of Truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. **Opportunities with INDems**
### **Regional Organizing Directors**
The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. **For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at[https://www.indems.org/jobs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57896576/389421776/1076440731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWE4ZjNhNy05MzllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Se6PotiIhKVe6kKBCCYhCv3rcytn2PKKgqHt4VjLUu0=&emci=98321c79-699e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=7aa8f3a7-939e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**
### **Executive Director**
The Indiana Democratic Party (IDP) is seeking an Executive Director (ED) to lead our team. In partnership with the Chair and State Central Committee, the ED is responsible for deploying the strategy, overall management, and growth of IDP. The ED will be involved in all aspects of the Party’s operations, including but not limited to: election activities, voter protection, fundraising, budgeting, staff recruitment and retention, outreach, and building party infrastructure. General Duties:
* Responsible for overall operational efficiency of IDP, including staff and creation and execution of Party strategy.
* Recruits, interviews, hires, and manages IDP and coordinated campaign staff.
* Manages day-to-day work of Communications, Data & Organizing, Operations, and Finance teams.
* Oversees the day-to-day work of outside consultants and vendors.
* Serves as one of the spokespeople for IDP to the media.
* Other responsibilities as required.

Party Affairs
* Coordinates work and materials for the Democratic State Central Committee, District leaders, County leaders, and precinct committeemen and women.
* Keeps up strong relationships with various constituencies and stakeholders around the state, including organized labor, African-American leaders, Latino leaders, LGBTQ Hoosiers, women’s groups, Indiana Young Democrats, and College Democrats.
* Maintains close working relationships with various party partner organizations including, but not limited to: DNC, ASDC, DCCC, DSCC, DGA, and DLCC.
* Builds and nurtures relationships with Democratic candidates, elected officials, Democratic caucuses, and staff members across the state.
* Supports the building, growth, and success of county parties throughout the state.
* Oversees an annual party retreat, annual fundraising dinner, biennial state conventions, and the National Delegate Selection process for the 2024 Democratic convention.

**C** ampaign & Election Activities
* Shares regular organizing, training, coaching, and other resources online and in-person for Party staff, volunteers, and party leadership.
* Works with IDP and Indiana Election Division to ensure the Party is up-to-date on the current and latest rules relating to elections and voting in Indiana.
* Troubleshoots any issues with campaigns or county parties on behalf of IDP to ensure the Party is represented well and that issues are resolved in a timely fashion.
* Oversees voter protection in-state and in partnership with DNC guidance.
* Oversees GOTV and Election Day efforts and events for IDP.

Fundraising
* Works with the State Chair to raise money for the party through call time, meetings, events, memberships, online giving, and other income generating streams.
* Partners with the finance team to create a robust apparatus for fundraising and cultivating large and small donors.
* Represents IDP at party, media, or community functions across the state.

Operations & Compliance
* Manages office and ensures campaigns and committees have productive workspaces.
* Keeps an updated and working knowledge of campaign finance, election, and compliance laws and works in concert with the compliance team and legal counsel to ensure all Party activities are consistently compliant.
* Works with the State Chair and Party CPA and Treasurer to implement the budget.

**Q** ualifications: Minimum of at least four (4) years with direct campaign experience. Executive experience working on a coordinated campaign, statewide or Congressional political campaign, or with a state political party preferred.
* Experience managing a growing, diverse, and highly skilled team, with demonstrated ability to achieve high levels of performance and outcomes through guidance and management.
* A reputation for leading with integrity and making decisions with the input of the appropriate stakeholders.
* Experience building, managing, and tracking large budgets.
* Excellent verbal, written, and analytical skills.
* Ability to manage several tasks and projects at the same time.
* Ability to prioritize and multi-task in a fast-paced environment.
* Detail oriented and good follow through on tasks.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to interact professionally with staff and external stakeholders and represent the organization with professionalism.
* Ability to maintain a high level of confidentiality.

Salary: Salary is generally competitive and commensurate with experience. Position includes full medical, dental, and vision insurance benefits, a 401(k) account, and monthly tech stipend. Application Instructions: Please email your resume and three professional references to [jobs@indems.org](mailto:jobs@indems.org) with “Executive Director” in the subject line. Thank you for your interest in working with IDP.

[content goes here]

clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Jim Banks endorses travel ban on women for reproductive healthcare – later walks it back This week, in an , Congressman Jim Banks endorsed a travel ban for Hoosier women seeking reproductive healthcare and went on to say, “I'm for federal legislation, I'm for stronger laws at the state level, whatever we can do, to save lives, to protect babies. That's what this fight is all about.” After the interview, Banks later walked back his comments stating, “I have never even heard of a travel ban until (I was accused) of that.” This is not the first time that Jim Banks has expressed his extreme views on reproductive rights and healthcare. Banks called the reversal of Roe v. Wade a “” and immediately started eyeing a possible . Fact is: Jim Banks and the INGOP – who made Indiana the first state in the nation to pass a near-total abortion ban in special session – simply do not respect the personal choices or lives of Hoosier women. We can’t let Jim Banks anywhere near the U.S. Senate. That begins by electing Democrats up-and-down the ballot in 2023 and 2024 to give Indiana some common sense leadership. **Instead of focusing on Indiana’s most pressing issues, the INGOP are focused on. Hoosiers deserve elected leaders that focus on common sense issues: more accessible healthcare, affordable housing, education funding, and ending brain drain. The INGOP would rather focus on divisive culture wars and put their special interests ahead of Indiana’s future. **Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. The Indiana Black Legislative Caucus presented their vital goals for the 2023 session: closing the achievement gap between Black and white students. This effort in Indiana will require a comprehensive approach that addresses the underlying socio-economic factors that contribute to racial inequities, as well as providing targeted support and resources to students from under-resourced communities. Here are a few of the bills that the IBLC is supporting: 📖: automatically enrolls students in the 21 Century Scholars program 🏠: ends discrimination on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, disability, familial status, or national origin in housing appraisals 🏥: establishes scholarships for minority students in pursuing healthcare-related careers 🍎: provide universal free school lunches to students across Indiana._ See Yourself Running: Realities of Running as a Black Candidate Now, more than ever, young people who care about their communities need to run for office. By serving your neighbors as an elected official you can help ensure they have the tools they need to build a good life: quality education, access to affordable healthcare, and a fair shake when it comes to jobs and training. If you’re 40 or under, and want to make your community stronger, wants to help by getting you elected to state or local office. They’ll help you figure it out from start to finish. Run for Something will be hosting a panel with Black RFS alumni from across the country to discuss how they ran for office and the advice they have for future progressive Democrats who want to run. The virtual event takes place on Wednesday, February 1st at 8pm ET. ** INDems IN the News : Banks went from study to firebrand : Indiana behind nation in policy efforts to prevent, reduce tobacco use : Indiana's Black lawmakers focus on students of color after COVID puts them further behind : Black legislative caucus wants to close achievement gap : Indiana House approves ballot question on maintaining township assessors : Indiana lawmakers roll back school choice bill, advance student literacy initiatives : Senate Republicans get front seat to brewing Indiana Senate clash : Indiana lawmakers file more abortion legislation amid court challenges : Service members at odds over National Guard court-martial bill : Training teachers how to shoot multiple targets: 20 gun bills Indiana lawmakers want : New Secretary of State seeks to change absentee voting : Op/Ed: School vouchers are an impediment to student learning not a panacea for education : Indiana GOP introduces slate of anti-LGBTQ+ bills including two Don't Say Gay bills : Hoosier US Senate candidate backs reducing abortion options in other states : Indiana marijuana reform: These are the bills to follow in 2023 : State lawmakers weigh appointed vs. elected school board for Gary : Jim Banks explains decision to run for Senate in 2024 : GOP lawmakers in Indiana hope to address high health care costs : Indiana lawmakers weigh bill to create universal school choice program : Indiana counties say they need more road funding. name: Crow HQ
subject: We’ll make it quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---

Peter:

In their final race ratings of the cycle, election experts at the _Cook Political Report_ and _Sabato's Crystal Ball_ predicted Kim's seat would flip red. But thanks to the support of this grassroots team, we beat the odds, fought back against millions of dollars in attack ads, and kept Kim in Congress!

As we look ahead to 2024, we know Washington's 8th District is still a true purple district. That means that once again, it will be one of Republicans' top targets and the Washington GOP chair even said flipping this district is a main priority for them! **If we're going to beat the odds again and keep Kim in Congress, we can't waste any time getting to work building another winning campaign.**

**[Our first end-of-month deadline of the year is just a few days away, and we need to reach our goal to ensure we have the resources to win another tough race. Kim is the first Democrat ever to represent Washington's 8th District in Congress. Election after election, Kim's seat has remained one of the most competitive districts in the entire country. We know Republicans will once again look at defeating her to expand their narrow House majority.

It's only a matter of time before opponents begin jumping in this race and the attacks against Kim start. We need to start preparing now to fight back if we're going to win again in this "toss-up" district.

**[Chip in to help us reach our first end-of-month deadline of 2023, so we can build another winning campaign and protect Kim's seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57897415/389424613/463549398?refcode=em23_230127_eom1_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230127_eom1_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTk1Njg1MC05NjllLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jgq6oAHLeBOlrJltm6-3FGaUNH1ScYGJQ0L4C9duJQM=)**

Thanks,

Team Schrier

Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024.

clean_body: As we look ahead to 2024, we know Washington's 8th District is still a true purple district. Peter: In their final race ratings of the cycle, election experts at the Cook Political Report and Sabato's Crystal Ball predicted Kim's seat would flip red. But thanks to the support of this grassroots team, we beat the odds, fought back against millions of dollars in attack ads, and kept Kim in Congress! As we look ahead to 2024, we know Washington's 8th District is still a true purple district. That means that once again, it will be one of Republicans' top targets and the Washington GOP chair even said flipping this district is a main priority for them! If we're going to beat the odds again and keep Kim in Congress, we can't waste any time getting to work building another winning campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Kim is the first Democrat ever to represent Washington's 8th District in Congress. We know Republicans will once again look at defeating her to expand their narrow House majority. It's only a matter of time before opponents begin jumping in this race and the attacks against Kim start. We need to start preparing now to fight back if we're going to win again in this "toss-up" district. = Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. body:
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15233?t=6&akid=1664%2E564421%2EA0iCHf) Friend —

I wanted you to hear it from me first. I’m running for the U.S. Senate in 2024, to protect our democracy and to build an economy that works for everyone.

**Because we’re in the fight of our lives for the future of our country.**

[**If you’re with me, chip in $3 right now to be one of the Founding Members of Team Schiff. Here’s a personal link: secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_rbg_q12023_spl-schiff**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15236?t=8&akid=1664%2E564421%2EA0iCHf) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15242?t=14&akid=1664%2E564421%2EA0iCHf)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15243?t=15&akid=1664%2E564421%2EA0iCHf)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15244?t=16&akid=1664%2E564421%2EA0iCHf)
Our democracy is under assault by an extreme and power-hungry GOP whose leadership doesn’t care about truth, decency, or right and wrong. And they must be stopped. We did far better than expected against these radical Republicans in the midterms, but we are not out of the woods. Donald Trump is still the dominant voice in his party, and he has spawned a dangerous crowd of imitators.

_This is the fight of my life_ — to protect our democracy, build it back stronger, and hold those who would tear it down accountable.

And at a time when our economy simply isn’t working for millions of Americans, who see their wages fail to keep pace with the cost of food, education, and housing, and who don’t have the same opportunity to succeed as their parents, we simply can’t afford to wait and hope the economy fixes itself.

Because if hard-working folks don’t have a chance to succeed, they start looking for alternatives — like a demagogue who promises that he alone can fix it.

With our economy and our democracy at risk, we must fight:

For an economy that works for everyone and leaves no one behind. For universal health care. Against climate change and for a healthy planet. To stop gun violence and protect our children. To realize a bold and progressive future for the Golden State and our nation.

**ith Trump on the ballot and control of the House and Senate at stake in 2024, I truly believe that the future of our country hinges on this election. That’s why I need to know that you’re ready for the fight ahead.**

Senator Feinstein hasn’t announced her plans yet. But we need to start preparing for the fights ahead right now.

Over the last six years, I’ve taken on Trump and Trumpism to protect our country. And I’d do it again. In a heartbeat.

Already, the Republicans are going after me. Trump bellows at me at his rallies. Fox News runs its constant smears, and Kevin McCarthy just removed me from the Intelligence Committee. They don’t want me to continue holding them accountable, and they certainly don’t want me in the Senate.

Many of Trump’s worst enablers are in the U.S. Senate, and it’s where a lot of the critical fights for the future will take place.

When I led the Senate impeachment trial against Trump, I stood my ground, no matter what they threw at me. And I will take on anyone to protect the country I love and its proud legacy of self-government. As I run for the Senate, I need to know that you are by my side.

[**Can I count on you to be a Founding Member of Team Schiff before the end of the day? Even $3, $10, or $25 goes a long way.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15236?t=18&akid=1664%2E564421%2EA0iCHf)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15242?t=24&akid=1664%2E564421%2EA0iCHf)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15243?t=25&akid=1664%2E564421%2EA0iCHf)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15244?t=26&akid=1664%2E564421%2EA0iCHf)
I’ll keep you posted every step of the way, and I can’t thank you enough for all you’ve done for me and to protect our democracy.

Talk soon,

Adam
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

He MUST be defeated in the next election. Friend, until last year, Roe v. Wade __ upheld the constitutional right to an abortion, empowering Americans to make their own choices about their bodies and futures.
But the Supreme Court ruling on Dobbs overturned 50 years of precedent, striking down Roe and ending the constitutional right to abortion in America.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: A week of progress in Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230127 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230127]
Team,
We emailed you recently about the importance of majorities. The past week in Michigan has shown just how critical they are to progress.
It’s been a busy week in Michigan. On Wednesday, Governor Whitmer held the annual State of the State address. It was the first in-person address since COVID, and the first in decades with a Democratic Governor and legislature.
There were a few priorities mentioned in the speech that I’m particularly excited about. First, a renewed push for safe gun storage, specifically a bill Senator Rosemary Bayer introduced last term that was the state companion to my Safe Guns, Safe Kids bill.
The Governor also laid out steps to repeal the 1931 law on Michigan’s books outlawing abortion, and expand protections for LGBTQ individuals through the Elliott-Larsen Civil Rights Act. It’s not only the right thing to do-- it should also attract young talent to Michigan.
Because we have a Democratic majority in the state legislature, they were able to immediately get to work. Yesterday, they moved bills through that will expand the earned income tax credit, move our presidential primary up to February 27th of 2024, repeal the retirement tax impacting Michigan’s seniors, and provide funding for business incentives.
I’ve been saying for months that Michigan needs to be the blueprint for lawmakers across the country. After the overturning of Roe, we had a plan to get protections on our ballots. On Election Day, we defied national expectations and elected a Democratic legislative majority in the process. And now, we’re taking those wins and putting them into action.
But, we can’t stop building on the progress we’ve made the last few years. Chip in below to help me solidify Michigan as the blueprint for progress. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230127]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230127]
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents mid-Michigan in Congress. She was re-elected in 2022 by a 5-point margin, in the state's most competitive Congressional district.
